title: Social Reasoning in Machines: Investigating Collective Truth-Seeking Dynamics in Large Language Model Debate
summary: Human reasoning has long been theorised to operate socially, not through isolated individual cognition, but through collective adversarial discourse, a framework known as the Argumentative Theory of Reasoning (ATR). Rather than relying on individual "intellectualist reasoners" as the primary vehicle for truth-seeking, ATR reconceptualises truth as an emergent property of social epistemology: the product of imperfect individual reasoning refined under the adversarial pressure of debate. This distributed method of collective intelligence has guided humanity to ever-greater epistemic heights and underpins the foundational principles of all democratic systems. This thesis breaks new ground by, for the first time, simulating ATR through the multi-agent debate (MAD) of large language models (LLMs). With rigorous empirical analysis, we demonstrate that, when correctly engineering an epistemically diverse set of models, LLM-MAD can significantly improve truth-seeking performance on questionnaire-based tasks, even when individual debate participants exhibit limited standalone performance. Furthermore, we present strong empirical evidence that this performance gain is mechanistically grounded in the central principles of ATR, suggesting that collective reasoning may be universally favourable over individualist reasoning, rather than a quirk in biology or evolution. Finally, drawing on our analysis of debate dynamics, we propose a novel benchmarking methodology that leverages LLM-MAD to measure intrinsic model properties (such as hallucination propensity) in order to compare models in ways that current static benchmarking approaches cannot support.

AI.tldr: 本文首次使用多智能体辩论(MAD)模拟论证推理理论(ATR),通过构建认知多样性的LLM-agent群体,在问卷任务上显著提升真理性寻求表现,并提出基于LLM-MAD的新型基准测试方法。
AI.motivation: 传统认知科学认为推理是个体心智过程,但ATR理论主张真理是通过社会对抗性辩论产生的涌现性质。本文旨在用LLM验证ATR的核心假设,并探索集体推理是否普遍优于个体推理。
AI.method: 设计多智能体辩论系统,构建认知多样性的LLM-agent群体,在问卷任务上进行对抗性辩论,通过严格实证分析验证ATR机制的运作。
AI.result: LLM-MAD在问卷任务中显著提升真理性寻求表现,即便个体参与者单独表现有限;证据支持集体推理机制是性能增益的根源;该方法还可用于测量模型内在属性(如幻觉倾向)。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果支持ATR核心主张:集体推理普遍优于个体推理,而非生物进化偶然;为AI对齐和模型评估提供新基准框架。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about multi-agent LLM debate systems for collective truth-seeking in argumentation tasks. It has no connection to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different - it deals with LLMs and argumentation theory, not video generation, 3D motion synthesis, diffusion models for motion, or any visual/motion generation methods mentioned in the research profile.

title: Lightweight SAR Ship Detection via Contrastive Distillation
comment: Accepted in GLSVLSI'26 special session 74: Efficiency In Computer Vision: From Image Generation to Decision"
summary: Deep convolutional and transformer-based detectors achieve strong performance for SAR ship detection but are often computationally prohibitive for real-time or onboard deployment. Lightweight models offer improved efficiency yet struggle to capture the complex structural relationships inherent in SAR backscatter. Most existing SAR knowledge-distillation approaches rely on feature or logit matching, which enforces localized activation similarity while neglecting the geometric relationships among object representations. We propose a Structured Unified Relational knowledGE distillation framework for SAR Ship detection (SURGE) that transfers relational geometry from a powerful teacher detector to a compact student detector using a contrastive InfoNCE objective in a shared projection embedding space. To the best of our knowledge, this work presents the first transformer-based SAR ship detector knowledge distillation framework in SAR domain. The framework is architecture-agnostic in the sense that it provides a common region-level distillation interface for two-stage, one-stage and transformer-based detectors without modifying their deployed architectures. Experiments on the SSDD and HRSID benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method yields substantial improvements for two-stage detectors, achieving up to 6.2 mAP and 8.0 AP75 gains over baseline student and even surpassing teacher performance

AI.tldr: 提出了首个用于SAR船舶检测的基于Transformer的知识蒸馏框架SURGE，通过对比InfoNCE目标在共享投影嵌入空间中转移关系几何知识，实现从强大教师检测器到紧凑学生检测器的知识迁移。
AI.motivation: 深度卷积和Transformer检测器性能强但计算量大，难以实时或机载部署；轻量级模型难以捕捉SAR后向散射中的复杂结构关系；现有知识蒸馏方法依赖特征或logit匹配，忽视目标表示间的几何关系。
AI.method: 提出结构化统一关系知识蒸馏框架(SURGE)，使用对比InfoNCE目标在共享投影嵌入空间中转移关系几何知识。框架架构无关，可为两阶段、单阶段和Transformer检测器提供通用区域级蒸馏接口。
AI.result: 在SSDD和HRSID基准上，两阶段检测器获得最高6.2 mAP和8.0 AP75增益，超过基线学生模型甚至超越教师性能。
AI.conclusion: SURGE是首个Transformer-based SAR船舶检测器知识蒸馏框架，通过转移关系几何知识而非局部激活相似性，有效提升了轻量级模型的检测性能，为SAR船舶检测的实时/机载应用提供了可行方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. This paper is about SAR (Synthetic Aperture Radar) ship detection in remote sensing imagery, which has no connection to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion research. While both papers use Transformer-based methods and knowledge distillation, they operate in entirely different domains - remote sensing vs. human motion generation. The application domain mismatch is absolute: this deals with detecting ships in satellite radar images, not generating 3D human motion from text or video inputs.

title: PhyDrawGen: Physically Grounded Diagram Generation from Natural Language
comment: 9 figures, 7 tables. Under review at EMNLP 2026
summary: Generating physics diagrams from text requires strict adherence to physical laws. While current generative models produce visually plausible outputs, they systematically hallucinate force vectors, ignore conservation laws, and violate geometric constraints. We present PhyDrawGen, a neuro-symbolic pipeline that decouples semantic scene understanding from physical constraint satisfaction. First, a large language model extracts a typed scene graph from the problem text. A deterministic solver then converts this graph into a Planar Straight-Line Graph (PSLG), encoding force balance, optical paths, and field topologies as exact geometric primitives. Finally, a fine-tuned Qwen-VL model implements a visually grounded propose-verify loop to iteratively correct any constraint violations. Evaluated on a benchmark of 1,449 problems spanning mechanics, optics, and electromagnetism, PhyDrawGen significantly outperforms GPT-5-image, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and Gemini 3 Pro, demonstrating robust physical accuracy even on unusual-object problems.

AI.tldr: PhyDrawGen是一个神经符号 Pipeline，通过解耦语义场景理解与物理约束满足，从文本生成符合物理定律的图表。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型会产生力矢量幻觉、忽略守恒定律、违反几何约束，无法保证物理准确性。
AI.method: 三阶段流程：1)LLM提取类型化场景图；2)确定性求解器将图转换为PSLG，编码力平衡/光学路径/场拓扑；3)微调Qwen-VL通过提议-验证循环迭代纠正约束违规。
AI.result: 在1449个力学、光学、电磁学问题基准上显著优于GPT-5-image、Gemini 2.5 Flash和Gemini 3 Pro。
AI.conclusion: PhyDrawGen实现了鲁棒的物理准确性，即使在非常规物体问题上也能保持良好表现。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain entirely. Paper is about generating static 2D physics diagrams (force vectors, optical paths) from text, while the research profile requires Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion sequences). Although both use VLMs, they address fundamentally different tasks: diagram generation vs motion synthesis. The paper doesn't address any motion-related pain points (temporal consistency, 3D geometry extraction, motion-quality assessment).

title: Design and Evaluation of Multi-Agent AI Oracle Systems for Prediction Market Resolution
summary: Prediction markets aggregate collective intelligence to forecast uncertain events, but their utility depends on reliable outcome resolution. Existing oracle systems tradeoff fast but brittle automation against accurate but costly human arbitration. Single-LLM oracles achieve meaningful accuracy but inherit all failure modes of their underlying model with no self-correction mechanism. We evaluate whether multi-agent LLM architectures can improve oracle resolution accuracy over single-model baselines. We compare independent aggregation and deliberative consensus against single-LLM baselines (GPT-5 Nano, DeepSeek V3, and Llama-3.3-70B) on 1,189 resolved prediction market questions from KalshiBench. All agents share a common evidence layer through Exa, with retrieval filtered by publication date to isolate reasoning from retrieval quality. Independent aggregation with confidence-weighted voting achieves the highest accuracy at 83.43 percent, outperforming the best individual model by 1.01 percentage points. Deliberative consensus degrades accuracy to approximately 76 percent, below every single-model baseline, attributed to error propagation during debate where confidently wrong models flip correct ones. Error correlations across models (0.529-0.689) explain why aggregation gains fall short of the theoretical Condorcet ceiling, placing a fundamental limit on ensemble approaches. Many questions resist correction by any multi-agent architecture, motivating escalation to human arbitration. We propose routing criteria for hybrid AI-human oracle systems: auto-resolving only unanimous, high-confidence questions yields 97.87 percent accuracy on 47 percent of the dataset, with inter-agent disagreement flagging the remainder for human review.

AI.tldr: 研究多智能体LLM架构是否能提高预测市场预言机_resolution准确率。结果显示，置信度加权投票的独立聚合达到83.43%，优于最佳单模型1.01个百分点，但协商共识反而降至76%。提出混合AI-人类路由方案。
AI.motivation: 现有预言机系统在快速自动human仲裁之间存在权衡，单一LLM预言机继承所有失败模式且无自纠正机制。需要探索多智能体架构能否改进resolution准确率。
AI.method: 在KalshiBench的1189个已resolved预测市场问题上，比较独立聚合和协商共识与三种单模型基线(GPT-5 Nano、DeepSeek V3、Llama-3.3-70B)。所有智能体通过Exa共享通用证据层，按发布日期过滤检索以隔离推理质量。
AI.result: 独立聚合使用置信度加权投票达到最高准确率83.43%，优于最佳单模型1.01个百分点。协商共识准确率降至约76%，低于所有单模型基线，原因是辩论中错误传播导致坚定错误的模型翻转正确答案。模型间错误相关性(0.529-0.689)解释了聚合增益未达理论Condorcet上限。许多问题无法被任何多智能体架构纠正。
AI.conclusion: 提出混合AI-人类预言机路由标准：仅自动resolve unanimous高置信度问题，可在47%数据集上达到97.87%准确率，其余由人工审核。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text). This paper is about multi-agent LLM systems for PREDICTION MARKET RESOLUTION in financial markets. While both mention "VLM" or "LLM", they are in entirely different fields - one is computer graphics/motion synthesis, the other is NLP for financial forecasting. The methods, applications, and goals have no overlap whatsoever.

title: SANA-Streaming: Real-time Streaming Video Editing with Hybrid Diffusion Transformer
summary: Real-time streaming video-to-video editing (V2V) is critical for interactive applications such as live broadcasting and gaming, yet it remains a formidable challenge due to the stringent requirements for temporal consistency and inference throughput. In this paper, we present SANA-Streaming, a system-algorithm co-designed framework for high-resolution, real-time streaming video editing on consumer GPUs, with the following three core designs: (1) Hybrid Diffusion Transformer architecture introduces softmax attention in part of the blocks to improve local modeling capabilities while preserving the efficiency of linear layers. (2) Cycle-Reverse Regularization is a novel training strategy that enforces semantic consistency by predicting source frames from generated content via flow matching, improving temporal consistency without requiring paired long edited videos. (3) Efficient System Co-design combines fused GDN kernels and Mixed-Precision Quantization (MPQ) optimized for the NVIDIA Blackwell (RTX 5090) architecture. By profiling real-world throughput, our MPQ maximizes Tensor Core utilization while maintaining generation quality. The resulting system achieves real-time 1280 x 704 resolution editing at 24 end-to-end FPS on a single RTX 5090 GPU, with the DiT core running at 58 FPS. Experimental results demonstrate that our co-design approach significantly outperforms existing SOTA methods in both temporal coherence and system throughput.

AI.tldr: SANA-Streaming是一个用于消费级GPU上高分辨率实时流媒体视频编辑的系统算法协同设计框架，通过混合扩散Transformer架构、循环逆转正则化和高效系统协同设计实现。
AI.motivation: 实时流媒体视频到视频编辑(V2V)在直播和游戏等交互应用中是关键需求，但由于对时间一致性和推理吞吐量的严格要求，这仍然是一项严峻挑战。
AI.method: 提出三个核心设计：(1)混合扩散Transformer架构在部分块中引入softmax注意力以提高局部建模能力，同时保留线性层的效率；(2)循环逆转正则化是一种新型训练策略，通过流匹配从生成内容预测源帧来强制语义一致性，无需配对的长时间编辑视频即可改善时间一致性；(3)高效系统协同设计结合融合GDN内核和针对NVIDIA Blackwell(RTX 5090)架构优化的混合精度量化(MPQ)。
AI.result: 在单个RTX 5090 GPU上实现了1280x704分辨率的实时编辑，端到端FPS达24，DiT核心运行于58FPS。实验结果表明，该协同设计方法在时间一致性和系统吞吐量方面显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统-算法协同设计方法，能够在消费级GPU上实现高质量实时视频编辑，为交互式视频应用提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about video-to-video editing for livestreaming/gaming, which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion. While it mentions temporal consistency and uses diffusion transformers, the goal is modifying 2D video frames, not generating 3D human motion from text. Text-to-motion requires extracting 3D skeletal/geometric information and mapping text to motion trajectories - this paper addresses none of the pain points like cross-domain knowledge transfer from 2D video to 3D motion geometry, semantic alignment between text and visual motion features, or limited text-motion training data. The application domains are fundamentally different despite some methodological overlap.

title: Physically Viable World Models: A Case for Query-Conditioned Embodied AI
comment: 21 pages; Adam J. Thorpe and Stepan Tretiakov contributed equally
summary: World models for embodied AI must be physically viable: constructed to answer intervention queries by representing the physical structure governing action outcomes, rather than merely predicting future observations. Existing observation-predictive world models can produce visually plausible but physically wrong rollouts. This failure is structural; distinct physical systems can look identical yet diverge under intervention. We expose this problem with controlled benchmarks that fix the visible scene while varying latent physics. We show that such models may recommend infeasible actions, mispredict interaction outcomes, or certify unsafe behavior. We argue that embodied AI requires world models that identify the simplest physical abstraction sufficient to answer an intervention query. Such a model comprises modular components, including environment representation, latent state and parameter estimation, action specification, interventional dynamics, and query-level response. An autonomous orchestrator should identify the relevant abstraction and compose compatible learned and structured components per query. When closed-form physics is unavailable, uncertain, or costly, the transition model may be analytic, simulated, learned, or hybrid, but it must preserve the structure that determines interventional outcomes. This decomposition makes the model interpretable, its components verifiable, and its outputs auditable against the query. It also provides a design principle for new world models and a feasibility test for existing ones: the right abstraction is not the most detailed model of the world, but the simplest model that preserves the distinctions relevant to the query. We demonstrate this approach on queries that existing systems fail to answer correctly, and outline how an orchestrator can dynamically assemble and adapt physically viable models for planning, control, and verification.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前具身AI的世界模型存在根本性缺陷：仅能预测观察结果而无法保证物理可行性。作者通过控制基准实验证明，外观相同但物理参数不同的系统可能产生完全错误的干预结果。论文提出构建模块化世界模型的新框架，包含环境表示、潜在状态估计、动作规格、介入动力学和查询响应等组件，由自主编排器根据具体查询动态组合兼容的组件。核心设计原则是：最简模型而非最详细模型，是回答特定干预查询所需的正确抽象。
AI.motivation: 现有具身AI系统在物理可行性问题上面临严重挑战。观察预测型世界模型可以生成视觉上 plausible 但物理上错误的rollout。当前的模型在干预查询时可能推荐不可行的动作、误预测交互结果或认证不安全行为。这个问题本质上是结构性的：不同的物理系统可能看起来完全相同，但在干预下会发散。
AI.method: 作者通过设计控制基准实验来暴露这个问题：固定可见场景同时改变潜在物理参数，比较不同模型的的表现。提出模块化世界模型架构，包含五个核心组件：环境表示、潜在状态和参数估计、动作规格、介入动力学、查询级响应。由自主编排器识别相关抽象并按查询组合兼容的学习型和结构化组件。
AI.result: 作者证明现有的观察预测模型在回答干预查询时会失败，可能推荐不可行动作、误预测交互结果或认证不安全行为。通过模块化分解方案，模型变得可解释、可验证和可审计。正确的抽象不是对世界最详细的模型，而是保留与查询相关区分的最简模型。
AI.conclusion: 为具身AI研究提供了新设计原则和现有模型的可行性测试标准。文章展示了方法在现有系统无法正确回答的查询上的应用，并勾勒出编排器如何动态组装和调整物理可行的模型用于规划、控制和验证。指出了未来研究方向包括发展更系统的干预查询基准测试和更高效的模型组合策略。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses embodied AI world models and physical feasibility - an entirely different application domain from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. While the research profile deals with generating human motion from text/video (e.g., extracting 3D skeletal motion from 2D video), this paper focuses on predictive models for robotic/embodied agent interactions. The pain points are unrelated: this paper addresses intervention queries and physical dynamics simulation, not temporal motion synthesis, semantic alignment, or quality assessment for human animation. The methods discussed (modular world models, latent state estimation) do not overlap with diffusion models or transformer-based motion generation used in the text-to-motion field.

title: Safe Equilibrium Policy Optimization for Strategic Agent Policies
summary: Language models fine-tuned with reinforcement learning typically optimize for task reward, ignoring multi-agent strategic structure. Because these agents condition on natural language game-state descriptions and emit actions through free-form generation, strategic failure modes -- exploiting weaker opponents, coordinating on harmful equilibria, and externalizing costs are inseparable from the language interface itself. We propose Safe Equilibrium Policy Optimization (\sepo{}), a training objective that augments expected payoff with explicit penalties for exploitability, collusion risk, and externality cost. We implement \sepo{} as a reward signal for Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), applied to Gemma~4 E4B-it and Qwen~3.5-4B after supervised fine-tuning (SFT). Evaluated across five strategic domains: Iterated Prisoner's Dilemma, repeated auctions, two negotiation variants, and Kuhn Poker. \sepo{} achieves zero exploit-pool advantage in Kuhn Poker for both models, outperforms the base model on safety in four domains, and corrects the over-cooperative behavior introduced by SFT. In negotiation, \sepo{} achieves a positive-safety outcome and only the positive normalized relative advantage of any negotiation configuration. Ablation experiments confirm that per-rollout exploit computation is necessary: a shared constant penalty cancels in GRPO advantage normalization (constant control-variate property), producing zero gradient. To support further research in strategic safety for agents, we release our \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/sepo-2668/README.md}{code} and SFT datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出安全均衡策略优化(SEPO)，在语言模型强化学习微调中引入对等性、串通风险和外部性的显式惩罚，避免多智能体战略环境中agent出现剥削、串通和成本外部化等失败模式。在5个战略域实验验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前语言模型通过强化学习微调时仅优化任务奖励，忽视了多智能体博弈中的战略结构。战略失败模式（剥削弱对手、在有害均衡上协调、将成本外部化）与自然语言接口本身密不可分，需要显式的安全约束。
AI.method: 提出安全均衡策略优化(SEPO)训练目标：将等性、串通风险和外部性成本作为显式惩罚项加入期望收益。采用GRPO作为奖励信号，在Gemma 4 E4B-it和Qwen 3.5-4B监督微调后应用。评估域包括迭代囚徒困境、重复拍卖、两种谈判变体和Kuhn扑克。
AI.result: SEPO在Kuhn扑克中达到零可剥削优势；在4个域上安全性能优于基模型；纠正了监督微调引入的过度合作行为。谈判中实现正向安全结果，且为唯一具有正向归一化相对优势的谈判配置。消融实验表明每-rollout的等性计算是必需的，共享常数惩罚会在GRPO优势归一化中抵消（常数控制变量属性），产生零梯度。
AI.conclusion: SEPO能有效抑制多智能体环境中的战略风险行为，在保持任务性能的同时提升安全性。该方法为构建更安全的多智能体语言模型系统提供了可行的训练范式。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper addresses multi-agent reinforcement learning for strategic decision-making in game-theoretic settings (iterated prisoner's dilemma, auctions, Kuhn poker). The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion generation - specifically generating 3D human motion from text/video using diffusion models. The application domains are entirely different: game theory/strategic agents vs. motion generation. While both may use RL concepts, they serve completely unrelated purposes. There is no overlap in methods, application areas, or research goals.

title: DTG-Restore: Training-Free Diffusion Refinement for Generative Video Super-Resolution
summary: Recent progress in video diffusion models has enabled remarkable generative fidelity, yet leveraging these priors for restoration remains limited by the strong coupling between conditional and unconditional branches in standard classifier-free guidance. We introduce a training-free framework that enhances distorted and low-resolution videos by decoupling these signals in time. Our proposed Decoupled Time Guidance (DTG) evaluates the unconditional branch at a cleaner diffusion timestep, providing a lookahead prior that preserves geometry while suppressing replication of warped content. This temporal bias is annealed throughout sampling, allowing the model to transition from structure correction to detail refinement without retraining. Combined with any off-the-shelf restoration module in a plug-and-play manner, our approach improves perceptual coherence and restores plausible structure in AIgenerated and real-world videos alike. To facilitate evaluation, we curate GenWarp480, a benchmark of 4,400 distorted 480p videos synthesized from diverse text-to-video models. GenWarp480 focuses on characteristic generative degradations such as warped faces, body misalignments, and spatial artifacts, providing a purpose-built testbed for assessing robustness to generative errors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves significant improvements in structural fidelity and temporal stability without any model training.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种无需训练的解耦时间引导(DTG)框架,用于恢复AI生成和真实世界的失真、低分辨率视频。该方法通过在更干净的扩散时间步评估无条件分支,提供lookahead先验来保留几何结构同时抑制扭曲内容的复制。
AI.motivation: 当前视频扩散模型虽然具有出色的生成保真度,但在标准无分类器引导中条件分支和无条件分支的强耦合限制了其在修复任务中的应用。作者希望在不训练的情况下利用这些先验改善失真和低分辨率视频。
AI.method: DTG框架的核心是在更清洁的扩散时间步评估无条件分支,提供lookahead先验保留几何结构的同时抑制扭曲内容的复制。这种时间偏差在采样过程中逐步退火,使模型能够从结构修正过渡到细节细化,且无需任何再训练。该方法可与任何现成的修复模块即插即用结合使用。
AI.result: 在作者 curated的GenWarp480基准(包含4400个来自不同文本到视频模型的失真480p视频)上进行广泛实验,结果表明该方法在结构保真度和时间稳定性方面实现了显著提升,且无需任何模型训练。
AI.conclusion: DTG是一种有效的训练-free视频修复框架,通过解耦时间引导实现了结构修正到细节细化的平滑过渡,在AI生成和真实世界视频上都能恢复合理的结构,且可与现有修复模块无缝集成。

title: Transforming and Encoding FTS for SAT Solving: What Helps, What Hurts (Extended Version)
summary:
Factored tasks are a classical planning representation that extends SAS+ with limited forms of disjunctive preconditions, conditional effects, and angelic nondeterminism. This allows for a more compact representation of tasks than traditional formalisms such as STRIPS or SAS+, and supports a wide range of task transformations. However, existing planning approaches for factored tasks have been limited to heuristic search methods.
  In this work, we investigate how to encode factored tasks in SAT. We propose several ways to encode the tasks, focusing on different strategies for translating the factored transition relation into propositional logic. We also analyze how to exploit parallelism at various levels in this setting and study the impact of common task transformations on the performance of SAT-based planners.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将扩展的SAS+任务（因子任务）编码为SAT问题，提出了多种转换策略来分析并行性和任务变换的影响。
AI.motivation: 因子任务是比传统STRIPS或SAS+更紧凑的表示方式，但现有规划方法仅局限于启发式搜索，需要拓展SAT-based规划方法。
AI.method: 提出了多种将因子任务的转换关系翻译成命题逻辑的编码策略，并分析了不同层级的并行性利用方式。
AI.result: 研究了常见任务变换对SAT规划器性能的影响，为SAT-based规划器的实际应用提供了指导。
AI.conclusion: SAT编码方法为因子任务提供了一种新的规划求解途径，不同的编码策略和任务变换会显著影响规划器的效率。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about SAT-based automated planning and AI planning, focusing on encoding factorized task structures (FTS/FAS+) into propositional logic. It has no connection to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, or any motion generation tasks. The application domain is entirely different - it's classical AI planning research, not computer graphics or motion synthesis. No similarity in methods or application areas whatsoever.

title: Mitigating Content Shift and Hallucination in GenAI Image Editing via Structural Refinement
summary: Generative AI (GenAI) image editors, such as Nano Banana, produce visually compelling results for retouching tasks, enabling non-experts to edit images through text prompts alone. However, the generative nature of these models often introduces spatial misalignment, texture distortion, and content hallucination, all of which are detrimental to downstream workflows that require pixel-level fidelity. We identify a problem setting we call "structure-preserving GenAI fusion" for black-box GenAI image retouching: retain the perceptual enhancements of a GenAI output while enforcing structural faithfulness to the original input image. To address this problem, we propose a post-processing framework that fuses an input image with its GenAI-enhanced counterpart by first establishing coarse spatial and photometric correspondences, then performing a fusion stage that transfers desired enhancements while suppressing hallucinated content. In the absence of direct prior work in this setting, we evaluate our framework against representative methods from photorealistic style transfer and image fusion. Our experiments demonstrate that our method better preserves aesthetic quality while maintaining pixel-level structural consistency and the input resolution.

AI.tldr: 针对生成式AI图像编辑器产生的空间错位、纹理失真和内容幻觉问题，提出结构保持的GenAI融合框架，通过建立空间和光度对应并执行融合阶段，在保留感知增强的同时强制执行原始输入图像的结构保真度。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI图像编辑器如Nano Banana虽然能为非专家提供通过文本提示编辑图像的能力，产生视觉上引人注目的结果，但其生成性质常引入空间错位、纹理失真和内容幻觉，这对需要像素级保真度的下游工作流程不利。
AI.method: 提出一种后处理框架称为"结构保持GenAI融合"，包括：首先建立输入图像与其GenAI增强版本之间的粗略空间和光度对应；然后执行融合阶段，转移所需的增强效果同时抑制幻觉内容。在缺乏该设置直接先例的情况下，与光真实感风格传递和图像融合的代表方法进行对比评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持像素级结构一致性和输入分辨率的同时，更好地保留了美学质量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的结构保持GenAI融合框架能够有效解决GenAI图像编辑器的缺陷，为需要精确像素级保真的应用提供了可行的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text/video), while this paper addresses 2D image editing/editing artifacts (spatial misalignment, hallucination in generated images). Even though both may involve visual feature extraction, they target fundamentally different outputs - human motion generation vs. 2D image synthesis. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points including temporal consistency, text-motion alignment, or 3D geometry extraction from 2D priors.

title: Procedural Generation of First Person Shooter Maps using Map-Elites
summary: We investigate the application of MAP-Elites (a well-known quality diversity algorithm) to design levels for First-Person Shooter (FPS) games. We consider two well-known map representations (All-Black and Grid-Graph) and introduce two novel representations (Point-Line and Spatial-Layout) that improve the characterization of FPS maps. We define a series of metrics to describe maps' topological properties (which solely depend on maps' layout), and emergent properties (which must be evaluated through actual gameplay). We perform an in-depth analysis to identify the most suitable features to guide MAP-Elites illumination process. We apply MAP-Elites with Sliding Boundaries (MESB) to evolve populations of FPS maps. Our results show that the new representations can generate maps with higher diversity and quality than the representations previously used for evolving FPS maps.

AI.tldr: 研究将MAP-Elites算法应用于第一人称射击游戏(FPS)关卡设计，提出了两种新的地图表示方法(Point-Line和Spatial-Layout)，并通过定义拓扑指标和涌现指标来评估地图质量。
AI.motivation: 之前的FPS游戏关卡演化方法存在多样性不足的问题，需要一种能够同时优化质量和多样性的方法。MAP-Elites作为质量多样性算法的优势在于可以生成大量不同但高质量的解决方案。
AI.method: 引入两种新型地图表示方法(Point-Line和Spatial-Layout)；定义了拓扑属性指标(仅依赖地图布局)和涌现属性指标(需要实际游戏测试)；使用带滑动边界的MAP-Elites(MESB)进行演化；对不同特征引导效果进行深入分析。
AI.result: 新提出的地图表示方法能够生成比以往方法更高多样性和质量的FPS地图，验证了这些表示方法在FPS地图演化中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Point-Line和Spatial-Layout表示方法相比传统的All-Black和Grid-Graph表示方法更适合用于FPS地图的演化设计，为游戏关卡生成提供了更优的工具。

Even though both are somewhat in "computer graphics," the application domains are entirely different: game environment generation vs. human motion synthesis. The methods are also completely unrelated (evolutionary algorithms vs. diffusion models, transformers, VLM for motion generation).

title: Healthcare Mechanisms from Policy-as-Code Search under Strategic Provider Response
summary: Healthcare mechanisms are inseparable from the strategic provider response they induce: existing healthcare AI benchmarks hold this response fixed and so cannot evaluate mechanisms by the equilibrium they produce. We recast hospital mechanism design as program synthesis for language models: typed, inspectable rule programs are executed and scored by Medi-Sim, a multi-agent simulator with five strategic provider channels (coding, selection, delay, effort, triage). An incentive sweep recovers classical health-economics findings as adjacent regimes -- up-coding and low-complexity-patient selection under profit pressure, and Goodhart-style drift where measured performance becomes anti-correlated with true outcomes -- and a single audit lever exposes pressure migration: closing the coding channel more than doubles low-complexity selection. LLM-guided evolutionary code search over the same rule-program space then synthesizes an inspectable mixed-objective program that eliminates up-coding, halves rejection, and retains most of the profit-oriented baseline's funds.

title: Seeing Before Agreeing: Aligning Multi-Agent Consensus with Visual Evidence
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved strong performance on visual question answering (VQA). To mitigate individual hallucinations and blind spots, aggregating diverse perspectives via multi-agent collaboration has emerged as a promising paradigm. While this approach has shown great success in textual QA, its potential in the multimodal domain remains under-explored. Existing multi-agent VQA methods predominantly adapt text-centric protocols, focusing on textual discussions while ignoring the alignment of visual information. In this work, we reveal a key insight: answer-level agreement is insufficient for reliable multi-agent VQA; \textit{aligned visual evidence} -- shared support from the image regions agents rely on -- is essential for trustworthy consensus. To leverage this insight, we propose EAGLE (\textbf{E}vidence-\textbf{A}ligned \textbf{G}rounded mu\textbf{L}ti-agent r\textbf{E}asoning), a training-free evidence-centered framework for coordinating multiple VLM agents. EAGLE explicitly exposes each agent's grounding regions as visual evidence, enables mutual verification over the evidence, and uses evidence consistency to guide final decision-making. Experiments on six VQA benchmarks show that EAGLE achieves best average performance across domains while remaining lightweight, interpretable, and practical for deployment.

AI.tldr: EAGLE是一个无需训练的多智能体视觉问答框架，通过让多个VLM智能体共享和验证视觉证据（图像区域）来实现更可靠的答案共识，而不是仅依赖文本层面的回答一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体VQA方法主要借鉴文本问答协议，过度关注文本讨论而忽视视觉信息对齐。现有方法仅依赖答案级别的一致性，这对于可靠的多智能体VQA是不充分的——需要对齐的视觉证据作为可信赖共识的基础。
AI.method: EAGLE框架包含三个核心步骤：1)显式暴露每个智能体的 grounding 区域作为视觉证据；2)支持智能体间对证据的相互验证；3)使用证据一致性来引导最终决策。这是一个无需训练、轻量级、可解释的方法。
AI.result: 在六个VQA基准数据集上的实验表明，EAGLE在跨领域上获得了最佳的平均性能，同时保持了轻量级、可解释性和实际部署的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了视觉证据对齐是多智能体VQA成功的关键因素，为可信的多智能体视觉问答提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的应用领域。该论文是关于Visual Question Answering (VQA)多智能体系统，针对的是图像问答任务，而研究档案的核心是Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion，即从文本生成3D人体运动。尽管都用到了Vision-Language Models，但应用场景完全不同。VQA是关于理解和回答关于图像的问题，Text-to-Motion是关于生成3D动作序列。这相当于把"diffusion用于图像生成"的论文评价给"diffusion用于人体动作生成"的需求——应用领域完全不同，因此相关性极低。

title: Clustering Guided Domain-Specific Pretrained Foundation Model Very High-Resolution Arctic Remote Sensing
summary: This study introduces a novel Arctic-focused remote sensing foundation model (RSFM) by combining diversity-aware regional-scale image curation with masked autoencoder (MAE) self-supervised pretraining of a Vision Transformer (ViT) encoder for very-high-spatial-resolution (VHSR) satellite image analysis. Spectral and acquisition-metadata descriptors were used in a scalable affinity-propagation clustering workflow to select approximately 3 million chips from 267 TB of Vantor VHSR imagery This curation strategy was designed to reduce oversampling of visually repetitive or low-information areas while preserving broad scene diversity across the study domain. We pretrained a ViT-Large encoder on the curated corpus using a domain-adapted MAE reconstruction objective, producing Arctic-specific transformer weights for downstream feature mapping. The pretrained encoder was integrated into an existing location-aware detection and segmentation framework and evaluated across four hand-labeled Arctic datasets. Compared to ImageNet-initialized ViT-Large baseline, Arctic MAE pretraining produced consistent improvements in foreground mean F1 scores of 0.87, 0.72, 0.93, and 0.87, for infrastructure, IWP, RTS, and TCNs, with approximately 5-8 percentage increase. The proposed model also outperformed Prithvi-EO-2.0 in all downstream comparisons, with the smallest gain corresponding to at least a 15 percentage improvement mean F1, suggesting that domain-specific self-supervised pretraining on curated Arctic VHSR imagery provides more transferable representations for fine-scale Arctic mapping than a general-purpose Earth observation foundation model. These results demonstrate that optimizing the pretraining data distribution at regional scale, while keeping the architecture and MAE objective fixed, can produce a reusable Arctic-domain encoder for multiple VHSR remote sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于北极地区的高分辨率卫星遥感基础模型(RSFM)，通过结合多样性感知的区域尺度图像筛选与掩码自编码器(MAE)自监督预训练Vision Transformer(ViT)编码器，在约300万张精选图像上进行预训练，旨在提升北极地区精细化制图任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 北极地区的卫星影像具有独特的环境特征，现有通用地球观测基础模型（如ImageNet初始化模型、Prithvi-EO-2.0等）在北极特定任务上迁移效果有限，需要开发专门针对北极地区的高分辨率遥感基础模型以提升下游任务的准确性。
AI.method: 采用多样性感知的大规模图像筛选策略，结合光谱和采集元数据进行仿射传播聚类，从267TB的Vantor极高分辨率卫星影像中筛选出约300万个样本芯片，随后使用领域自适应的MAE重建目标对ViT-Large编码器进行自监督预训练，预训练得到的权重被集成到现有的位置感知检测分割框架中进行评估。
AI.result: 与ImageNet初始化的ViT-Large基线相比，北极MAE预训练在四个手标注数据集上实现了显著的性能提升：基础设施F1分数为0.87，IWP为0.72，RTS为0.93，TCNs为0.87，提升幅度约为5-8个百分点；该模型在所有下游对比中均优于Prithvi-EO-2.0，最小提升达15个百分点以上。
AI.conclusion: 在区域尺度上优化预训练数据分布，同时保持架构和MAE目标不变，能够为多个极高分辨率北极遥感应用生成可复用的北极域编码器，表明领域特定的自我监督预训练比通用地球观测基础模型提供更可迁移的表示。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. title: HADT: A Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Differential Transformer for Autonomous Earth Observation Satellite Cluster
comment: Accepted in ECML-PKDD 2026. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2511.12792
summary: This work addresses the problem of autonomous resource management in heterogeneous satellite cluster conducting Earth Observation (EO) missions including optical and Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) satellites. In autonomous operation mode, satellites are equipped with intelligent capabilities enabling real-time decision-making based on the latest conditions, while requiring minimal interaction with ground operators. Traditional scheduling approaches typically rely on mathematical models to represent satellite mission and resource management. Then, this problem is solved by using optimization algorithms. However, such solutions become less effective when the underlying models are not available, over complex, and inaccurate due to dynamic changes and uncertainties inherent in the space mission environment. A promising alternative is to reformulate the problem as a sequential decision-making process and apply model-free reinforcement learning techniques to enable adaptive and real-time resource management. To this end, we propose a novel transformer-based architecture tailored for heterogeneous satellite cluster autonomous EO Mission with relational observations-actions tokenization and differential attention mechanism. Our experimental results demonstrate significant performance improvements compared to the available baselines. Moreover, the proposed architecture exhibits strong adaptability and transferability with respect to varying numbers of satellite clusters.

AI.tldr: 针对异构卫星集群（光学卫星和合成孔径雷达卫星）的地球观测任务，提出了一种基于Transformer架构的无模型强化学习方法，实现自主资源管理。该方法通过关系观测-动作标记化和差分注意力机制，使卫星能够实时决策，适应动态空间环境变化。
AI.motivation: 传统调度方法依赖数学模型和优化算法，但在动态不确定的空间任务环境中，这些模型往往不可用、不精确或过于复杂。需要一种无需精确模型的自适应实时资源管理方法。
AI.method: 将资源管理问题重新表述为序列决策过程，采用无模型强化学习技术。提出新型Transformer架构，包含关系观测-动作标记化方法和差分注意力机制。
AI.result: 相比现有基线方法取得显著性能提升，显示出对不同数量卫星集群的强大适应性和可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 该Transformer架构能够有效解决异构卫星集群的自主地球观测任务资源管理问题，为未来智能卫星系统提供了新的技术路径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about satellite resource management and multi-agent reinforcement learning for autonomous Earth observation satellites - completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion field. Although both papers use Transformer architectures, this paper applies them to aerospace/robotics control problems, not human motion generation or video synthesis. The application domain is fundamentally different with no overlap in goals, methods, or domain expertise.

title: A Novel Global Context-aware Deep Neural Network for Enhanced Brain Tumor Segmentation using Magnetic Resonance Images
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures, 6 tables. Submitted to arXiv cs.CV
summary: Brain cancer's severity necessitates precise brain tumor segmentation, which is crucial for effective brain tumor diagnosis. Manual identification, burdened by high costs, labor, and error risks, highlights the need for automated methods. In this study, we introduce the Global Context-aware Squeeze and Excite Residual UNet (GCSER-UNet), which facilitates a fusion of spatial and channel-wise attention and thus enhances the model's capacity to capture intricate spatial dependencies and contextual information. GCSER-UNet efficiently extracts tumor segments from multimodal MRI slices, delivering exceptional performance. Evaluations on benchmark databases exhibit its superiority, achieving a notable 94 percent dice score on the TCGA LGG dataset, surpassing the state-of-the-art dice score of 91.8 percent. In the BraTS 2020 dataset, the proposed GCSER-UNet ensemble approach yielded dice scores of 95 percent, 92 percent, and 90 percent for the tumor regions - Whole Tumor (W), Tumor Core (T), and Enhancing Tumor (E), respectively. The current state-of-the-art dice scores were 94 percent, 93 percent, and 88 percent. These compelling outcomes highlight the efficacy of GCSER-UNet in precise brain tumor segmentation and thus can aid neurologists in effective brain cancer management and treatment planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GCSER-UNet的深度学习模型，用于从多模态MRI图像中自动分割脑肿瘤。该模型结合了空间注意力和通道注意力机制，在TCGA LGG数据集上达到94%的Dice分数，在BraTS 2020数据集上对Whole Tumor、Tumor Core和Enhancing Tumor三个区域分别达到95%、92%和90%的Dice分数，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.motivation: 脑癌的严重性要求精确的脑肿瘤分割，这对有效诊断至关重要。传统手动分割方法成本高、劳动密集且容易出错，因此需要自动化分割方法来提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 提出了Global Context-aware Squeeze and Excitation Residual UNet (GCSER-UNet)，该模型融合了空间注意力和通道注意力机制（SE模块），增强了模型捕获精细空间依赖性和上下文信息的能力，能够高效地从多模态MRI切片中提取肿瘤区域。
AI.result: 在TCGA LGG数据集上实现了94%的Dice分数，优于之前最先进的91.8%。在BraTS 2020数据集上，Whole Tumor、D Tumor Core和Enhancing Tumor区域的Dice分数分别为95%、92%和90%，其中WT和ET优于之前的94%和88%，T略低于之前的93%。
AI.conclusion: GCSER-UNet在精确脑肿瘤分割方面表现出色，能够帮助神经科医生进行有效的癌症管理和治疗规划。

The paper does not address any of the pain points mentioned (cross-domain knowledge transfer, temporal consistency, semantic alignment, etc.) nor does it use any of the methods relevant to text-to-motion generation.

title: EHRBench: An Automated and Reliable EHR-based Benchmark for Clinical Decision Making with LLMs
comment: Proceedings of the 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026), Datasets and Benchmarks Track, Oral
summary: Clinical decision-making (CDM) is central to real-world clinical workflows, where clinicians infer diagnoses, select treatments, or anticipate future health outcomes under incomplete evidence. LLMs are increasingly used to support these decisions due to strong language capabilities, broad biomedical knowledge, and efficiency, yet the reliability of LLMs on real-world clinical decision tasks remains insufficiently understood. To evaluate CDM models, especially LLM-based models, an ideal and practical medical decision benchmark should be constructed via an automated yet reliable pipeline to ensure both scale and quality. Moreover, the grounding of a CDM benchmark in real patient EHRs can better support evaluation on practical CDM tasks that require substantive biomedical knowledge and clinical inference. To fill the gaps, we introduce EHRBench, an automated and reliable EHR-grounded benchmark for evaluating LLM-based clinical decision-making at scale. To ensure scalability and reliability, EHRBench is constructed through an EHR-LLM-KB(knowledge-base) interaction pipeline. For efficiency, we use a specialized LLM to automatically convert encounter-level EHR trajectories into structured templates and deterministically instantiate the templates into QA items. In parallel, we apply systematic KB-based verification and enrichment to filter hallucinated or ambiguous relations and to improve reliability. Using this pipeline, we construct nearly 1M (960,067) QA items spanning three core inference-required clinical decision tasks: diagnosis, treatment, and prognosis. We benchmark more than 30 representative LLMs on EHRBench and provide detailed analyses of performance and robustness. The results show consistent capability trends across settings, further validating the reliability of EHRBench and highlighting actionable gaps toward clinically reliable LLM systems.

AI.tldr: EHRBench是一个基于真实患者电子健康记录(EHR)构建的大规模临床决策基准测试，用于评估大语言模型在诊断、治疗和预后三大核心临床推理任务上的表现。该基准通过EHR-LLM-KB交互pipeline自动化生成约96万条QA项目。
AI.motivation: 临床决策(CDM)是真实临床工作流程的核心，但LLM在此类任务上的可靠性尚未得到充分理解和验证。现有评估基准缺乏规模化和可靠性的平衡，且需要基于真实患者EHR来更好地支持实际临床决策任务的评估。
AI.method: 采用EHR-LLM-KB(知识库)交互pipeline构建基准：1)使用专用LLM将就诊级EHR轨迹自动转换为结构化模板；2)确定性实例化模板生成QA项目；3)并行进行基于KB的系统性验证和富化，过滤幻觉或模糊关系。最终构建了覆盖诊断、治疗和预后三大推理要求临床决策任务的基准。
AI.result: 构建了包含960,067个QA项目的大规模基准，对30余个代表性LLM进行了详细性能分析。结果显示能力趋势在各设置下一致，验证了EHRBench的可靠性，并揭示了迈向临床可靠LLM系统的可行改进方向。
AI.conclusion: EHRBench为大语言模型的临床决策能力提供了规模化、可靠的评估框架，推动了LLM在临床实践中应用的可行性验证，为开发更加可靠的临床LLM系统奠定基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about healthcare/clinical decision-making with LLMs using Electronic Health Records (EHR). The application domain is MEDICAL AI, which is entirely different from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. Even though it mentions LLMs and "quality assessment," these concepts are in a completely different field (healthcare diagnostics vs. 3D human motion generation). There is no connection to video generation models, diffusion models for motion synthesis, 3D motion geometry, or any computer graphics topics.

title: OmniMem: Scalable and Adaptive Memory Retrieval for Long Video Generation
summary: Autoregressive (AR) video generation extends videos by producing latent chunks sequentially, but scaling to long videos requires repeated access to a growing historical KV cache. Existing methods reduce this cost by truncating the KV cache or compressing it into implicit memory, but both lose explicit access to query-relevant historical details. We propose OmniMem, an explicit full-range memory retrieval framework that performs sparse KV retrieval over the historical cache. To make this practical for chunk-based AR video generation, OmniMem addresses two issues: (i) local bias in sparse KV selection and (ii) Union Explosion in memory access. Adaptive Window Exclusion removes local-window blocks from the selection candidates when sufficient long-range history is available, preserving the sparse budget for informative long-range retrieval. Query-Shared KV Selection reduces cross-query diversity, while Per-Head Scattered KV Access avoids expanding head-specific selections into a large selected KV buffer. This allows each attention head to retrieve non-contiguous KV blocks according to its own selection pattern. Experiments on long-video generation show that OmniMem improves Dynamic Degree by 52.3% and preserves strong consistency over strong baselines, while maintaining comparable memory usage.

AI.tldr: 提出OmniMem框架，通过稀疏KV检索解决自回归视频生成长视频生成中历史KV缓存访问成本高的问题，实现显式全范围历史细节检索。
AI.motivation: 自回归视频生成扩展视频时需要重复访问增长的历史KV缓存，现有方法通过截断或压缩KV缓存降低成本，但都失去了对查询相关历史细节的显式访问能力。
AI.method: 提出两个关键技术：(1)自适应窗口排除(Adaptive Window Exclusion)在有足够长程历史时从候选中选择中移除局部窗口块，将稀疏预算保留给信息丰富的长程检索；(2)查询共享KV选择(Query-Shared KV Selection)减少跨查询多样性，同时每头分散KV访问(Per-Head Scattered KV Access)避免将头部特定选择扩展到大型选中KV缓冲器。
AI.result: 在长视频生成任务上，OmniMem将动态自由度(Dynamic Degree)提高52.3%，并在保持相当内存使用量的同时保留了很强的一致性。
AI.conclusion: OmniMem是一种有效的显式全范围内存检索框架，能够在不显著增加内存使用的情况下，显著提升长视频生成的质量和一致性。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses video generation (2D video frames), not text-to-motion generation (3D human motion). These are fundamentally different application domains despite some superficial similarities in temporal modeling. While the paper touches on temporal consistency, it doesn't address any of the specified pain points: cross-domain transfer from 2D video to 3D motion geometry, text-to-motion semantic alignment, VLM-based quality assessment for motion, or extracting 3D geometric cues. It's purely about improving long video generation through memory retrieval mechanisms, which is unrelated to the Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion field.

title: Structure-Induced Information for Rerooting Levin Tree Search
summary: Subgoal-based policy tree search, which uses a policy to guide search, is effective for complex single-agent deterministic problems but often relies on explicit subgoal generation that can incur substantial overhead and hinders scalability. In this paper, we overcome these limitations by using a learned ``rerooter'' through the recently-introduced $\sqrt{\text{LTS}}$ algorithm. A rerooter implicitly decomposes the problem into soft subtasks. While previous work focused on the formal guarantees for given or handcrafted rerooters, in this work we propose three rerooter designs: (i) a clustering-based rerooter that exploits global state-space structure, (ii) a heuristic-based rerooter that leverages learned cost-to-go estimates, and (iii) a hybrid that combines both signals. Our framework avoids having to explicitly reconstruct and reason over generated subgoals, thereby enabling scalable allocation of search effort with significantly lower computational overhead. Empirically, our rerooting-based methods scale to complex environments where subgoal-based policy tree search fails, and achieve state-of-the-art online training efficiency on the domains tested.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于学习的"重根器"(rerooter)来解决基于子目标策略搜索在高复杂度环境中开销大、可扩展性差的问题，通过√LTS算法实现了隐式问题分解。
AI.motivation: 基于子目标的策略树搜索虽对复杂确定性单智能体问题有效，但显式生成子目标会带来大量计算开销并阻碍可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出三种重根器设计：1)基于聚类的重根器利用全局状态空间结构；2)基于启发式的重根器利用学习到的成本估计；3)结合两种信号的混合型重根器。框架避免了显式重建和推理生成的子目标。
AI.result: 基于重根器的方法能够扩展到子目标策略树搜索失效的复杂环境中，并在测试领域取得最先进的在线训练效率。
AI.conclusion: 使用学习到的重根器代替显式子目标生成是解决子目标策略搜索可扩展性问题的有效途径，三种重根器设计中混合型表现最优。

relevance_reason: Zero relevance. The paper is about Levin Tree Search, subgoal-based planning, and reinforcement learning algorithms - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. It deals with AI planning and decision-making, not video generation, motion synthesis, or any visual/motion tasks. Different application domain entirely.

title: Seeing Isn't Knowing: Do VLMs Know When Not to Answer Spatial Questions (and Why)?
summary: Spatial reasoning is a fundamental capability for vision-language models (VLMs) deployed in real-world environments. However, visual observations are inherently limited representations of a 3D world: occlusion can render objects invisible, and perspective can make geometric properties misleading. Despite this, existing spatial reasoning benchmarks typically assume that observations are sufficient and reliable, focusing on whether models produce correct answers rather than whether they recognize when a question cannot be answered and what additional observations would be needed. In this work, we challenge this assumption by constructing a controlled evaluation framework, SpatialUncertain, and introducing two types of observation challenges: (1) occlusion, which hides target information, and (2) perspective ambiguity, which produces misleading visual cues. For each configuration, we design spatial questions that are answerable under clean observations but require abstention under the introduced challenges. We further evaluate whether models can identify which additional viewpoints would resolve perspective ambiguity. Our results across a diverse set of frontier open- and closed-source VLMs reveal two consistent failure modes. First, models are prone to overconfident answering, attempting to solve spatial reasoning tasks even when visual evidence is incomplete or misleading, with average accuracy around 30\% under occlusion and below 10\% under perspective ambiguity. Second, even when additional views are available, some models perform near random chance in identifying which would provide reliable evidence. Together, our findings call for moving beyond answer correctness toward evaluating whether models know when to abstain and how to seek reliable evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpatialUncertain评估框架，用于测试视觉语言模型在观察不完整或误导时的空间推理能力。框架引入两种挑战：遮挡（隐藏目标信息）和透视歧义（产生误导性视觉线索）。研究揭示了当前VLMs的两个关键失败模式：在视觉证据不足时仍过度自信地回答，且无法识别哪些额外视角可以提供可靠证据。
AI.motivation: 现有空间推理基准假设视觉观察是充分可靠的，只关注模型是否给出正确答案，而忽略了测试模型是否意识到问题无法回答以及需要哪些额外观察。这是首次有研究系统性地评估模型在观察挑战下的不确定认知能力。
AI.method: 构建了受控评估框架SpatialUncertain，设计了两类观察挑战配置（遮挡和透视歧义），为每种配置设计了在不同观察条件下可答或需回避的空间问题，并评估了多种前沿开源和闭源VLMs识别有用额外视角的能力。
AI.result: 发现两个一致的失败模式：(1)过度自信回答——即使视觉证据不完整或误导，仍尝试解决任务，遮挡下平均准确率约30%，透视歧义下低于10%；(2)无法识别可靠证据——即便有额外视图可用，部分模型的识别能力接近随机水平。
AI.conclusion: 研究呼吁将评估范式从单纯追求答案正确转向evalua模型是否知道何时该放弃回答以及如何寻求可靠证据，这对于真实部署至关重要。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain entirely. While the research profile mentions VLM for Quality Assessment in the context of Text-to-Motion (evaluating generated 3D human motions), this paper applies VLMs to spatial reasoning uncertainty detection - a completely different application. The paper evaluates whether VLMs can recognize when visual evidence is insufficient for answering spatial questions (occlusion/pose ambiguity), not how well they assess motion quality or temporal consistency in generated motions. Even though both involve VLMs, they're used for fundamentally different tasks: motion quality assessment vs. epistemic uncertainty detection in visual QA.

title: MAVEN: Improving Generalization in Agentic Tool Calling
summary: Generalization across agentic tool-calling environments remains a central challenge for reliable agentic reasoning systems. Although large language models achieve strong results on individual benchmarks, their ability to compose reasoning strategies, preserve intermediate states, and coordinate tools across domains remains underexplored. We present MAVEN (Modular Agentic Verification and Execution Network), a lightweight symbolic reasoning scaffold for structured decomposition, adaptive tool orchestration, and intermediate verification. We evaluate MAVEN across established tool-calling benchmarks, including BFCL v3, TauBench, Tau2Bench, AceBench, and introduce MAVEN-Bench, a stress-test benchmark for multi-step mathematical and physical reasoning with explicit verification and adversarial task composition. MAVEN-Bench exposes a substantial gap between partial reasoning quality and end-to-end task success; in direct MAVEN-Bench runs, MAVEN improves its GPT-OSS-120b base model from 48% to 71% accuracy without additional training. It also remains competitive with frontier proprietary baselines while using an open-weight backbone with an estimated cost ratio of roughly 1/10, suggesting that lightweight verification-centered scaffolds can strengthen compositional reasoning and motivate more process-aware evaluation of agents in the wild.

AI.tldr: MAVEN是一个轻量级符号推理框架，用于结构化分解、自适应工具编排和中间验证，旨在提升Agent在跨领域工具调用环境中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在单个基准上表现良好，但在跨域组合推理策略、保存中间状态和协调工具方面能力不足，这是可靠Agent系统的核心挑战。
AI.method: 提出MAVEN框架，包含三部分：1)结构化分解模块；2)自适应工具编排模块；3)中间验证模块。在多个基准上评估，包括BFCL v3、TauBench、Tau2Bench、AceBench，并设计MAVEN-Bench压力测试基准。
AI.result: MAVEN将GPT-OSS-120b基础模型的准确率从48%提升至71%，无需额外训练。与前沿闭源基线模型性能相当，且成本比约为1/10。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级以验证为中心的推理框架可有效增强组合推理能力，为实际Agent系统的过程感知评估提供了新方向。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about improving LLM agents' tool calling capabilities (symbolic reasoning framework for Agentic systems), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion generation (generating 3D human motion from text descriptions). The application domains are entirely different - one deals with AI agents and tool orchestration, the other deals with generating animated 3D human motion. Despite both potentially involving language models, they are in completely different research fields.

title: VLM3: Vision Language Models Are Native 3D Learners
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) enable a unified model to solve various vision tasks through prompting. They have shown promising performance in semantic understanding. However, 3D understanding still largely relies on expert vision models with complex task-specific designs. The key argument this work wants to make is that VLMs are native 3D learners. Our in-depth large scale study shows that 1) focal length unification, 2) text-based pixel reference and 3) data mixture and scaling, are all you need for effective 3D learning. Model architecture changes, large models, heavy data augmentations, and complex losses including the regression formulation, many of which form the foundation of expert vision models, are actually not necessary conditions. As a result, we propose VLM3, a scalable method with the simplest design that enables standard VLMs to master diverse 3D tasks. VLM3 not only advances the VLM depth estimation accuracy by a large margin (0.84 -> 0.9), but also enables diverse 3D tasks such as pixel correspondence, camera pose estimation and object-level 3D understanding, matching expert vision model accuracy while maintaining standard architectures and text-based training. We believe VLM3 opens up a new paradigm for simple and scalable 3D learning.

AI.tldr: 提出VLM3方法，证明标准VLMs通过简单设计即可实现有效的3D学习，无需复杂的专家模型架构。
AI.motivation: 当前3D理解主要依赖具有复杂任务特定设计的专家视觉模型，作者主张VLMs本身是原生3D学习器，旨在探索简化方案。
AI.method: 提出三个关键要素：1)焦距统一；2)基于文本的像素引用；3)数据混合与缩放。采用标准VLMs架构和文本训练，无需架构修改、大型模型、重数据增强或回归损失。
AI.result: 深度估计准确率显著提升(0.84→0.9)，并成功支持多种3D任务(像素对应、相机姿态估计、目标级3D理解)，达到与专家视觉模型相当的准确率。
AI.conclusion: VLM3为简单可扩展的3D学习开辟了新范式，证明有效3D学习无需复杂的专家模型设计，仅需简单的数据与训练策略。.

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on 3D perception/understanding using VLMs (depth estimation, pixel correspondence, camera pose estimation), which is a different application domain from Text-to-Motion generation. While both involve VLMs, VLM3 uses them for 3D scene understanding rather than for motion quality assessment or motion generation. The research profile seeks methods for generating 3D human motion from text, not for general 3D perception tasks. Although there may be tangential benefit from better depth estimation, the core application domain mismatch (3D understanding vs motion generation) makes this largely irrelevant.

title: Generating Graph-like Rules for Knowledge Graph Reasoning via Diffusion Models
summary: Logical rules constitute a cornerstone of knowledge graph (KG) reasoning, valued for their interpretability and ability to model relational patterns. However, existing rule mining methods predominantly focus on simple chain-like rules and therefore neglect the richer relational information encoded in graph-like structures, such as cycles and branches. This limitation is further exacerbated by computational bottlenecks caused by the combinatorial explosion of the search space, which is especially challenging for graph-like rules. Meanwhile, generative approaches such as diffusion models, despite their success in other domains, can not be directly applied to rule mining because their training objectives are not aligned with the goal of learning high-quality rules, and non-differentiable KG rule quality metrics cannot directly guide model optimization. To address these limitations, we propose GRiD, a framework that reformulates graph-like rule discovery as a discrete generative process conditioned on the target relation. GRiD employs a two-phase training strategy. First, supervised pre-training enables GRiD to capture structural priors from subgraphs sampled from the KG meta-graph. Subsequently, reinforcement learning is applied to fine-tune GRiD through policy gradient optimization guided directly by non-differentiable rule-quality metrics. Experiments on six benchmark datasets show that GRiD achieves competitive performance on KG completion tasks. Ablation studies confirm the efficiency and robustness of GRiD and further show that graph-like rules complement chain-like rules in KG completion. Our codes and datasets are available in https://github.com/Haoxiang-Cheng/GRiD

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRiD框架，将图结构规则（graph-like rules）的发现重新定义为离散生成过程，解决了传统方法忽略图中环状和分支结构的问题，并通过两阶段训练（监督预训练+强化学习）克服了非可微规则质量指标的优化难题。
AI.motivation: 现有的知识图谱规则挖掘方法主要关注简单的链式规则，忽视了图中更丰富的拓扑结构（如循环和分支）；同时图结构规则的搜索空间组合爆炸造成严重计算瓶颈；此外扩散模型等生成方法的目标函数与高质量规则学习目标不对齐，且非可微的规则质量指标无法直接指导模型优化。
AI.method: 提出GRiD框架，包含两个阶段：1）监督预训练阶段从知识图谱元图中采样子图来捕获结构先验；2）强化学习阶段使用策略梯度优化直接根据非可微的规则质量指标对模型进行微调。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上的实验表明GRiD在知识图谱补全任务上达到竞争性性能；消融实验验证了GRiD的效率和鲁棒性，并显示图结构规则对链式规则具有互补作用。
AI.conclusion: GRiD成功将图结构规则发现转化为可学习的离散生成任务，通过两阶段训练策略有效解决了非可微指标的优化问题；实验证明图结构规则能够补充链式规则，提升知识图谱补全效果。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. The paper is about Knowledge Graph reasoning/completion using diffusion models, which has no connection to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion generation. While both papers use diffusion models, this is a different method applied to a completely different domain (knowledge graphs vs. human motion synthesis). The paper does not address any of the specified pain points like cross-domain 2D-to-3D transfer, temporal consistency in motion, or text-motion alignment. This is a foundational AI/NLP paper about graph structure rule discovery, not a graphics or motion generation paper.

title: Prior Availability in Industrial Visual Sim-to-Real: A Review of CAD-Guided and CAD-Unavailable Regimes
comment: Review article; 103 references; 9 main figures; empirical anchors on T-LESS/BOP, MVTec AD, and VisA
summary: Industrial visual sim-to-real is often described as transferring from synthetic images to real images, but industrial deployment usually involves a broader mismatch between available evidence and required decisions. A system may be built from CAD renderings, simulated RGB-D observations, normal reference images, synthetic defects, pretrained feature spaces, or language prompts, yet deployed under different sensors, lighting, materials, fixtures, calibration, production variation, and rare defect modes. This review reframes industrial visual sim-to-real as a domain-gap problem organized by prior availability. We distinguish CAD-available settings, where explicit object geometry can support rendering, calibration, pose estimation, segmentation, and test-time geometric verification; CAD-unavailable settings, where geometry is replaced by normal-reference appearance, feature distributions, teacher-student residuals, synthetic anomaly assumptions, foundation features, or vision-language priors; and boundary-prior settings, where approximate models, templates, reference views, or semantic correspondences preserve only part of the CAD role. This framing connects CAD-based detection and 6D pose-estimation literature with industrial anomaly and surface-inspection literature that is usually reviewed separately. To make the taxonomy concrete, we use empirical anchors on T-LESS/BOP, MVTec AD, and VisA. The anchors show that CAD render count alone does not close transfer; source-distribution design, detector capacity, and small real calibration can matter more. They also show that CAD at test time creates a distinct verification channel through mask, pose, and depth consistency, whereas CAD-unavailable inspection relies on calibrated normality and feature deviation. The review therefore argues against a single cross-task leaderboard and instead asks what prior grounds the deployment decision.

AI.tldr: 该综述将工业视觉sim-to-real重新定义为基于先验可用性的域差距问题，区分了CAD可用、CAD不可用和边界先验三种设置，并将CAD检测/6D姿态估计与工业异常检测/表面检查文献连接起来。
AI.motivation: 当前工业部署面临更广泛的证据与决策不匹配问题，现有综述未能弥合CAD相关检测与异常检测两个独立研究领域之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出了基于先验可用性的分类框架，以T-LESS/BOP、MVTec AD和VisA为实证锚点进行验证。
AI.result: 仅增加CAD渲染数量无法弥补迁移差距；源分布设计、检测器容量和小规模真实样本校准可能更为关键。CAD在测试时可通过mask、pose和深度一致性创建独立的验证通道。
AI.conclusion: 建议反对单一跨任务排行榜，转而根据具体部署场景的先验条件来评估方法的适用性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about industrial computer vision and sim-to-real transfer for manufacturing quality inspection/anomaly detection using CAD models - it has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, or 3D motion generation. The application domain (industrial manufacturing vs. human motion synthesis) is completely different.

title: ReGuLaR: Relation-Grounded Latent Reasoning for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning has significantly improved the reasoning ability of large vision-language models (LVLMs) by verbalizing intermediate reasoning steps in natural language. However, such discrete textual rationales are often insufficient for encoding continuous visual evidence. Recent work addresses this limitation by moving reasoning into continuous latent space. Despite promising progress, existing methods leave latent reasoning insufficiently connected to the compositional and relational structure of visual evidence. To address this gap, we introduce ReGuLaR, a relation grounded latent reasoning framework that explicitly grounds latent states in these critical yet overlooked visual evidence. ReGuLaR uses a training-time ReGFormer to focus latent reasoning on question-relevant objects and inter-object relations, while at inference time the model reasons and generates answers without invoking the ReGFormer. To support training ReGuLaR, we construct RGROUNDING-351K, a real-world vision-language dataset annotated with key object bounding boxes and inter-object relations. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks show that ReGuLaR consistently outperforms existing approaches and achieves state-of-the-art performance. We include our code in the submission and will release the code and training data publicly upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: ReGuLaR是一种将潜在推理显式建立在问题相关对象和对象间关系上的关系 grounded 潜在推理框架，用于提升大视觉语言模型的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将推理移入连续潜在空间，但未充分连接潜在推理与视觉证据的组合和关系结构。文本化的中间推理步骤不足以编码连续视觉证据。
AI.method: 提出ReGuLaR框架，训练时使用ReGFormer引导潜在推理聚焦于问题相关的对象和对象间关系；推理时无需ReGFormer即可推理并生成答案。同时构建了RGROUNDING-351K数据集，含有关键对象边界框和对象间关系标注。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的一致性实验表明，ReGuLaR始终优于现有方法，达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式地将潜在状态建立在视觉证据的关系结构上，ReGuLaR有效提升了视觉语言模型的推理能力，为多模态推理提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion generation (generating 3D human motion from text in Computer Graphics), while this paper is about improving reasoning capabilities of Large Vision-Language Models for Visual Question Answering (VQA). Even though both involve vision-language models, they operate in entirely different fields: one is about motion synthesis, the other is about visual reasoning/understanding. The methods, objectives, and evaluation metrics are non-transferable between these domains.

title: PReMISE: Policy Rubrics as Measurement Specifications for LLM Judges
summary: LLM judges are increasingly used to evaluate open-ended responses, but their scores depend strongly on the rubrics that condition them. A vague rubric asking for a response to be ``helpful and factual'' can reward polished answers that invent facts or violate user intent. We treat reusable rubrics as measurement specifications: changing the rubric changes the response quality measurement induced by a fixed judge. We introduce PReMISE, a framework that, given pairwise human-preference data, (i) discovers a policy-level rubric set, and (ii) audits any rubric set under LLM-judge use along four axes: structural adequacy, reliability, preference fit, and adversarial robustness. Across rubric sources no raw source is simultaneously reliable, preference-predictive, and adversarially robust; and high inter-rater agreement does not imply low exploitability. PReMISE is the only rubric source to score non-trivially on applicability, specificity, and effective dimensionality simultaneously. We contribute two audit-targeted repair operations: preference-rank selection raises judge accuracy on paired responses from $65.0\%$ to $68.6\%$, competitive with the strongest rubric-discovery baselines and leading on two of three judges in our cross-judge sweep; reliability-constrained refinement reduces the rate at which exploit responses receive high scores from $46.4\%$ to $36.0\%$ with little change in inter-judge agreement ($α{=}.531\to.519$).

AI.tldr: PReMISE是一个框架，用于从人类偏好数据中发现评分规则并审计LLM-judge使用的评分规则，从四个维度进行评估：结构充分性、可靠性、偏好拟合和对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM评判依赖于rubrics（评分标准），但模糊的rubrics（如"有帮助且实事求是"）可能奖励看似流畅但实际捏造事实或违背用户意图的回答。需要将rubrics视为可重用的测量规范，并系统性地审计其质量。
AI.method: 给定成对人类偏好数据，PReMISE框架能够：(i)发现政策级rubric集，(ii)在四个轴心上审计任意rubric集：结构充分性、可靠性、偏好拟合、对抗鲁棒性。还贡献了两个审计定向修复操作：偏好排序选择和可靠性约束细化。
AI.result: 实验发现：没有任何原始rubric源能同时满足可靠性、偏好预测性和对抗鲁棒性；高评分者间一致性并不等同于低可利用性；PReMISE是唯一在适用性、特异性和有效维度上同时得分的rubric来源。偏好排序选择将法官在成对响应上的准确率从65.0%提升到68.6%；可靠性约束细化将可利用响应获得高分的比例从46.4%降低到36.0%，而评分者间一致性几乎没有变化。
AI.conclusion: PReMISE框架通过系统性审计揭示了现有rubrics的关键局限性，并为改进LLM评估提供了有效的修复策略。未来应进一步探索更多维度的rubrics审计和自动修复方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM judges for evaluating text responses in NLP, completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion domain. While the research profile mentions "VLM for Quality Assessment," this paper focuses on using LLMs (text-only) as evaluators, not Vision-Language Models for assessing 3D motion quality. The application domain is fundamentally different - this is about natural language processing evaluation, not 3D motion generation or computer graphics.

title: Crafter: A Multi-Agent Harness for Editable Scientific Figure Generation from Diverse Inputs
summary: Scientific figures are among the most effective means of communicating complex research ideas, yet producing publication-quality illustrations remains one of the most labor-intensive parts of paper preparation. Existing automated systems each target a single figure type under text-only input, leaving the diversity of types and conditions researchers actually use unaddressed; their raster outputs further cannot be locally revised. Because scientific figures are structured compositions of discrete semantic components, the localized errors generators produce on such layouts demand not a stronger backbone but a harness. We instantiate this harness in two complementary systems: Crafter, a multi-agent harness for figure generation that generalizes across figure types and input conditions without architectural changes, and CraftEditor, which applies the same pattern to convert raster outputs into editable SVGs. Moreover, we introduce CraftBench, a benchmark spanning three figure types and four input conditions with human quality annotation. Experiments show that Crafter substantially outperforms both standalone generators and the agentic baseline on PaperBanana-Bench and CraftBench, with ablations confirming each component's independent contribution; CraftEditor faithfully converts outputs into editable SVGs that surpass all baselines. Our code and benchmark are available at https://github.com/HaozheZhao/Crafter.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Crafter和CraftEditor两个系统，用于自动化生成可编辑的科学图表，并引入CraftBench基准测试集解决现有图表生成系统只支持单一图表类型、无法编辑的问题。
AI.motivation: 制作publication-quality科学图表仍然是论文撰写中最劳动密集型的部分之一，现有自动化系统各有局限：仅针对单一图表类型、仅接受文本输入、输出栅格图像无法本地化修改，无法满足研究人员实际使用的多样性和灵活性需求。
AI.method: 提出两种互补系统：1) Crafter，一个多智能体框架(harness)，可在不改变架构的情况下泛化到不同图表类型和输入条件；2) CraftEditor，将栅格输出转换为可编辑SVG。同时创建CraftBench基准，包含三种图表类型和四种输入条件，带有人工质量标注。
AI.result: 实验表明，Crafter在PaperBanana-Bench和CraftBench上显著优于独立生成器和智能体基线，消融实验确认各组件的独立贡献；CraftEditor忠实地将输出转换为可编辑SVG，超越所有基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过多智能体框架harness的设计思想和将栅格输出转换为可编辑SVG的创新方法，成功解决了科学图表生成的多样性和可编辑性问题，为论文绘图提供了更高效的自动化工具。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about generating 2D scientific figures/charts (bar charts, line plots) as static SVG/images, whereas the research profile is about Text-to-Motion for 3D human motion generation. While both may use multi-agent frameworks, the output modality is fundamentally different - 2D static charts vs 3D animated human motion sequences. The methods discussed (chart generation, SVG conversion) have no relevance to motion synthesis, temporal modeling, or video-to-3D-motion transfer.

title: Controllable Lung Nodule Synthesis via Histogram-Regularized Latent Diffusion Models
summary: While automated diagnosis systems have achieved remarkable success in computed tomography (CT)-based lung cancer screening, their development remains limited by the scarcity of diverse, annotated pulmonary nodule datasets. Diffusion-based generative models offer a promising strategy for data synthesis; however, many existing conditional approaches primarily optimize spatial reconstruction losses, which encourage voxel-wise similarity but may inadequately constrain lesion-level intensity distributions. As a result, these methods may produce over-smoothed texture profiles and underrepresent the distinct attenuation characteristics of different nodule subtypes, including solid, part-solid, and ground-glass nodules. To address this challenge, we propose a controllable latent diffusion model that synthesizes pulmonary nodules within full 3D CT volumes while accurately modeling nodule-specific intensity distributions. Specifically, rather than relying solely on spatial losses, we introduce a histogram-based regularization term that constrains voxel intensity distributions during the generative process. The model combines subtype, spatial mask, and Hounsfield unit (HU) histogram conditioning with the differentiable feature-space histogram regularization term to better align lesion-level intensity distributions, improving the visual plausibility and subtype consistency of synthesized nodules. Extensive experiments on lung CT data demonstrate that our framework achieves strong visual realism, validated through both quantitative metrics and a visual Turing test. Furthermore, when used for data augmentation, the generated nodules improve performance in downstream clinical tasks, particularly for underrepresented nodule subtypes, and show a potential benefit for subtype-informed malignancy classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可控潜在扩散模型的肺结节合成方法，通过引入直方图正则化项来解决传统方法中过分依赖空间重建损失导致的纹理过度平滑和不同结节亚型衰减特征表达不足的问题，从而在3D CT扫描中生成逼真的肺结节图像。
AI.motivation: 肺结节自动诊断系统在CT肺癌筛查中取得显著成功，但其发展受到多样化标注肺结节数据集稀缺的限制。现有条件扩散模型主要优化空间重建损失，鼓励体素级相似性，但未能充分约束结节级别的强度分布，导致生成的结节纹理过度平滑，且无法准确表征不同结节亚型（包括实性结节、部分实性结节和磨玻璃结节）的独特衰减特征。
AI.method: 研究提出了一种可控潜在扩散模型，用于在全3D CT体积中合成肺结节，同时准确模拟结节特异性强度分布。具体而言，团队引入了基于直方图的正则化项，而非仅依赖空间重建损失，来约束生成过程中的体素强度分布。该模型结合了结节亚型条件、空间掩模条件和HU（汉斯菲尔德单位）直方图条件，并使用可微分特征空间直方图正则化项，以更好地对齐结节级别强度分布，提高合成结节的视觉可信度和亚型一致性。
AI.result: 在肺CT数据上进行的广泛实验表明，该框架实现了较强的视觉真实性，并通过定量指标和视觉图灵测试得到验证。此外，当用于数据增强时，生成的结节改善了下游临床任务的性能，特别是对于代表性不足的结节亚型，并显示出对亚型知情恶性分类的潜在益处。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出的直方图正则化潜在扩散框架能够有效解决肺结节数据稀缺问题，通过显式建模结节强度分布实现了更真实的结节合成。实验结果表明，该方法不仅提升了视觉质量，还在数据增强场景中显著改善了包括恶性分类在内的下游临床任务性能，尤其对 underrepresented 结节亚型效果明显，展示了在医学影像数据增强和辅助诊断中的实用价值。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. This paper is about medical imaging (lung nodule synthesis in CT scans for clinical diagnosis), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion (generating human motion from text descriptions). Although both use diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different - medical image synthesis vs human motion generation. The paper addresses lung cancer screeningclincal diagnostics, not computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: SLAT: Segment-Level Adaptive Trimming for Efficient CoT Reasoning
summary: Recent advances in Large Reasoning Models have significantly improved chain-of-thought (CoT) capabilities via reinforcement learning (RL). However, generated reasoning chains frequently suffer from structural redundancy (i.e., \emph{overthinking}), incurring high computational overhead without improving answer correctness. Existing mitigation strategies typically rely on token-uniform length penalties, which provide coarse, segment-agnostic pressure toward shorter outputs and can inadvertently suppress useful reasoning alongside redundancy. To address this, we demonstrate that inefficiency concentrates in high-probability segments with low marginal utility. We derive a theoretical characterization of segment suboptimality under the correctness-length trade-off objective and propose \textsc{SLAT} (Segment-Level Adaptive Trimming), an RL framework that selectively suppresses redundant segments based on this criterion. Empirical results on standard benchmarks indicate that \textsc{SLAT} establishes a superior accuracy-efficiency Pareto frontier, reducing reasoning length by $50\%$ relative to uncompressed baselines while maintaining competitive accuracy. Overall, our results suggest that theoretically grounded, segment-aware trimming is a promising direction for efficient CoT reasoning in large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SLAT（Segment-Level Adaptive Trimming）框架，通过在强化学习框架中引入基于细分段落的自适应修剪策略，在保持模型精度的同时将推理长度减少50%，建立优越的精度-效率Pareto前沿。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型通过Chain-of-Thought（CoT）能力显著提升，但其生成的推理链存在结构性冗余（过度思考），导致高计算开销且不提升答案正确性。现有缓解策略采用统一的token长度惩罚，粗粒度且无法区分冗余与有用的推理段落。
AI.method: 本文首先证明低效问题集中在高概率但边际效用低的段落中。基于正确性-长度权衡目标，本文推导了段落次优性的理论表征，并提出SLAT框架，该框架根据此准则选择性地抑制冗余段落。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试上的实证结果表明，SLAT建立了优越的精度-效率Pareto前沿，相比未压缩基线可将推理长度减少50%，同时保持竞争力精度。
AI.conclusion: 本文研究表明，基于理论驱动、段落感知的修剪策略是大型语言模型实现高效CoT推理的有前景方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Chain-of-Thought reasoning optimization in Large Language Models (reducing token length while maintaining accuracy). It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. The application domain is completely different - it's about LLM efficiency optimization, not 3D motion generation, video-to-motion synthesis, or any computer graphics task. No overlap with any listed pain points or methods.

title: PInVerify: An Offline Embodied Benchmark for Active Instance Verification
comment: Accepted as a poster at the Foundation Models Meet Embodied Agents (FMEA) Workshop, CVPR 2026. 44 pages including appendix. Code: https://github.com/Avalon-S/PInVerify
summary: Embodied agents have made strong progress in navigating to target objects, but reaching the goal vicinity does not guarantee that the agent has found the correct instance: subtle attribute differences (e.g., "white floral" vs. "white striped") often require close-range, multi-view inspection. We address this gap with Active Instance Verification (AIV), a task in which an agent actively selects viewpoints around a candidate object to decide whether it matches a fine-grained natural-language description. We formalize AIV as a finite-horizon decision process and introduce PInVerify, an offline embodied benchmark for AIV: 3,000 evaluation episodes across 18 object categories, delivered as multi-view captures with a 6-sector navigation topology that exposes trap views (navigable but uninformative) and unreachable sectors. As reference baselines we build a training-free pipeline and a LoRA-fine-tuned end-to-end agent around open-source multimodal large language models (MLLMs) at on-device scale ($\leq$8B parameters), with attribute decomposition, a visibility-weighted multi-view tracker, and three next-best-view (NBV) strategies. In our evaluation across Qwen3-VL (4B/8B), SenseNova-SI-1.2-InternVL3-8B, CLIP, and SigLIP2, the best MLLM-based baseline exceeds the best embedding baseline by 4.9 pp; GT-box ablations show a +3.1 pp detection gap; and we do not observe reliable gains from active viewpoint selection within the tested NBV strategies. A LoRA-fine-tuned agent (SFT+GSPO) reaches 85.6%. PInVerify aims to support further work on active, fine-grained semantic verification in embodied AI. Code: https://github.com/Avalon-S/PInVerify.

AI.tldr: 提出了主动实例验证（AIV）任务，解决现有具身智能体仅能导航到目标附近但无法验证细粒度属性匹配的问题。通过构建包含3000个评估 episodes 的PInVerify离线基准，测试了多种基于多模态大语言模型的智能体，最终LoRA微调智能体达到85.6%准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能体导航任务仅要求到达目标物体附近，但细粒度属性差异（如"白色花卉"vs"白色条纹"）需要近距离多视角检查才能区分。当前缺乏针对这种主动验证能力的数据集和基准。
AI.method: 构建PInVerify基准（18类物体，3000 episodes，6扇区导航拓扑）；测试免训练管道和LoRA微调端到端智能体（≤8B参数）；采用属性分解、可见性加权多视角追踪器和三种NBV策略；基准模型包括Qwen3-VL、SenseNova-SI-1.2-InternVL3-8B、CLIP、SigLIP2等。
AI.result: 最佳MLLM基线比最佳嵌入基线高4.9pp；GT-box消融显示+3.1pp检测差距；NBV策略未产生可靠增益；SFT+GSPO微调的LoRA智能体达到85.6%。
AI.conclusion: 首次定义了AIV任务并建立基准，发现当前MLLMs在此任务上存在提升空间，主动视点选择策略效果有限，微调是有效提升手段。

relevance_reason: completely different application domain - this paper is about embodied AI/navigation tasks (Active Instance Verification with MLLMs), not about Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. While it uses VLMs and visual features similar to what's mentioned in the profile, the goal is instance verification during robot navigation, not generating 3D human motion from text descriptions. The application domains are fundamentally incompatible.

title: WristCompass: Kinematic Coupling as a Learnable Visual Concept for Ego-Camera Orientation
summary: Recovering ego-camera orientation from manipulation video is a prerequisite for disentangling hand motion from camera motion, a key step in imitation learning from egocentric demonstrations. The obvious approach, inferring orientation from scene geometry, fails when hands occlude the frame: VGGT, a 1B-parameter scene reconstruction model, scores worse than a constant predictor on the TACO benchmark. We identify an alternative visual concept that is present precisely when scene geometry is absent: kinematic coupling dynamics, the structured physical relationship between wrist motion and camera orientation imposed by the arm-shoulder-head chain. We find that this concept is compact (4D inter-wrist features outperform 126D full hand keypoints), temporal (requiring a GRU over short windows rather than per-frame retrieval), and physically grounded (transferring zero-shot across datasets because it is rooted in anatomy rather than scene appearance). Trained only on tabletop manipulation, WristCompass transfers zero-shot to Epic Kitchens cooking video, achieving 14.3$^\circ$ median geodesic error and approaching the performance of a 1B-parameter scene model at 200K GRU parameters.

AI.tldr: WristCompass通过利用肢体解剖学知识（手腕运动与相机姿态的运动学耦合关系）解决自我中心视频中手部遮挡场景几何时的相机姿态恢复问题，仅用200K参数GRU实现14.3°中位测地线误差，零样本迁移到Epic Kitchens数据集。
AI.motivation: 模仿学习需要将手部运动与相机运动分离，但当手部遮挡画面时，现有基于场景几何的方法（如VGGT）性能甚至不如常数预测器，需要寻找替代视觉线索。
AI.method: 提出利用运动学耦合动力学——手腕运动与相机姿态之间的结构化物理关系（由手臂-肩膀-头部链产生），使用4维手腕间特征配合GRU时序建模，仅在桌面操作数据上训练。
AI.result: 4D手腕间特征优于126维完整手部关键点；WristCompass在Epic Kitchens上达到14.3°中位测地线误差，以200K GRU参数接近1B参数场景模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 运动学耦合动力学是一个紧凑、时序化且物理根基的特征，因为源于解剖学而非场景外观，可零样本跨数据集迁移。该方法为受限场景下的姿态估计提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain entirely. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion generation (generating human body motions from text descriptions in computer graphics), while this paper is about ego-camera orientation recovery from egocentric video - a computer vision/camera pose estimation task. Although both involve video processing and temporal modeling (GRU), the application domains are completely different: this paper solves camera pose estimation, not motion generation. The pain points (text-motion alignment, diffusion-based motion synthesis, quality assessment for generated motions) have no connection to this camera orientation work.

title: Distilling LLM Feedback for Lean Theorem Proving
summary: Post-training for reasoning models typically combines supervised fine-tuning with reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards, most commonly with GRPO. However, this algorithm suffers from sparse rewards, limited exploration, and mode collapse.
