Building upon recent works on self-distillation, we propose Feedback Distillation, a training method where the model is trained to match, at the token level, its own distribution conditioned on privileged feedback produced by a language model. Feedback Distillation offers token-level supervision and can inject external knowledge. Evaluating our method for Lean4 theorem-proving, we find that Feedback Distillation maintains greater diversity in generated trajectories than GRPO, yielding higher policy entropy and better pass@k scaling. The two methods are complementary: initializing GRPO from a Feedback Distillation checkpoint outperforms either method alone. All in all, our results suggest a promising avenue to improve post-training for complex reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出Feedback Distillation方法,通过让模型在token级别匹配自身基于特权反馈的条件分布,来解决推理模型后训练中GRPO算法面临的稀疏奖励、探索有限和模式崩溃问题。该方法可用于Lean4定理证明,并可与GRPO结合使用。
AI.motivation: 现有推理模型的后训练主要采用监督微调和来自可验证奖励的强化学习(常用GRPO),但该算法存在稀疏奖励、探索有限和模式崩溃等缺陷,需要新的训练方法来改进。
AI.method: 提出Feedback Distillation训练方法:让模型在token级别匹配自身基于语言模型生成的特权反馈的条件分布,从而获得token级别的监督信号并可注入外部知识。对Lean4定理证明任务进行评估,并探索将GRPO从Feedback Distillation检查点初始化的组合方法。
AI.result: Feedback Distillation相比GRPO能保持更高的生成轨迹多样性,具有更高的策略熵和更好的pass@k扩展性。两种方法互补:从Feedback Distillation检查点初始化GRPO优于单独使用任一方法。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明Feedback Distillation是改进复杂推理模型后训练的有前途途径,可有效解决GRPO的局限性,为推理模型的训练提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Lean4 theorem proving and LLM training (Feedback Distillation, GRPO), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. The application domain is formal theorem proving/AI reasoning, not motion generation or computer graphics. It addresses none of the pain points (motion geometry, temporal consistency, VLM-based supervision for visual quality, semantic alignment, etc.) and uses completely different methods (LLM reinforcement learning vs. motion generation models).

title: UniScale: Adaptive Unified Inference Scaling via Online Joint Optimization of Model Routing and Test-Time Scaling
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: In real-world deployments of large language models (LLMs), balancing inference quality and computational cost has become a central challenge. Existing approaches tackle this trade-off along two largely independent dimensions: model routing, which switches among models of different scales to match request complexity, and test-time scaling (TTS), which adjusts inference-time compute within a fixed model for fine-grained control. However, this decoupled design introduces inherent limitations. Model routing yields coarse-grained, discrete performance changes due to the sparse set of model scales, while single-model TTS often encounters capacity ceilings and exhibits diminishing returns as compute increases. Moreover, treating the two mechanisms separately restricts adaptability in dynamic inference environments. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Unified Inference Scaling (UIS), which unifies model routing and TTS in a single optimization space. Building on this formulation, we propose UniScale, an online framework that models adaptive UIS as a contextual multi-armed bandit problem and learns inference policies via LinUCB. The framework incorporates efficiency-aware learning and cost modeling to ensure stable and scalable optimization over high-dimensional action spaces. Evaluation shows that UniScale effectively exploits the synergy in the UIS space to deliver a fine-grained and consistently better quality-cost trade-off across diverse, dynamic inference scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一推理扩展（UIS）框架，解决大型语言模型部署中推理质量与计算成本之间的平衡问题。现有方法将模型路由和测试时扩展作为两个独立维度处理，导致粒度粗糙、适应性受限。UIS将两者统一在单一优化空间中，结合上下文多臂bandit和LinUCB算法实现自适应推理策略。
AI.motivation: 在大规模语言模型实际部署中，准确率和计算成本之间的权衡是核心挑战。现有方法沿两条独立路径：模型路由（在不同规模的模型间切换）和测试时扩展（TTS，在固定模型内调整推理计算）。然而这种解耦设计存在固有局限：模型路由产生粗粒度离散的性能变化；单独使用TTS常遇到能力上限且收益递减。此外，将两种机制分离限制了动态推理环境中的适应性。
AI.method: 提出UniScale在线框架，将自适应UIS建模为上下文多臂 bandit问题，通过LinUCB算法学习推理策略。框架整合效率感知学习和成本建模，确保在高维动作空间上的稳定可扩展优化。该方法统一了模型路由和测试时扩展两个维度，形成单一的优化空间。
AI.result: 评估表明，UniScale能有效利用UIS空间的协同作用，在多样化的动态推理场景中提供细粒度且始终更好的质量-成本权衡。相比解耦的模型路由和TTS方法，统一方案具有更精细的控制粒度和更强的环境适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 统一模型路由与测试时扩展是提升LLM推理效率和性能的有效路径。UiScale框架通过将两者融合并采用上下文bandit学习方法，为动态推理环境中的资源优化提供了新的研究方向，具有重要的 practical 应用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM inference optimization (model routing and test-time scaling for large language models), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. The application domain is NLP/systems ML, not human motion generation or computer graphics. There is no overlap in domain, methods (bandit algorithms vs diffusion models for motion), or the actual task being addressed. Even though both involve "scaling," this is purely about computational resource allocation for LLM deployment, not about generating or assessing 3D human motion from text.

title: BilliardPhys-Bench: Benchmarking Physical Reasoning and Visual Dynamics of Multimodal LLMs
summary: Current multimodal models handle static image recognition well, but intuitive physical reasoning remains a weakness. Predicting how objects will move and interact from a single image is still difficult for these systems. We present BilliardPhys-Bench, a benchmark for physical reasoning in synthetic billiards environments. Its procedural engine generates randomized scenarios with friction and elastic collisions. The benchmark tests three abilities: (1) predicting ball-to-ball collisions, (2) reasoning about wall bounces, and (3) estimating final ball positions after motion stops. We evaluate recent MLLMs from the GPT, Claude, Gemini, and Qwen families. Performance drops as simulation time increases and scene geometry grows more complex. We also observe a consistent failure mode we call "stasis bias": when the correct physical outcome is harder to infer, models tend to predict no interaction. These findings show where current MLLMs break down on visual dynamics and point toward the need for better physical inductive biases in multimodal architectures.

AI.tldr: BilliardPhys-Bench是一个用于评估多模态模型物理推理能力的合成台球环境基准,揭示了当前模型在预测物体运动和交互方面的系统性问题,并指出需要改进物理归纳偏置。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)在静态图像识别方面表现良好,但对物理推理(特别是从单张图像预测物体运动和交互)存在困难。现有模型缺乏对直觉物理推理的能力,需要基准测试来评估和推动这一领域的发展。
AI.method: 研究者构建了BilliardPhys-Bench基准,使用程序化引擎生成带有摩擦和弹性碰撞的随机台球场景。该基准测试三种能力:(1)预测球与球之间的碰撞;(2)推理墙壁反弹;(3)估算运动停止后的最终球位置。评估了GPT、Claude、Gemini和Qwen家族的最新MLLMs。
AI.result: 性能随模拟时间增加和场景几何复杂度提高而下降。研究还发现了一个一致的失败模式——"静止偏置"(stasis bias):当正确的物理结果更难推断时,模型倾向于预测无交互。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现揭示了当前MLLMs在视觉动力学方面的局限性,表明需要在多模态架构中引入更好的物理归纳偏置,以提升物理推理能力。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. Research profile focuses on Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text or video), while this paper is about physical reasoning benchmarks for multimodal LLMs using billiard ball simulations. Even though both involve physics/temporal aspects, the application domains are entirely different - human motion generation vs. object physics prediction. Methods are also different: this evaluates pre-trained MLMs rather than video-to-motion or diffusion-based motion synthesis.

title: Mathematical Morphology in Machine Learning
summary: This work introduces mathematical morphology-an established visual computing theory-into machine learning to exploit shape and density aspects often overlooked by standard techniques. We propose a fast clustering algorithm based on morphological reconstruction that accurately preserves cluster shapes and density. This scheme offers unique features: an intrinsic sense of maximal clusters, cost-free noise removal, and diverse growth patterns controlled by structuring elements.Additionally, we propose a novel distance metric combining Minkowski and Chebyshev distances, highly efficient for morphological dilations. In $Z^2$ discrete neighbourhood iterations, it is roughly 1.3 times faster than Manhattan and 329.5 times faster than Euclidean distances. When evaluated using a k-Nearest Neighbours (k-NN) classifier across 33 UCI datasets against 14 other distances, our metric achieved above-average accuracies most frequently (26 of 33 cases) and the best overall accuracy in 9 cases.Finally, we introduce novel morphological classifiers. Unlike current literature, this proposal uniquely models shape, density, and fractal information in datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出将数学形态学引入机器学习，结合Morphological Reconstruction聚类算法和新型混合距离度量，实现高效准确的聚类和分类。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法往往忽视数据的形状和密度特征，而数学形态学作为成熟的视觉计算理论，在捕获这些特征方面具有优势。
AI.method: 1. 提出基于形态学重建的快速聚类算法；2. 设计结合Minkowski和Chebyshev距离的新型混合距离度量；3. 开发新型形态学分类器建模形状、密度和分形信息。
AI.result: 新距离度量在Z²离散邻域迭代中比Manhattan快1.3倍，比Euclidean快329.5倍；在33个UCI数据集的k-NN分类中，26/33达到Above-average，9个数据集取得最佳精度。
AI.conclusion: 成功将数学形态学理论与机器学习结合，所提方法在效率和精度上均表现优异，为处理形状和密度敏感的数据分析任务提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: The paper is about applying mathematical morphology to general clustering/classification tasks (on UCI datasets), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion generation. There's no mention of motion generation, video-to-motion, diffusion models for motion, temporal modeling, or any 3D motion geometry tasks. This addresses none of the pain points (cross-domain video-to-motion transfer, VLM quality assessment, temporal consistency, semantic text-motion alignment). The application domain is entirely different - general ML clustering vs. text-to-motion synthesis.

title: A Persona-Based Evaluation Framework for Pluralistic Alignment in Generative AI
summary: Current alignment paradigms for generative artificial intelligence rely predominantly on monolithic benchmarking frameworks that reduce the plurality of human judgment to aggregated statistical baselines, thereby obscuring cultural, demographic, and contextual variability in evaluation. We introduce a state-space constrained emulation framework for AI evaluation that replaces singular assessment functions with a structured manifold of synthetic cognitive profiles representing diverse human perspectives. We show that modern generative architectures can instantiate and maintain these evaluative personas with high consistency, enabling a form of pluralistic, perspective-dependent benchmarking that more closely reflects real-world consensus variability. However, we further analyze the stability of these simulated evaluators under sequential inference and stochastic prompt perturbations, revealing systematic degradation in persona coherence that manifests as state-space drift and semantic inconsistency. These findings suggest that static alignment constraints are insufficient for sustaining robust evaluative behavior over time. Instead, we argue for the necessity of embedding dynamic, viability-driven regulatory mechanisms within generative systems to preserve coherent cognitive emulation. By framing persona-based evaluation as a structured dynamical system over latent representation manifolds, this study provides a foundation for more adaptive, human-aligned, and context-sensitive approaches to AI evaluation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出用多个代表不同人类视角的"评估人格"代替单一基准测试，解决传统AI对齐评估中忽视文化、人口和上下文多样性的问题，但发现这些模拟评估者在顺序推理中会退化。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式AI的对齐范式主要依赖单一的聚合统计基准，将多元人类判断简化为单一指标，掩盖了文化、人口和情境差异，评估缺乏真实世界的多样性反映。
AI.method: 构建状态空间约束的仿真框架，用结构化流形上的合成认知profile（多个评估人格）替代单一评估函数，让生成模型实例化和维持这些多元评估人格。
AI.result: 现代生成架构能以高一致性实例化并维持这些评估人格，实现多元视角的基准测试。但分析发现在顺序推理和随机提示扰动下会出现系统性退化：状态空间漂移和语义不一致，表明静态对齐约束不足以维持长期稳健行为。
AI.conclusion: 需要嵌入动态的、可行性驱动的监管机制来保持连贯的认知仿真。将基于人格的评估定义为潜在表示流形上的结构化动态系统，为更适应性强、更符合人类价值观和上下文敏感的AI评估方法奠定基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about AI alignment evaluation methodology using persona-based frameworks for LLM/VLM systems, focusing on cultural diversity in AI safety assessment. It has NO connection to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. The application domain is fundamentally different - it's about evaluating LLMs, not generating 3D human motion from text. None of the pain points (temporal motion consistency, semantic alignment to motion, 3D geometry extraction) or methods (diffusion models for motion, video-to-motion transfer) from the research profile are addressed.

title: Equivariant Latent Alignment via Flow Matching under Group Symmetries
summary: Geometry-aware generative models and novel view synthesis approaches have shown strong potential in visual fidelity and consistency. In parallel, equivariant representation learning has emerged as a powerful framework for constructing latent spaces where analytically known group transformations could act directly, capturing geometric structure in data and enhancing both interpretability and generalization in novel view synthesis. However, we identify that existing approaches often suffer from latent misalignment, a discrepancy between the intended group action and the actually required transformations in the latent space. Consequently, the learned latents often fail to consistently preserve the equivariant relations imposed by the underlying group symmetry. To address this, we propose Residual Latent Flow, a flow-based framework that corrects the misaligned latents, thereby improving compliance with the underlying equivariance relation. Our comprehensive experiments show that our method significantly reduces latent misalignment and improves novel view synthesis quality, under rotation groups SO(n).

AI.tldr: 本文提出Residual Latent Flow框架，解决等变表示学习中潜在的对齐问题，从而提升新视角合成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的几何感知生成模型和新视角合成方法存在潜在的 misalignment问题，即潜在空间中的群变换与实际所需的变换之间存在偏差，导致学习到的潜在表示无法保持由底层对称性施加的等变关系。
AI.method: 提出Residual Latent Flow——一种基于流的框架，用于纠正对齐错误的潜在表示，从而提高对底层等变关系的遵循度，在旋转群SO(n)下进行实验。
AI.result: 该方法显著降低了潜在的misalignment，并提升了新视角合成的质量。
AI.conclusion: Residual Latent Flow能够有效解决等变表示学习中的潜在对齐问题，显著改善新视角合成的效果。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses equivariant representation learning and new view synthesis for 3D scenes/objects, which is fundamentally different from Text-to-Motion generation. While both involve 3D geometry, this paper focuses on generating novel views of objects from limited viewpoints (a computer vision/reconstruction task), whereas the research profile seeks to generate semantic human motions from textual descriptions (a motion synthesis task). The application domains are completely different - this is about view synthesis, not human motion generation. Even though the method (flow matching) might appear somewhat related, the core problem and end application are unrelated.

title: Vision-Based Localization in Dense Urban Environments: A Case Study of an Urban Village in China
summary: Urban villages, the widespread informal settlements which have emerged as a result of rapid urbanization, are now major residential hubs for migrant workers in large cities in China. The dense arrangement of buildings in these areas often leads to unreliable GPS signals, while incomplete mapping data further impairs accurate route planning and navigation. These issues not only hinder everyday mobility but also pose significant challenges for emergency response, as confusing road layouts and GPS inaccuracies can complicate evacuation efforts. To address these challenges, we propose a practical vision-based geo-localization solution tailored for dense urban environments. Our approach features a low-cost data collection pipeline utilizing a dual-camera system, comprising a panoramic camera and a smartphone camera, to capture synchronized 360-degree panoramas and query images. Using Shipai Village, a well-known densely populated urban village in Guangzhou, as a case study, we develop a specialized image geo-localization dataset. We then assess and compare the performance of existing models across various scene types to identify their strengths and weaknesses. The findings demonstrate both the potential and limitations of visual-based localization in dense urban-village environments. Our framework aims to enhance pedestrian navigation, last-mile delivery, and emergency management in areas with poor GPS coverage, ultimately supporting the vulnerable populations living within these informal settlements.

AI.tldr: 研究针对中国城市村庄中GPS信号不可靠和地图数据不完整的问题，提出了一种基于视觉的地理定位解决方案。该方案使用双摄像头系统（全景相机+智能手机相机）采集同步图像数据，以广州石牌村为案例开发了专门的图像地理定位数据集，并评估了现有视觉模型在此类密集城中村环境中的性能。
AI.motivation: 城市村庄是中国快速城市化过程中形成的非正式定居点，是大城市农民工的主要居住地。然而，这些地区建筑密集导致GPS信号不可靠，地图数据不完整，影响了日常出行导航和紧急救援响应。因此需要一种不依赖GPS的替代定位方案。
AI.method: 采用低成本的双摄像头数据采集管道，使用全景相机和智能手机相机同步采集360度全景图和查询图像。以广州石牌村为案例研究区域，开发专门的图像地理定位数据集，评估现有视觉模型在不同场景类型下的性能。
AI.result: 结果表明基于视觉的定位方法在密集城中村环境中既有潜力也有局限性。该框架有望改善这些地区的行人导航、最后里程配送和应急管理。
AI.conclusion: 提出的视觉地理定位框架为GPS覆盖不足的城中村地区提供了实用的解决方案，有助于提升在这些非正式定居点生活的弱势群体的出行安全和应急响应能力。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about vision-based geolocation and navigation in urban environments (robotics/GPS-free localization), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating human motion from text). Though both mention "visual features," the application domains are entirely different - localization for navigation vs. human motion synthesis. No overlap in methods, goals, or application area.

title: GraphARC: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Graph-Based Abstract Reasoning
comment: Accepted at KDD 2026 Datasets and Benchmarks Track
summary: Relational reasoning lies at the heart of intelligence, but existing benchmarks are typically confined to formats such as grids or text. We introduce GraphARC, a benchmark for abstract reasoning on graph-structured data. GraphARC generalizes the few-shot transformation learning paradigm of the Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus (ARC). Each task requires inferring a transformation rule from a few input-output pairs and applying it to a new test graph, covering local, global, and hierarchical graph transformations. Unlike grid-based ARC, GraphARC instances can be generated at scale across diverse graph families and sizes, enabling systematic evaluation of generalization abilities. We evaluate state-of-the-art language models on GraphARC and observe clear limitations. Models can answer questions about graph properties but often fail to solve the full graph transformation task, revealing a comprehension-execution gap. Performance further degrades on larger instances, exposing scaling barriers. More broadly, by combining aspects of node classification, link prediction, and graph generation within a single framework, GraphARC provides a promising testbed for future graph foundation models.

AI.tldr: GraphARC是一个针对图结构数据的抽象推理基准数据集，它将few-shot transformation learning范式从基于网格的ARC扩展到图结构领域。每个任务需要从少量输入-输出对中推断转换规则并应用于新的测试图，涵盖局部、全局和分层图转换。
AI.motivation: 现有推理基准通常局限于网格或文本格式，缺乏针对图结构数据的抽象推理评估基准。GraphARC旨在填补这一空白，提供一个可跨不同图族和规模生成的系统性评估平台，以测试模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出GraphARC基准数据集，将ARC的few-shot learning范式推广到图数据。每个任务包含输入-输出示例对，模型需推断转换规则并应用于新的测试图。评估了当前主流语言模型在该基准上的表现。
AI.result: 模型能够回答关于图属性的问题，但往往无法完成完整的图转换任务，揭示了"理解-执行"差距。性能在更大规模的实例上进一步下降，暴露了规模化壁垒。
AI.conclusion: GraphARC为未来图基础模型提供了有前景的测试平台，融合了节点分类、链路预测和图生成于单一框架中。当前语言模型存在明显局限性，需要进一步改进。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about graph-based abstract reasoning benchmarks for AI/language models - an entirely different field. The researcher's profile is Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text/video), while this paper focuses on abstract reasoning for graph data using few-shot learning. There is zero overlap in application domain, methods (no diffusion models, no motion generation, no video processing), or research goals. This paper addresses nothing related to motion synthesis, temporal modeling, or vision-language alignment for motion generation.

title: Simple Token-Efficient Vision-Language Model for Case-level Pathology Synoptic Report Generation
summary: Generating clinically useful pathology reports for pathology cases from whole-slide images (WSIs) is challenging due to gigapixel resolution, long visual-token sequences, and the complexity of case-level reasoning, where a single case may contain multiple WSIs with heterogeneous tissues and ambiguous findings. We present a simple token-efficient vision--language model for case-level synoptic report generation that remains practical under constrained GPU memory. Our architecture follows a minimal three-component design: a frozen pathology patch encoder, a lightweight two-layer MLP vision-language aligner, and a large language model decoder, with an explicit WSI marker token to separate slides within a case. Training proceeds in two supervised stages: (1) aligner-only WSI captioning using heterogeneous WSI-text pairs, and (2) case-level supervised fine-tuning on case-report pairs for structured report generation. To reduce sequence length, we represent each slide using $512 \times 512$ patches at $5\times$ magnification, which reduces the average sequence length by up to $64\times$ times compared to the commonly used $20\times$ patches. Combined with efficient training techniques, we enable practical training with only half a NVIDIA H100 GPU. Across both training stages, our approach achieves high ROUGE-L/METEOR/BLEU-4 scores while being substantially more efficient in memory and runtime. In AI-based evaluations, our model is consistently preferred over strong baselines. Extensive ablations characterize performance-efficiency trade-offs and identify simple choices that improve robustness in multi-WSI settings. Overall, this work provides a strong, reproducible baseline for efficient pathology report generation, lowering the barrier to multi-WSI VLM research under limited compute.

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的多WSI病理报告生成视觉语言模型，通过轻量级MLP对齐器和两阶段训练，在仅半个GPU资源下实现高精度报告生成。
AI.motivation: 病理报告生成面临三大挑战：千兆像素分辨率导致长序列、案例包含多张异构WSI、以及复杂案例级推理需求，现有方法计算成本过高难以实际应用。
AI.method: 采用三组件简洁架构——冻结病理patch编码器+轻量两级MLP视觉语言对齐器+LLM解码器，使用显式WSI标记token分隔幻灯片。训练分两阶段：(1)异构WSI-文本对进行对齐器 captioning；(2)案例-报告对进行结构化报告生成微调。为降低序列长度，每张切片使用512×512 patches at 5× magnification，相比常用20×减少64倍序列长度。
AI.result: 两训练阶段均获高分ROUGE-L/METEOR/BLEU-4，内存和运行时显著优化。AI评估中模型持续优于强基线。消融实验验证性能-效率权衡并识别提升多WSI鲁棒性的简单策略。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为高效病理报告生成提供强大可复现基线，大幅降低有限计算资源下多WSI VLAB研究的门槛，为病理AI实际应用奠定基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical pathology report generation from Whole Slide Images (WSI) - an entirely different application domain. While it uses Vision-Language Models, the target output is text reports for pathology, not 3D motion generation. There is no connection to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, diffusion models for motion synthesis, temporal consistency, or any of the motion generation methods mentioned in the research profile. The application domain (medical imaging/pathology) is completely unrelated to the computer graphics/motion generation field.

title: Vector Linking via Cross-Model Local Isometric Consistency
summary: We study Vector Linking: given two embedding clouds produced by different black-box encoders over partially overlapping datasets, recover cross-model object correspondences using only vectors. Empirically and theoretically, we show that independently trained contrastive encoders exhibit local geometric consistency: short-range distances are approximately preserved up to a scale factor, while long-range distances are not due to model-specific distortion. Building on this, we propose an iterative, reference-based geometric embedding hashing that recovers vector links from a tiny seed set of paired anchors. It represents each vector by distances to sampled paired anchors, proposes candidate links via hash-space matching, and aggregates evidence across views in a Beta-Bernoulli posterior to bootstrap high-confidence links as new anchors. Experiments across multiple benchmarks and embedding model pairs demonstrate accurate and robust linking under varying overlap, seed budgets, and out-of-domain anchors, with applications to vector database integration and cross-model clustering. Code is available at https://github.com/DBgroup-Edinburgh/VecLinking.

AI.tldr: 研究向量链接问题：从不同黑盒编码器生成的嵌入空间中，恢复跨模型对象对应关系。核心发现是对比学习编码器具有局部几何一致性（短距离近似保持），提出基于Beta-Bernoulli后验的迭代锚点引导哈希方法。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中，不同模型产生的嵌入向量可能表示同一对象，但无法直接比较。需要建立跨模型的匹配链接，且传统方法依赖监督数据或显式特征，泛化受限。
AI.method: 利用对比学习编码器的局部几何一致性特性，提出迭代参考几何嵌入哈希：(1)用配对锚点的距离表示向量；(2)通过哈希空间匹配候选链接；(3)使用Beta-Bernoulli后验聚合多视图证据；(4)自举高置信度链接作为新锚点。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和嵌入模型对上实现准确鲁棒的链接，性能在不同重叠程度、种子预算和外域锚点下均表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为向量数据库集成和跨模型聚类提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper addresses cross-model vector linking/matching (aligning embeddings from different black-box encoders), which is a general machine learning/representation learning problem. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion generation, 3D human motion synthesis, or video generation. While both papers might use techniques like contrastive learning, the paper's actual application (vector correspondence) is entirely separate from the research profile (motion generation). None of the pain points in the profile are addressed here.

title: Annotations Are Not All You Need: A Cross-modal Knowledge Transfer Network for Unsupervised Temporal Sentence Grounding
summary: This paper addresses the task of temporal sentence grounding (TSG). Although many respectable works have made decent achievements in this important topic, they severely rely on massive expensive video-query paired annotations, which require a tremendous amount of human effort to collect in real-world applications. To this end, in this paper, we target a more practical but challenging TSG setting: unsupervised temporal sentence grounding, where both paired video-query and segment boundary annotations are unavailable during the network training. Considering that some other cross-modal tasks provide many easily available yet cheap labels, we tend to collect and transfer their simple cross-modal alignment knowledge into our complex scenarios: 1) We first explore the entity-aware object-guided appearance knowledge from the paired Image-Noun task, and adapt them into each independent video frame; 2) Then, we extract the event-aware action representation from the paired Video-Verb task, and further refine the action representation into more practical but complicated real-world cases by a newly proposed copy-paste approach; 3) By modulating and transferring both appearance and action knowledge into our challenging unsupervised task, our model can directly utilize this general knowledge to correlate videos and queries, and accurately retrieve the relevant segment without training. Extensive experiments on two challenging datasets (ActivityNet Captions and Charades-STA) show our effectiveness, outperforming existing unsupervised methods and even competitively beating supervised works.

AI.tldr: 本文研究无监督时间句子 grounding（TSG）问题，即在训练时既没有视频-查询配对注释也没有片段边界注释的情况下，将自然语言查询与视频中的相关时间段进行匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有的TSG方法虽然取得了一定成绩，但严重依赖大量昂贵的人工标注视频-查询配对数据，在实际应用中获取成本极高。因此，作者希望探索一种更实用的无监督设置。
AI.method: 提出一种跨模态知识迁移方法：1）从Image-Noun任务迁移实体感知的外观知识到独立视频帧；2）从Video-Verb任务提取事件感知动作表示，并通过新提出的copy-paste方法进一步细化；3）将-appearance和action知识调制并融合到无监督任务中，使模型无需训练即可关联视频和查询并检索相关片段。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet Captions和Charades-STA两个数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果表明该方法优于现有无监督方法，甚至可以与一些有监督方法相媲美。
AI.conclusion: 通过从其他跨模态任务迁移简单的配对对齐知识（图像-名词、视频-动词），可以有效解决复杂的无监督时间句子 grounding 问题，为实际应用提供了更实用的方案。

relevance_reason: While this paper deals with text-video alignment, it addresses a fundamentally different task: Temporal Sentence Grounding (matching/retrieving video segments given text queries), not Text-to-Motion generation. The application domain is completely different - this is about video understanding and retrieval, not about generating 3D human motion from text descriptions. Although both fields deal with text-visual alignment, the goal here is not motion synthesis but video segment localization. It does not address any of the specified pain points: no 3D motion geometry, no quality assessment for VLMs in motion generation, no diffusion models for motion synthesis, no temporal coherence in generated motions.

title: LLM-FACETS: A Privacy-Preserving Framework for Evaluating LLM Transparency and Accountability
comment: Submitted to ACM Journal on Responsible Computing, Special Section: Collaborative Methods and Tools for Engineering and Evaluating Transparency in AI. 28 pages 9 figures, 7 tables, 1 algorithm. Source code: https://github.com/Scriptor-Group/AIMVi
summary: Assessing whether Large Language Models outputs are factually grounded, epistemically calibrated, and methodologically reproducible is a prerequisite for responsible AI deployment. Yet auditing LLMs remains inaccessible to non-technical practitioners: existing tools require programming expertise and non-trivial environment setup, and cloud-hosted platforms transmit evaluation data to external services, creating barriers for domain experts and compliance officers legally responsible for AI oversight. We introduce LLM-FACETS (LLM FActuality Cross-EvaluaTion System): an open-source framework with a browser-accessible interface and a plugin architecture, structured around three practitioner profiles (technical experts, domain experts, compliance officers) that mirror the stakeholder categories identified in the EU AI Act and the NIST AI Risk Management Framework. The architecture makes data flows explicit: deterministic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE, BERTScore) run entirely within the self-hosted server with no outbound transmission; LLM-judge metrics contact external APIs explicitly, with users retaining full credential control. The framework operationalizes transparency through three mechanisms: token-level log-probability visualization for epistemic uncertainty, multi-judge consensus to mitigate judge bias, and RAG Triad metrics (Faithfulness, Answer Relevance, Context Relevance) to detect and localize hallucinations. A plugin architecture allows any new metric or dataset to be integrated without modifying the evaluation pipeline. The open-source implementation enables cross-checking across multiple metrics targeting the same property, ensuring reproducibility and decoupling AI accountability from the teams building the systems assessed. We verify the framework through cross-validation of 18 metric implementations against canonical reference libraries.

AI.tldr: LLM-FACETS是一个开源框架，旨在为非技术背景的从业者提供评估大型语言模型输出真实性、校准性和可重复性的工具。该系统通过浏览器界面和插件架构，支持三种用户配置文件（技术专家、领域专家、合规官员），并整合了确定性指标、LLM判断指标和RAG三项指标来检测幻觉。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM审计工具对非技术从业者存在较高门槛：现有工具需要编程经验和非平凡的环境设置，云托管平台会将评估数据传输到外部服务，这为负责任AI部署带来了障碍。作者旨在降低审计门槛，使领域专家和合规官员能够独立进行AI Oversight。
AI.method: 该框架采用三大机制实现透明化：1)token级对数概率可视化用于认知不确定性；2)多评判器共识以减轻评判偏差；3)RAG三项指标（忠诚度、答案相关性、上下文相关性）用于检测和定位幻觉。系统包含插件架构，允许集成新的指标或数据集。
AI.result: 作者通过对18个指标实现与标准参考库的交叉验证，验证了框架的可行性。确定性指标完全在自托管服务器上运行，无外向传输；LLM评判指标明确联系外部API，用户保留完整凭证控制权。
AI.conclusion: LLM-FACETS通过将数据流明确化、支持跨指标交叉检查，使AI问责与系统构建团队脱钩，为符合EU AI Act和NIST AI风险管理框架要求的负责任AI部署提供了实践路径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM transparency and accountability evaluation, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion. While the research profile mentions "Vision-Language Models (VLM) for Quality Assessment," this is in the context of assessing 3D motion generation quality. The paper's VLM usage is for detecting LLM hallucinations and evaluating text outputs - a completely different application domain. There is no connection to video generation, motion synthesis, diffusion models for motion, or any computer graphics tasks.

title: Immuno-VLM: Immunizing Large Vision-Language Models via Generative Semantic Antibodies for Open-World Trustworthiness
summary: Large Vision-Language Models have achieved unprecedented success in zero-shot recognition by aligning visual features with broad semantic concepts. However, this semantic abstraction creates a critical vulnerability in open-world deployment: the ``Hubris of Semantics'', where models force-fit unknown anomalies into known categories with high confidence due to the lack of explicit negative knowledge. To address this \textit{Open-World Trustworthiness Paradox}, we propose \textbf{Immuno-VLM}, a bio-inspired framework that adapts the biological principle of \textbf{Immunological Negative Selection} to high-dimensional latent spaces. Departing from traditional Open-Set Recognition methods that rely on passive density estimation or inefficient pixel-space outlier generation, Immuno-VLM leverages the generative reasoning of Large Language Models to actively hallucinate ``Semantic Antibodies'', textual descriptions of near-distribution outliers (e.g., look-alikes, contextual anomalies) that effectively bound the decision space of known classes.Extensive experiments on ImageNet-1K and four challenging OOD benchmarks reveal that Immuno-VLM establishes a new state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: 大型视觉-语言模型在零样本识别中取得成功,但存在"语义傲慢"问题——将未知异常强制分类到已知类别中。为解决开放世界可信度悖论,提出Immuno-VLM框架,灵感来自生物免疫学的阴性选择原理,利用大语言模型生成"语义抗体"(近分布异常的文本描述)来界定已知类别的决策空间。ImageNet-1K和四个OOD基准测试表明该方法达到新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 当前大型视觉-语言模型存在"语义傲慢"问题:缺乏明确的负知识,导致模型将未知异常以高置信度错误地分类到已知类别中,这就是所谓的"开放世界可信度悖论"。传统开集识别方法依赖被动密度估计或在像素空间低效生成异常样本,效果有限。
AI.method: 提出Immuno-VLM框架,核心思想是借鉴生物免疫系统的阴性选择原理。具体方法:1)利用大语言模型的生成推理能力主动幻觉出"语义抗体"——近分布异常(如相似物、上下文异常)的文本描述;2)用这些语义抗体来界定已知类别的决策空间,使模型能够识别未知/异常样本。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K和四个具有挑战性的OOD(分布外检测)基准测试上进行了广泛实验,结果表明Immuno-VLM建立了新的最先进水平(state-of-the-art)。
AI.conclusion: Immuno-VLM通过生物启发的免疫阴性选择机制,有效解决了大型视觉-语言模型在开放世界部署中的语义傲慢问题,为零样本识别中的OOD检测提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely unrelated to the research profile. It addresses Computer Vision tasks (open-set recognition, OOD detection, image classification) rather than Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion generation. While both mention "Vision-Language Models," the application domains are completely different: the paper deals with classifying unknown anomalies and out-of-distribution detection in images, while the research profile requires 3D human motion synthesis from text inputs using video generation models and diffusion models for motion. No aspect of this paper relates to temporal motion generation, semantic alignment for motion-text pairs, or extracting 3D geometric cues from 2D video.

title: Formalizing and falsifying causal pathways of rare events
summary: Building on recent formalizations of root cause analysis for rare events (``outliers'') in structural equation models, we propose a formal definition of a causal pathway and discuss its testable implications. We identify conditions under which these implications depend only on a causal abstraction defined by the pathway of rare events, rather than on the full causal graph of the underlying system. Accordingly, we introduce an abstraction of causal structure to pathways of rare events that bridges simple verbal causal explanations and detailed causal modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文在结构方程模型中罕见事件根因分析的形式化基础上，提出了因果路径的形式定义及其可检验含义，并确定了仅依赖因果抽象而不依赖完整因果图的条件。
AI.motivation: 研究动机在于建立一座桥梁，连接简单的口头因果解释和详细的因果建模，使得对罕见事件的因果分析更加形式化和可检验。
AI.method: 通过形式化定义因果路径，识别可检验含义的条件，这些条件依赖于罕见事件路径的因果抽象而非底层系统的完整因果图。
AI.result: 确定了可以仅通过因果抽象检验因果路径含义的条件，从而实现从复杂因果图到简单路径抽象的简化分析。
AI.conclusion: 成功建立了因果结构在罕见事件路径上的抽象，为口头解释和详细建模之间提供了形式化的中间层。

relevance_reason: This paper is about causal inference and structural equation models for analyzing rare events - completely outside the domain of Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion. It has no relevance to video generation, motion synthesis, diffusion models, or any of the specified methods. The application domain is statistical causal analysis, not computer graphics or motion generation.

title: SLAP: The Semantic Least Action Principle for Variational Video-Language Modeling
summary: In the era of Large Video-Language Models (LVLMs), the computational necessity of sparse frame sampling creates a fundamental ``temporal gap'', rendering models blind to critical causal transitions. Existing solutions relying on generative hallucination (e.g., latent diffusion) or autoregressive extrapolation often fail to maintain semantic consistency over long horizons, suffering from object vanishing and energetic instability. We propose a paradigm shift from probabilistic generation to variational mechanics with the \textbf{Semantic Least Action Principle (SLAP)}. Drawing a rigorous isomorphism between classical mechanics and semantic dynamics, we model the latent video trajectory as a path on a Riemannian manifold governed by a Semantic Lagrangian. By formulating the interpolation task as a Boundary Value Problem (BVP) solved via the discrete Euler-Lagrange equations, SLAP naturally enforces object persistence without pixel-level rendering. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our proposed SLAP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出语义最小作用原理(SLAP)，将视频插帧从概率生成范式转向变分力学方法，将潜在视频轨迹建模为黎曼流形上的路径，通过离散欧拉-拉格朗日方程求解边值问题，实现物体持久性和语义一致性。
AI.motivation: 大型视频语言模型中的稀疏帧采样导致"时间间隙"问题，使模型无法感知关键因果转换。现有基于生成分布式幻觉或自回归外推的方法在长时域上难以保持语义一致性，存在物体消失和能量不稳定的问题。
AI.method: 提出语义最小作用原理(SLAM)，建立经典力学与语义动力学的严格同构。将潜在视频轨迹建模为由语义拉格朗日量控制的黎曼流形上的路径，将插帧任务表述为边值问题(BVP)，通过离散欧拉-拉格朗日方程求解，无需像素级渲染即可自然强制物体持久性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明SLAP方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SLAP代表了一种从概率生成到变分力学的范式转变，为视频插帧任务提供了新的理论框架，在保持物体持久性和语义一致性方面具有优势。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses video frame interpolation using a variational/physics-inspired approach on Riemannian manifolds. While it deals with temporal consistency and semantic consistency (touching some pain points), the APPLICATION DOMAIN is fundamentally different: it's about video interpolation (2D visual content), not Text-to-Motion (3D human motion generation). The paper doesn't generate 3D motion geometry from text, nor does it address extracting 3D geometric cues from 2D video. It's in the video generation domain rather than the motion generation domain. Even though both involve temporal modeling, the output and goals are categorically different - this is more related to video generation (like Wanxiang/Seedance) than to text-to-motion synthesis.

title: COLLEAGUE.SKILL: Automated AI Skill Generation via Expert Knowledge Distillation
summary: LLM agents are increasingly expected not only to complete isolated tasks, but also to carry bounded representations of human expertise, judgment, and interaction style. Building such person-grounded agents remains difficult because actionable knowledge associated with a person or role is usually embedded in heterogeneous traces rather than written as clean instructions. Existing memory and persona systems capture fragments of this evidence, while skill frameworks provide portable packaging formats; however, there is no end-to-end workflow for distilling these traces into inspectable, correctable, and agent-usable skills. We present an automated trace-to-skill distillation system for generating person-grounded AI skills via expert knowledge distillation. Given materials from a target person or role, COLLEAGUE.SKILL produces a versioned skill package with two coordinated tracks: a capability track for practices, mental models, and decision heuristics, and a bounded behavior track for communication style, interaction rules, and correction history. The package can be inspected, invoked, updated through natural-language feedback, rolled back, installed across agent hosts, and optionally prepared for controlled distribution. We describe the artifact contract, generation workflow, correction lifecycle, deployment surface, and domain presets implemented in the open-source system. At the time of writing, the public repository has approximately 18.5k GitHub stars; the gallery lists 215 skills from 165 contributors and more than 100k cumulative stars across listed skill cards. The system illustrates how person-grounded skills can be represented as portable, correctable packages rather than opaque prompts or hidden memories.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了COLLEAGUE.SKILL系统，一个自动化的从人类专家行为轨迹中提取并生成可移植、可纠正的AI技能包的端到端工作流程。该系统采用双轨设计：能力轨（实践、心智模型、决策启发式）和边界行为轨（沟通风格、交互规则、纠正历史），支持版本管理、自然语言反馈、回滚和跨智能体部署。
AI.motivation: 构建具备人类专业知识、判断力和交互风格的类人智能体仍面临挑战，因为与特定人物或角色相关的可行知识通常嵌入在异构行为轨迹中，而非以清晰指令形式存在。现有记忆和人格系统仅捕获碎片，技能框架提供便携封装格式，但缺少将轨迹转化为可检查、可纠正、且智能体可用的技能的端到端工作流程。
AI.method: COLLEAGUE.SKILL系统包含四大核心组件：工件契约定义技能包结构、生成工作流自动化提取知识、纠正生命周期支持持续改进、部署面支持跨智能体适配。系统生成包含两个协调轨道的版本化技能包：能力轨道涵盖实践、心智模型和决策启发式；边界行为轨道涵盖沟通风格、交互规则和纠正历史。通过自然语言反馈进行更新，支持版本回滚，可安装至不同智能体宿主并支持受控分发。
AI.result: 该开源系统目前拥有约18.5k GitHub星标，技能库收录了165位贡献者的215个技能卡，累计星标超过10万。该系统证明了类人技能可以被表示为可移植、可纠正的软件包，而非不透明的提示词或隐藏的记忆。
AI.conclusion: 通过将专业知识编码为结构化的双轨技能包，COLLEAGUE.SKILL实现了从专家行为轨迹到可部署AI技能的端到端转化。这一范式使得类人智能体能以透明、可审计的方式继承人类专业知识，支持持续迭代和跨平台部署，为构建更可信、更可控的AI智能体提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely outside the research domain. It focuses on AI agent skill generation and knowledge distillation for building human-like agents with professional knowledge and interaction styles. There is no connection to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, motion generation/synthesis, diffusion models for motion, 3D geometry extraction, or any vision-language quality assessment for generated content. The application domain is fundamentally different - it's about software agents and knowledge management rather than computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: DisPlace: Discriminative Place Projections for Multi-Reference Visual Place Recognition
summary: A key challenge in Visual Place Recognition (VPR) is matching query images against reference maps captured under diverse environmental conditions and viewpoints. While multiple reference traversals improve robustness, existing fusion strategies either aggregate references uniformly or rely on heuristic selection, without distinguishing descriptor variations that preserve stable place identity from those caused by changing conditions or viewpoints. In this paper, we propose DisPlace, a multi-reference VPR framework that fuses multiple reference descriptors into a single compact and discriminative place representation. DisPlace formulates descriptor fusion as a generalized eigenvalue problem that maximizes between-place separability while suppressing within-place variation across references, rather than preserving overall descriptor variance. Unlike existing multi-reference fusion methods, DisPlace exploits variation across reference traversals to identify which linear combinations of descriptor dimensions preserve place identity and which capture condition- or viewpoint-specific variation. We evaluate DisPlace on Oxford RobotCar, Nordland, Pittsburgh30k, and Google Landmarks v2 across six state-of-the-art VPR descriptors. DisPlace outperforms seven multi-reference baselines in 49 out of 54 appearance-varying conditions, consistently improves descriptor-level fusion performance under viewpoint and unstructured settings, and requires less storage during inference than all compared fusion methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DisPlace，一个多参考视觉地点识别(VPR)框架,将多个参考描述子融合为一个紧凑且具有判别性的地点表示。
AI.motivation: 视觉地点识别的关键挑战是匹配在不同环境和视角下拍摄的查询图像与参考地图。现有的融合策略要么统一聚合参考数据,要么依赖启发式选择,无法区分保留稳定地点身份的描述子变化与由环境变化或视角变化引起的描述子变化。
AI.method: DisPlace将描述子融合表述为广义特征值问题,在抑制参考间地点内变化的同时最大化地点间可分性。该方法利用跨参考遍历的变化来识别哪些描述子维度的线性组合保留地点身份,哪些捕获条件或视角特定的变化。
AI.result: 在Oxford RobotCar、Nordland、Pittsburgh30k和Google Landmarks v2数据集上,针对六种先进的VPR描述子进行评估,DisPlace在54种外观变化条件中的49种中优于七个多参考基线方法,在视角和非结构化设置下持续提升描述子级融合性能,且推理时存储需求低于所有比较的融合方法。
AI.conclusion: DisPlace能够有效融合多个参考描述子为紧凑且具有判别性的表示,在各种条件下提升VPR性能,为多参考地点识别提供了一种新的融合范式。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Visual Place Recognition (VPR) - matching query images to reference maps in robotics/autonomous driving contexts. While it involves visual feature extraction, this is completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on Text-to-Motion generation (creating 3D human motion from text). The application domains are fundamentally different: VPR for localization vs. motion synthesis. The paper doesn't involve any motion generation, diffusion models for motion synthesis, text-to-motion alignment, or temporal motion modeling - all key elements in the research profile.

title: Industrializing Prediction-Powered Inference: The GLIDE Library for Reliable GenAI and Agentic Systems Evaluation
comment: 8 pages, accepted at the ICML 2026 workshop Agentic Uncertainty
summary: Reliable evaluation of agentic systems requires unbiased estimates with valid uncertainty, but standard practice navigates between costly human annotation and biased LLM-as-judge proxies. Prediction-powered inference (PPI) combines both into debiased estimates with valid confidence intervals, yet its various methods remain scattered across papers under partial implementations. We introduce GLIDE, an open-source Python library that unifies state-of-the-art PPI estimators (PPI++, Stratified PPI, Predict-Then-Debias and its stratified variants, Active Statistical Inference) and samplers (uniform, stratified, active, cost-optimal) under a scipy-style API specialized to mean estimation. GLIDE ships with a reproducible Monte Carlo validation suite, an empirically grounded decision tree for method selection, and an agentic evaluation case study showing substantial annotation savings at equivalent precision. The GLIDE package is available at this URL: https://github.com/EmertonData/glide

AI.tldr: GLIDE是一个统一预测驱动推理(PPI)方法的开源Python库,用于解决智能体系统评估中的人类标注成本高和LLM-as-judge偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 可靠的智能体系统评估需要无偏估计和有效不确定度,但标准实践在昂贵的人工标注和有偏的LLM判断之间权衡。现有PPI方法分散在不同论文中,缺乏统一实现。
AI.method: GLIDE库统一了多种先进的PPI估计器(PPI++、分层PPI、预测后去偏及其分层变体、主动统计推断)和采样器(均匀、分层、主动、成本最优),提供scipy风格API专注于均值估计。包含可复现的蒙特卡洛验证套件和方法选择的决策树,并通过智能体评估案例研究验证效果。
AI.result: 案例研究表明,该库能在保持同等精度下显著节省标注成本。
AI.conclusion: GLIDE为智能体系统评估提供了统一的PPI工具框架,兼具效率和精度的平衡,可从https://github.com/EmertonData/glide获取。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text), while this paper is about AI Agent System Evaluation using Prediction-Powered Inference (PPI) methods. Although both touch on quality assessment, this paper deals with LLM-as-judge evaluation for agents, not motion generation, video-to-motion conversion, or any computer graphics tasks. The core application domain is entirely unrelated.

title: CameraNoise: Enabling Faithful Camera Control in Video Diffusion through Geometry-Flow-Guided Noise Warping
summary: Precise camera pose control is critical for video diffusion, yet maintaining geometric consistency remains a challenge. Existing methods that directly inject numerical camera parameters into the diffusion backbone often fail to bridge the gap between abstract coordinates and visual content, leading to structural distortions. To address this issue, we propose CameraNoise, a flow-to-noise warping method that encodes camera motion into a temporally coherent stochastic representation. Unlike conventional conditioning, CameraNoise embeds camera poses directly into the noise space. This decouples motion from scene appearance while faithfully preserving trajectory dynamics. Specifically, we introduce a novel Geometry-guided Reprojection Flow and a noise warping algorithm, which jointly preserve the Gaussian prior of diffusion and ensure consistent noise propagation under camera transformations. By integrating CameraNoise into the diffusion process, our framework delivers stable, high-fidelity videos. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms prior methods in both visual quality and trajectory faithfulness. The project page and code are available at: https://gulucaptain.github.io/CameraNoise/.

AI.tldr: 提出CameraNoise方法，通过将相机姿态编码到噪声空间中实现视频扩散的精确相机位姿控制，保持几何一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有直接注入数值相机参数的方法无法弥合抽象坐标与视觉内容之间的鸿沟，导致结构失真。
AI.method: 引入几何引导的重投影流和噪声扭曲算法，将相机姿态嵌入噪声空间，解除运动与场景外观的耦合，同时保持高斯先验和噪声传播的一致性。
AI.result: 在视觉质量和轨迹保真度方面显著优于现有方法，实现稳定、高保真的视频生成。
AI.conclusion: CameraNoise通过流到噪声扭曲的方式成功解决了视频扩散中的几何一致性问题，为相机运动控制提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: While both papers involve diffusion models and geometry-related methods, they target fundamentally different application domains. The research profile focuses on TEXT-TO-MOTION (generating 3D human motions from text), whereas CameraNoise addresses VIDEO generation with camera control. The paper does touch on geometry extraction and temporal consistency - which align partially with some pain points (extracting geometric cues from 2D, temporal coherence). However, it lacks key elements: no text-to-motion generation, no semantic alignment between text and visual motion features, and no VLM-based quality assessment. The main contribution is camera pose control in video diffusion, which is orthogonal to motion synthesis. Using similar diffusion methods in different domains (video generation vs motion generation) makes this only modestly relevant (similar methodology but wrong application).

title: TraceGraph: Shared Decision Landscapes for Diagnosing and Improving Agent Trajectories
summary: Agent benchmarks increasingly record rich interaction trajectories, yet evaluation often reduces each rollout to a pass rate or reward score. We introduce TraceGraph, a graph-based framework that turns released multi-model agent trajectories into shared decision landscapes. For each task, TraceGraph builds a graph over observable action-observation states from pooled rollouts before model identity is introduced. It then overlays outcome-informed productive cores and trap regions, and summarizes each rollout with three events: Access, Trap exposure, and Repair. Across trajectories spanning five benchmark splits, TraceGraph profiles reveal navigation differences hidden by aggregate scores and show that splits differ in whether they reward avoiding traps or recovering from them. The same TraceGraph landscape also motivates a trap-aware recovery pipeline for SWE-bench: aruntime detector fires on states matching historical trap regions, then lightweight continuation policies are evaluated from the same prefix. On fired states, the best pooled single-factor policy raises official resolved rate from 40.4% to 43.5% on the per-provider fired subset and from 41.0% to 44.8% on common-fired instances, with provider-specific active components. Overall, TraceGraph provides a process vocabulary for asking what agent benchmarks test, where models diverge on a shared landscape, and how failure regions can guide downstream improvement.

AI.tldr: TraceGraph是一种基于图的框架，可将多模型智能体轨迹转化为共享决策景观，帮助分析和改进智能体基准测试的评估方式。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体评估通常简化为通过率或奖励分数，忽略了丰富的交互轨迹信息，无法揭示模型在任务中的具体导航差异和失败模式。
AI.method: 1. 为每个任务构建图谱，连接池化轨迹的行动-观察状态；2. 叠加结果知情的生产核心区和陷阱区域；3. 用Access、Trap exposure、Repair三个事件总结轨迹；4. 在SWE-bench上实现运行时陷阱检测器+轻量级延续策略的恢复管道。
AI.result: TraceGraph揭示了aggregate scores隐藏的导航差异，发现不同splits在奖励避免陷阱或从陷阱恢复上有分歧；在SWE-bench上，官方resolved rate从40.4%提升至43.5%（per-provider），从41.0%提升至44.8%（common-fired）。
AI.conclusion: TraceGraph提供了过程词汇，用于询问智能体基准测试的测试内容、模型在共享景观上的分歧位置，以及如何利用失败区域指导下游改进。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about AI agent trajectories and software engineering benchmarks (SWE-bench), focusing on analyzing agent decision-making in coding tasks. It has NO connection to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different: agent trajectory analysis vs 3D human motion generation. Methods used are also completely different: graph-based trajectory analysis vs diffusion models for motion synthesis. There is no overlap in any aspect with the research profile.

title: Text-guided Feature Disentanglement for Cross-modal Gait Recognition
summary: Gait recognition is a biometric technique that identifies individuals based on their walking patterns, offering advantages in long-range, non-intrusive scenarios. However, real-world scenarios often involve heterogeneous sensing modalities such as LiDAR and RGB cameras, making LiDAR-Camera Cross-modal Gait recognition (LCCGR) a critical yet challenging task due to the substantial modality gap between 2D videos and 3D point cloud sequences. To address this challenge, we propose TCFDNet, a Text-guided Cross-modal Feature Disentanglement Network, which leverages modality-aware textual priors as semantic anchors to guide the learning of disentangled modality-shared representations. Specifically, we construct a Gait Modality Text Dictionary (GMTD) using large language models to generate rich semantic descriptions of gait across modalities and viewpoints. A CLIP-based Multi-grained Feature Encoder then aligns visual and textual features within a unified vision-language space. Furthermore, the Text-guided Feature Disentanglement (TFD) module selects the topk matched textual descriptions to reconstruct modality-specific representations and derive modality-shared features via residual decomposition and orthogonality constraints. To mitigate the fragility of the disentangled shared features, we propose a Feature Stability Enhancement (FSE) module, which models spatial and channel-wise correlations to improve feature robustness. In addition, a cross-modal patch exchange strategy is introduced to further improve generalization. Extensive experiments on SUSTech1K and FreeGait datasets demonstrate that TCFDNet achieves new state-of-the-art results and validate the effectiveness of the proposed modules.

AI.tldr: TCFDNet是一种用于解决LiDAR-相机跨模态步态识别难题的新方法，通过利用大语言模型生成的文本语义描述作为引导，实现模态共享特征的解耦学习，在SUSTech1K和FreeGait数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: LiDAR-相机跨模态步态识别(LCCGR)是一个重要但具有挑战性的任务，因为2D视频与3D点云序列之间存在显著的模态差异，現有方法难以有效处理这种异构传感器的场景。
AI.method: 提出TCFDNet，包含三个关键模块：1)构建步态模态文本字典(GMTD)利用大语言模型生成丰富的语义描述；2)CLIP多粒度特征编码器对齐视觉和文本特征；3)文本引导的特征解耦(TFD)模块通过残差分解和正交约束选择topk匹配文本来重建模态特定特征并解耦模态共享特征；4)特征稳定性增强(FSE)模块建模空间和通道相关性提高鲁棒性；5)跨模态patch交换策略提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在SUSTech1K和FreeGait数据集上的广泛实验表明，TCFDNet达到了新的最先进水平，验证了所提模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过文本引导的跨模态特征解耦策略，可以有效弥合LiDAR与RGB相机之间的模态差距，为跨模态步态识别提供了新的研究思路。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses LiDAR-camera cross-modal gait recognition (biometric identification), which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion. While both involve "motion," this paper focuses on person identification via walking patterns using LiDAR and cameras, not on generating human motion animations from text for graphics/virtual characters. Although it uses some related techniques like CLIP and text-guided feature alignment, the goal, evaluation metrics (identification accuracy vs motion quality), and domain are entirely different from what's needed for text-to-motion generation in computer graphics.

title: Diagnosing Failure Modes of Shared-State Collaboration in Resource-Constrained Visual Agents
summary: Modular visual reasoning systems increasingly rely on shared working memory for multi-step collaboration, yet the failure dynamics of intermediate state evolution in low-capacity regimes remain underexplored. We study failure modes of collaborative reasoning with weak learners (4B--8B models) through the lens of noise accumulation. We introduce CoSee, an auditing framework that formalizes the read-write-verify loop to trace information flow in document visual question answering. Across multi-page, chart, and web-based benchmarks, we find a counter-intuitive degradation: naive shared workspaces often amplify hallucinations rather than resolve them. We identify two dominant failure modes: Noise Reinforcement, where ungrounded notes are reused as evidence, and Policy Collapse, where added context shifts the model toward under-specified, short-form answers. Using cost-accuracy Pareto frontiers, we show that increased compute can correlate negatively with performance without explicit verification. Our findings suggest that for resource-constrained agents, the bottleneck lies not in reasoning depth but in communication fidelity, providing trace-level diagnostics and a mechanistic baseline for reliable modular design.

title: MechVQA: Benchmarking and Enhancing Multimodal LLMs on Comprehensive Mechanical Drawing Understanding
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated significant achievements in general visual question answering (VQA) tasks. However, they remain brittle on mechanical engineering drawings, where high annotation density and weak domain knowledge, compounded by unreliable spatial relation reasoning under strict projection rules and geometric constraints, make decisive cues easy to miss and frequently lead to wrong answers. To bridge this gap, we introduce the first comprehensive mechanical drawing understanding dataset, MechVQA, created through a semi-automated construction and quality-control pipeline. MechVQA contains 3.3k high-density pictures with 21K question-answer pairs, spanning 10 different fine-grained tasks across three capability levels: Recognition, Reasoning, and Judging, providing a testbed to evaluate and improve MLLM understanding on real-world mechanical drawings. On top of MechVQA, we then develop the MechVL model through a multi-stage training paradigm, building a strong domain-specialized baseline. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that MechVL outperforms the strongest closed-source baseline by 7.57 percentage points on the MechVQA total score, significantly enhancing mechanical drawing understanding ability and providing a reusable foundation for deploying MLLMs in mechanical design and inspection scenarios.

title: Function2Scene: 3D Indoor Scene Layout from Functional Specifications
summary: Most text-driven 3D indoor scene synthesis methods generate rooms from object-centric prompts, asking what furniture should be placed rather than how the space is used. Yet in real interior design, a layout is judged by how well it supports its occupants, e.g., their activities and physical needs. We introduce Function2Scene, a framework for generating 3D indoor layouts from functional specifications, i.e., natural-language design briefs describing who will use a room and what they need to do there. Given such a specification, our system parses occupant personas and activities, derives a customized set of functional design constraints from a taxonomy of 17 criteria spanning spatial, ergonomic, activity, and environmental considerations, and uses these constraints to guide layout generation. Rather than relying on an LLM to directly produce a final scene, Function2Scene performs iterative evaluation and refinement through a tool-augmented check-and-repair loop, combining geometric measurements, LLM-based contextual reasoning, and VLM-based visual assessment. Experiments on 30 professionally written interior-design cases show that Function2Scene produces layouts that better satisfy functional requirements than recent LLM-based scene synthesis baselines, with our results preferred in 94.3% of pairwise comparisons. Our work reframes text-driven indoor scene synthesis from placing plausible objects to designing spaces that support human use.

AI.tldr: Function2Scene是一个基于功能规范的3D室内布局生成框架，将传统的以对象为中心的场景合成转变为以人为中心的空间设计。该系统接收自然语言设计 briefs，解析使用者 persona 和活动，推导17个维度的功能设计约束，并通过迭代检查-修复循环生成满足人类使用需求的室内布局。
AI.motivation: 现有方法关注放置什么家具，而非空间如何使用。真实室内设计中，布局质量取决于其对居住者的支持程度（如活动和身体需求）。现有以对象为中心的生成范式无法满足这一设计理念。
AI.method: 1)解析自然语言设计规范，提取居住者人物画像和活动；2)从17个维度（空间、人体工程学、活动、环境）的功能设计约束taxonomy中推导定制化约束；3)通过工具增强的check-and-repair循环进行迭代评估和优化，结合几何测量、LLM上下文推理和VLM视觉评估；4)不依赖LLM直接输出最终场景。
AI.result: 在30个专业室内设计案例上的实验表明，Function2Scene生成的布局相比近期的LLM基线更能满足功能需求，在94.3%的成对比较中被优先选择。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将文本驱动的室内场景合成从"放置合理的物体"重新定义为"设计支持人类使用的空间"，提出了以功能规范驱动的新范式，为人本导向的智能室内设计开辟了道路。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on 3D indoor scene layout generation for interior design, which is a fundamentally different application domain from Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion (human motion generation). While both use VLMs and LLMs, this paper generates static scene layouts (furniture arrangement), not dynamic 3D human motion from text. This is similar to using diffusion for image generation vs. human motion generation - same general ML tools but completely different target output. The paper addresses scene understanding and functional design constraints, not motion synthesis, temporal consistency, or text-to-motion alignment.

title: HypoAgent: An Agentic Framework for Interactive Abductive Hypothesis Generation over Knowledge Graphs
summary: Abductive reasoning over knowledge graphs aims to generate logical hypotheses that explain observed entities or facts. Existing controllable hypothesis generation methods allow users to guide this process with explicit conditions, but they remain limited in interactive settings: they struggle to ground evolving natural-language intents across multi-turn dialogues and provide little fine-grained diagnosis when generated hypotheses fail. To address these limitations, we propose HypoAgent, an Agentic framework for interactive abductive Hypothesis Generation over knowledge graphs. HypoAgent integrates three agents: an Intent Recognition Agent that grounds user utterances and dialogue history into executable KG conditions, a Hypothesis Generation Agent that performs controllable hypothesis generation according to the extracted user intention, and a Root Cause Analysis Agent that diagnoses unreliable hypothesis fragments and leverages KG neighborhood probing to identify supported refinements. Experiments on commonsense and biomedical domain-specific knowledge graphs demonstrate that HypoAgent achieves state-of-the-art semantic similarity under single-turn, multi-turn, and unconditional settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/HKUST-KnowComp/HypoAgent.

AI.tldr: HypoAgent是一个用于知识图谱上交互式归纳假设生成的智能体框架。
AI.motivation: 现有可控假设生成方法在交互设置中存在局限性：难以在多轮对话中理解演化的自然语言意图，且在生成假设失败时缺乏细粒度诊断。
AI.method: 提出HypoAgent框架，包含三个智能体：意图识别智能体（将用户话语和对话历史转化为可执行的KG条件）、假设生成智能体（根据提取的用户意图执行可控假设生成）、根因分析智能体（诊断不可靠的假设片段并利用KG邻域探测来识别支持的改进）。
AI.result: 在常识和生物医学领域特定知识图谱上的实验表明，HypoAgent在单轮、多轮和无条件设置下实现了最先进的语义相似度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为知识图谱上的交互式假设生成提供了一种新的智能体框架，并通过实验验证了其有效性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Knowledge Graph reasoning and hypothesis generation - completely different application domain from Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion. While HypoAgent uses agentic frameworks and transformers, these methods are applied to NLP tasks (semantic similarity on knowledge graphs) rather than 3D motion generation, video synthesis, or any computer graphics domain. The pain points and goals are entirely unrelated - no connection to video-to-motion transfer, temporal motion consistency, or visual feature extraction. This is a foundational/domain mismatch.

title: LegSegNet: A Public Deep Learning System for Lower Extremity CT Tissue Segmentation and Quantification
summary: Lower extremity computed tomography (CT) contains clinically relevant information for body composition analysis, sarcopenia assessment, and musculoskeletal disease monitoring, but extracting these measurements at scale requires accurate tissue segmentation and an automated quantification workflow. Existing public segmentation tools are not designed for comprehensive lower extremity CT analysis, particularly for clinically important inter/intramuscular adipose tissue, and most public methods only provide mask prediction rather than an end-to-end quantification system. To address this problem, we present LegSegNet, a deep learning system for lower extremity CT tissue segmentation and body composition quantification. Given an input CT scan, LegSegNet segments bone, skeletal muscle, subcutaneous adipose tissue, and inter/intramuscular adipose tissue. It then computes quantitative tissue measurements for downstream analysis. We developed the segmentation model using 1,302 manually annotated CT slices and evaluated it on 900 held-out test slices, with all annotations reviewed by radiologists. We benchmark LegSegNet against a broad set of 2D segmentation methods, including CNN-based models, transformer-based models, and finetuned foundation models, and further evaluate its generalization on an external public CT dataset. LegSegNet achieves the best overall segmentation performance, with an average Dice score of 89.31 on the held-out test set. To our knowledge, LegSegNet is the first publicly available end-to-end system for lower extremity CT tissue segmentation and quantification, providing a practical evaluation tool for future computer vision research in medical image analysis. The code and model weights are available at: https://github.com/mazurowski-lab/LegSegNet

AI.tldr: LegSegNet是一个用于下肢CT组织分割和身体成分量化的端到端深度学习系统，可分割骨骼、骨骼肌、皮下脂肪组织和肌间/肌内脂肪组织，并在900个测试切片上实现了89.31的平均Dice得分。
AI.motivation: 现有公开的分割工具缺乏针对下肢CT的综合分析能力，特别是无法识别临床上重要的肌间/肌内脂肪组织，且大多数方法仅提供mask预测而非端到端的量化系统，难以满足大规模提取临床相关信息的需求。
AI.method: 使用1,302个手动标注的CT切片训练分割模型（标注均经放射科医生审核），对比了CNN模型、Transformer模型和微调的基础模型等多种2D分割方法，并在外部公共CT数据集上评估泛化性能。
AI.result: LegSegNet在保留测试集上达到最佳分割性能，平均Dice得分为89.31分，并展现出良好的跨数据集泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LegSegNet是首个公开可用的下肢CT组织分割与量化端到端系统，为医学影像分析领域的计算机视觉研究提供了实用的评估工具。

relevance_reason: 完全无关领域。该论文是关于医学CT图像的组织分割（用于骨骼、肌肉、脂肪等组织标注），而研究档案是计算机图形学/文本生成动作（Text-to-Motion）。两者应用领域完全不同：一个是医学影像分析，一个是人类动作生成。即使该论文也使用了深度学习和Transformer方法，但这属于医疗图像处理领域，与文本到动作生成没有任何关联。应用域匹配是最重要的评估标准，而该论文的应用域与研究需求完全不匹配。

title: FAM-Bench: A Multimodal Benchmark for Condition-Aware Food-as-Medicine Reasoning
summary: Food-as-Medicine requires models to reason beyond what a dish is or what nutrition it contains: they must decide whether a concrete food choice is appropriate for a specific health condition. Existing food AI benchmarks primarily evaluate dish recognition, recipe understanding, nutrient estimation, or general nutrition question answering, leaving this health-aware decision layer largely untested. We introduce FAM-Bench, a multi-modal Food-as-Medicine benchmark with 2500 nutrition-expert-verified instances across 13 diet-related health conditions. The benchmark contains two complementary tasks: dish-level suitability assessment, where models judge whether a dish is suitable for a condition from its image and ingredient list, and comparative dish analysis, where models rank four candidate dishes by condition-specific suitability. Both tasks require integrating ingredient evidence, visual preparation cues, and clinical nutrition constraints, providing a standardized testbed for grounded health-aware reasoning in language and vision-language models.

AI.tldr: FAM-Bench是一个用于评估食品-作为-药物( Food-as-Medicine)AI系统的多模态基准测试,填补了现有食品AI基准在健康感知决策层面的空白。该基准包含2500个经营养专家验证的样本,涵盖13种饮食相关健康 condition,并包含两个任务:菜肴适宜性评估和比较性菜肴分析。
AI.motivation: 现有食品AI基准主要评估菜肴识别、食谱理解、营养素估计或一般营养问答,但缺少对「特定健康状况下食物选择是否合适」这一健康感知决策能力的测试。Food-as-Medicine要求模型能够推理beyond菜肴本身和营养成分,做出符合具体健康条件的饮食决策。
AI.method: 构建包含2500个样本的多模态基准数据集,涵盖13种饮食相关健康condition。设计两个互补任务:(1)菜肴级别适宜性评估——根据图像和食材清单判断菜肴是否适合特定健康状况;(2)比较性菜肴分析——对四种候选菜肴按condition-specific适宜性排序。两个任务都需要整合食材证据、视觉准备线索和临床营养约束。
AI.result: 提供了一个标准化的测试平台,用于评估语言模型和视觉-语言模型在食品-作为-药物领域的健康感知推理能力。基准包含13种饮食相关健康condition,为Grounded health-aware reasoning提供了标准化的评估框架。
AI.conclusion: FAM-Bench填补了食品AI领域的重要空白,为评估模型的健康感知决策能力提供了全面、标准化的基准,有助于推动Food-as-Medicine AI系统的发展。
