title: Answer-Set-Programming-based Abstractions for Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted for publication at the 42nd International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP 2026). To appear in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) enables autonomous agents to learn policies from experience, but realistic problems often involve enormous state spaces, making learning and generalisation challenging. Abstraction and approximation are therefore essential. Relational Reinforcement Learning (RRL) offers a way to reason about objects and their relations, and the CARCASS framework by Martijn van Otterlo demonstrates how logical representations can model Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) in first-order domains. Originally implemented in Prolog, CARCASS leverages domain knowledge to create powerful abstractions. We explore Answer-Set Programming (ASP), which is a rich and, contrary to Prolog, fully declarative modelling language, to realise CARCASS abstractions. We evaluate our ASP-based implementation in case studies of two domains, viz. Blocks World and Minigrid. Our results indicate that CARCASS with ASP provides a promising approach to constructing abstractions for RL, especially when domain knowledge is available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Answer-Set Programming (ASP)用于实现关系强化学习中的CARCASS抽象框架，以解决大规模状态空间的强化学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现实问题涉及巨大的状态空间，使强化学习的泛化和学习面临挑战。需要有效的抽象和近似方法来处理这些复杂域。
AI.method: 采用完全声明式的ASP建模语言重新实现原来的Prolog版本CARCASS框架，并在Blocks World和Minigrid两个领域进行案例研究评估。
AI.result: ASP实现的CARCASS能够有效构建强化学习抽象，尤其在领域知识可用的情况下表现出良好的性能。
AI.conclusion: CARCASS与ASP结合为强化学习构建抽象提供了一种有前景的方法，特别适用于具有领域知识的场景。

relevance_reason: Complete mismatch in application domain. The research profile is Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text/video), while this paper is about Reinforcement Learning with Answer-Set Programming for abstract problem-solving in Blocks World and Minigrid domains. The paper addresses completely different pain points (RL scalability and generalization) rather than any text-to-motion challenges, and uses entirely different methods (ASP/Prolog logic programming vs. diffusion models, VLM-based quality assessment, motion generation transformers). No relevant connection to video-to-motion generation, temporal consistency, semantic alignment, or any computer graphics methods.

title: Robust Dreamer: Deviation-Aware Latent Gaussian Memory for Action-Controlled AR Video Generation
summary: Frame-wise action-controlled image-to-video generation is a promising paradigm for interactive world simulation, where each control signal should elicit an immediate visual response. However, maintaining visual fidelity and 3D consistency over long autoregressive rollouts remains challenging. Existing 3D-aware methods often suffer from catastrophic drift due to two impediments: information loss from \textit{Latent--RGB Cycling}, where generated latents are repeatedly decoded to RGB and re-encoded for future conditioning, and the training--inference gap induced by the \textit{error-free hypothesis}, where clean training memory fails to match prediction-corrupted inference memory. To address these challenges, we present \textbf{Robust Dreamer}, a memory-augmented framework built around how to design 3D memory and how to use it robustly. First, we introduce \textbf{Latent Gaussian Memory}, which anchors diffusion latents inherited from the generation process to Gaussian primitives and recalls them via latent-space Gaussian splatting. This provides dense, geometry-aware, view-aligned conditioning while avoiding accumulated degradation from repeated VAE conversion. Second, we propose \textbf{Deviation Learning with Dynamic Deviation Archive}, which synthesizes rollout-induced latent deviations through a one-step approximation, stores them by autoregressive stage and denoising timestamp, and injects them into historical memory during training. This exposes the generator to realistic corrupted memory states and teaches internal correction before inference. Experiments on ScanNet, DL3DV, and OmniWorldGame demonstrate state-of-the-art long-horizon performance.

AI.tldr: Robust Dreamer是一个基于记忆增强的3D aware图像到视频生成框架，通过潜空间高斯记忆和动态偏差存档技术解决长时序自回归生成中的视觉退化和3D一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D感知方法在长时序自回归推演中存在灾难性漂移，主要源于两个问题：1) Latent-RGB Cycling导致的累积信息损失；2) error-free hypothesis带来的训练-推理差距。
AI.method: 提出两个核心技术创新：1) Latent Gaussian Memory - 将扩散生成的latent锚定到高斯原语，通过潜空间高斯splatting实现几何感知的视图对齐条件化，避免VAE转换的累积退化；2) Deviation Learning with Dynamic Deviation Archive - 通过一步近似合成推演诱导的latent偏差，按自回归阶段和时间戳存储，在训练时注入历史记忆以暴露真实的记忆损坏状态。
AI.result: 在ScanNet、DL3DV和OmniWorldGame数据集上实现了最先进的长时序性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过设计高质量的3D记忆机制和稳健的记忆使用策略，有效解决了3D场景下长时间视频生成的关键挑战。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D-aware Image-to-Video generation (specifically AR video synthesis from images), NOT Text-to-Motion generation. While it uses diffusion models and addresses temporal consistency, the application domain is completely different - it generates video sequences from images for view synthesis, not human motion from text descriptions. The paper focuses on long-term video generation with 3D consistency, but this is for scene-level video synthesis (e.g., ScanNet, DL3DV datasets) rather than character motion generation needed in the research profile. Some tangential relevance exists around cross-domain knowledge transfer (2D→3D) and temporal consistency, but these are too distant from the core Text-to-Motion goal.

title: AutoSci: A Memory-Centric Agentic System for the Full Scientific Research Lifecycle
summary: Scientific research has traditionally been human-intensive, requiring researchers to coordinate literature, ideas, experiments, manuscripts, and review responses across long project cycles. The rise of LLM-based scientific agents creates an opportunity to automate this process. Such a system must support the full research lifecycle, maintain structured persistent memory across projects, and improve its own research procedures over time. However, existing systems either partially satisfy or fail to satisfy these requirements, leaving a gap for a unified automated scientific research system. As a result, we present AutoSci, a memory-centric agentic system for the full scientific research lifecycle. AutoSci is organized around four modules. SciMem provides schema-governed research memory, separating Long-Term Knowledge Memory for reusable scientific knowledge from Active Research Memory for project-level artifacts such as ideas, experiments, manuscripts, and reviews. SciFlow executes a five-stage lifecycle from literature understanding to rebuttal through a harness that controls state, context, verification, feedback, and orchestration. SciDAG augments difficult skills with DAG-shaped multi-agent operators and reusable stage-specific templates. SciEvolve converts feedback signals from users, experiments, reviews, and external environments into versioned updates to SciMem organization, SciFlow skills, and SciDAG templates. Together, these modules make AutoSci a persistent research environment that can execute, remember, and evolve across research projects. The code repository is available at https://github.com/skyllwt/AutoSci.

AI.tldr: AutoSci是一个以记忆为中心的智能体系统，旨在实现科学研究全生命周期的自动化。该系统整合了四个核心模块：SciMem（ schema管理的科研记忆）、SciFlow（五阶段研究流程执行器）、SciDAG（ DAG结构多智能体操作器）和SciEvolve（反馈驱动的自我进化机制），能够跨项目保持结构化持久记忆并持续改进研究能力。
AI.motivation: 传统科学研究长期依赖人工密集型操作，研究人员需要在漫长的项目周期中协调文献、想法、实验、手稿和审稿意见。虽然LLM驱动的科学智能体出现了自动化这一过程的机会，但现有系统要么部分满足需求，要么完全无法满足，无法支持完整的研究生命周期、缺乏跨项目的结构化持久记忆，且无法随时间改进自身的研究流程。因此需要一个统一的自动化科学研究系统来填补这一空白。
AI.method: AutoSci围绕四个模块构建：1) SciMem提供schema管理的科研记忆，将长期知识记忆（可重用的科学知识）与主动研究记忆（项目级产物如想法、实验、手稿、审稿意见）分离；2) SciFlow通过控制状态、上下文、验证、反馈和编排的五阶段生命周期执行器，从文献理解到反驳的完整流程；3) SciDAG使用DAG形状的多智能体操作器和可重用的阶段特定模板增强困难技能；4) SciEvolve将用户、实验、审稿和外部环境的反馈信号转化为SciMem组织、SciFlow技能和SciDAG模板的版本化更新。
AI.result: AutoSci成为一个持久的科研环境，能够跨研究项目执行任务、记住科研进展、并持续进化。代码仓库已发布于https://github.com/skyllwt/AutoSci。
AI.conclusion: AutoSci提出了一种统一的以记忆为中心的智能体架构，成功整合了科学研究全生命周期所需的记忆管理、流程执行、技能增强和自我进化能力，为自动化科学研究系统提供了一个可行的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant. It focuses on automating the scientific research lifecycle using LLM-based agents (SciMem, SciFlow, SciDAG, SciEvolve) for tasks like literature review, experiment design, and manuscript writing. The application domain is AI/NLP research automation, not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. None of the methods (memory-centric agents, DAG-based multi-agent systems) or applications (research workflow automation) align with the research profile's focus on video-to-motion transfer, 3D motion geometry, diffusion models for motion synthesis, or temporal consistency in generated human motions.

title: DSD-GS: Dynamic-Static Decomposition of Gaussian Splatting for Efficient and High-Fidelity Dynamic Scene Reconstruction
summary: Dynamic scene reconstruction and novel view synthesis are fundamental to next-generation visual intelligence applications such as virtual reality, robotics, and digital twins. However, high-fidelity reconstruction of complex, time-varying scenes from arbitrary viewpoints remains a significant challenge. Existing dynamic 3DGS methods suffer from computational inefficiency, since they model all Gaussians as dynamic components. While recent decomposition-based approaches address this issue, they still struggle with degraded reconstruction quality and prolonged training time. To mitigate these limitations, we propose a novel dynamic reconstruction framework built upon an efficient static-dynamic decomposition strategy using a Feed-Forward Gaussian Splatting encoder and an optical flow model. By eliminating redundant computations on static regions, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing baselines across rendering quality, training and rendering speed, and storage efficiency. Notably, on the Neural 3D dataset, our framework requires only 10 minutes for training and achieves a rendering speed of over 700 FPS on a single NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU at resolution of 1352x1014. Furthermore, our decomposition strategy eliminates the need for COLMAP preprocessing and enables deterministic initialization, thereby enhancing both efficiency and reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于静态-动态分解策略的高效动态重建框架，结合前馈高斯散射编码器和光流模型，用于解决复杂时变场景的高质量重建问题。该方法通过消除静态区域的冗余计算，实现了在渲染质量、训练和渲染速度以及存储效率方面的最优性能。
AI.motivation: 动态场景重建和新视角合成是虚拟现实、机器人技术和数字孪生等下一代视觉智能应用的基础。从任意视点对复杂、时变场景进行高质量重建仍具挑战性。现有动态3DGS方法因将所有高斯建模为动态组件而存在计算效率问题。基于分解的方法虽解决了该问题，但在重建质量和训练时间方面仍表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖的动态重建框架，基于高效的静态-动态分解策略，使用前馈高斯散射编码器和光流模型。通过消除静态区域的冗余计算实现高效处理。
AI.result: 在Neural 3D数据集上，该框架仅需10分钟训练即可完成重建，在单张NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU上（分辨率1352x1014）达到超过700 FPS的渲染速度。分解策略消除了COLMAP预处理需求并实现确定性初始化，提高了效率和可重复性。在渲染质量、训练和渲染速度及存储效率方面均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过采用静态-动态分解策略结合前馈高斯散射编码器，本方法成功解决了动态场景重建中计算效率与质量之间的权衡问题。无需预先进行复杂预处理，实现了快速训练和高渲染速度，为实时视觉应用提供了可行的技术方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D Gaussian Splatting for dynamic scene reconstruction and new view synthesis - completely different application domain. The research profile targets text-to-motion generation (generating human motion from text descriptions), while this paper focuses on scene-level rendering/reconstruction. Even though both are in computer graphics, this is equivalent to needing human motion generation but getting image generation methods - they address entirely different problems. The target is for VR/robotics/digital twins scene rendering, not motion synthesis from text.

title: LinTree: Improving LLM Reasoning with Explicitly Structured Search Histories
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often solve reasoning problems by generating intermediate traces that explore and revise partial solutions. From a search perspective, these traces can be viewed as linearized search trees, where the model extends a partial solution, abandons it when it fails, and backtracks to try alternatives. Compared with traditional heuristic-guided search, such a policy has a potential advantage: it conditions on the whole search trace rather than only on the current local state. We first test whether LLMs utilize this advantage by comparing trace-conditioned reasoning policies against best-first search equipped with an LLM heuristic that only observes the current local state. Across three controlled reasoning environments, Blocks World, grid Navigation, and Sokoban, we find that raw access to search history alone is not enough to reliably outperform heuristic search. We then study one possible reason: in LLM reasoning traces, the underlying search tree is only implicitly represented, and when the model backtracks or switches branches, the trace does not explicitly identify which earlier search state is being revisited. We show that adding simple parent pointers to explicitly represent the linearized tree (LinTree) structure improves both task performance and search efficiency relative to implicit reasoning models and LLM-heuristic-guided search. These results suggest that search history becomes most useful when its tree structure is made explicit, motivating more structure-aware representations for LLM reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大语言模型在推理任务中的搜索策略，提出将搜索历史表示为线性化搜索树(LinTree)，通过添加显式父指针来改进LLM的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 传统启发式搜索仅观察当前局部状态，而LLM可以访问完整搜索轨迹。研究者想验证LLM是否能利用这一优势，以及为什么现有方法效果不佳。
AI.method: 在三个受控推理环境(Blocks World、grid Navigation、Sokoban)中比较两种策略：1)跟踪条件推理策略(访问完整搜索历史) 2)最佳优先搜索+LLM启发式(仅观察当前状态)
AI.result: 发现仅有搜索历史不足以可靠超越启发式搜索。原因是隐式搜索树中回溯或切换分支时没有明确标识返回的前序状态。添加显式父指针后，LinTree方法在任务性能和搜索效率上均优于隐式推理和LLM启发式搜索。
AI.conclusion: 搜索历史在树结构被显式表示时才最有用，这启示未来应开发更具结构感知能力的LLM推理表示方法。

The application domain is entirely different - it's about AI/LLM reasoning, not motion generation, video synthesis, or any computer graphics task. title: Foundation VAEs for 3D CT Reconstruction, Augmentation, and Generation
summary: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) compress high resolution CT volumes into compact latents while preserving clinically relevant structure. However, training CT-specific VAEs from scratch or heavily fine-tuning them incurs substantial computational and engineering cost, and often degrades under heterogeneous scanners, protocols, and diseases. This paper makes a progressive stride toward training-free medical VAEs by leveraging a critical observation: a single Foundation VAE, pretrained at scale on natural images and videos, can serve as a unified interface for CT Reconstruction, Augmentation, and Generation. With both encoder and decoder frozen, the Foundation VAE reconstructs CT volumes with preserved anatomy while suppressing acquisition noise; training segmentation models on these reconstructions improves surface accuracy by 3.9% NSD on average for pancreatic tumor and lung tumor. Within the same Foundation VAE latent space, a conditional latent diffusion model achieves 3.9% lower average FVD with 36.2% higher CT CLIP score, and improves multi-disease generation faithfulness across 18 types by 2.76% AUC. These results demonstrate Foundation VAEs as a practical interface for scalable CT representation reuse and faithful CT generation. Our code and demo are available at https://github.com/qic999/Foundation-VAE.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出一种无需训练的医学VAE框架，利用在自然图像和视频上预训练的基础VAE作为统一接口，实现CT重建、增强和生成任务。
AI.motivation: 针对CT特异性的VAE训练成本高且在不同扫描器、协议和疾病下性能下降的问题，探索利用大规模预训练模型进行医学图像处理的可能性。
AI.method: 冻结编码器和解码器，直接使用预训练的基础VAE进行CT重建；在同一潜在空间中训练条件潜在扩散模型进行CT生成。
AI.result: 重建后的分割模型在胰腺肿瘤和肺肿瘤上NSD平均提升3.9%；生成模型FVD降低3.9%，CT CLIP分数提高36.2%，18种疾病生成AUC提升2.76%。
AI.conclusion: 基础VAE可作为医学CT表示复用和忠实生成的实用接口，为训练-free医学成像提供新思路。

title: SteerFace: Debiasing Synthetic Face Generation via Adaptive Residue Perturbation
summary: The shortage of legally compliant data for face recognition training has sparked growing interest in using synthetic data as an alternative. While recent diffusion-based methods enable the generation of photorealistic face images with strong identity adherence and data diversity, their downstream recognition performance still exhibits a significant synthetic-real gap. This paper identifies visual tendency as a previously underexplored limitation, whereby synthetic data exhibit an unrealistic prevalence of visual attributes and thus deviate from the real-data distribution. Visual tendency can be attributed to the generator's conditioning on identity embeddings, through which co-occurring residual visual cues are unintentionally absorbed into learned identity semantics. To discourage the generator from exploiting such visual cues, this paper proposes SteerFace, a simple and efficient training framework that perturbs identity embeddings by steering them toward random orthogonal directions on the embedding hypersphere. The perturbation serves as an identity-preserving regularizer that penalizes the generator's reliance on non-identity components, as supported by theoretical analysis. This paper further introduces an adaptive strategy that learns perturbation strengths with both sample-wise preference and favorable overall statistics. Extensive experiments show that SteerFace effectively mitigates visual tendency, outperforms prior methods in downstream face recognition, and generalizes well across different training datasets and generation pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文针对人脸识别合成数据与真实数据之间存在的显著性能差距问题，提出视觉倾向这一新限制，并推出SteerFace训练框架来缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 人脸识别训练面临合法合规数据短缺的问题，学界尝试使用合成数据替代。虽然基于扩散的方法可以生成逼真的人脸图像，但下游识别性能仍存在明显的合成-真实差距。本文发现了之前未被充分探索的"视觉倾向"问题，即合成数据呈现出不切实际的视觉属性普遍性，从而偏离真实数据分布。
AI.method: 本文提出SteerFace框架，通过将身份嵌入引导到嵌入超球体上的随机正交方向来扰动身份嵌入。该扰动作为保持身份的正规化器，惩罚生成器对非身份成分的依赖。理论分析支持这一方法，并进一步引入自适应策略来学习扰动强度。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，SteerFace有效地缓解了视觉倾向问题，在下游人脸识别任务中优于先前方法，并且在不同的训练数据集和生成 pipeline 上表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SteerFace是一个简单高效的训练框架，能够在不损害身份保持的前提下，有效减少合成数据中的视觉倾向，缩小合成-真实差距，为合成数据在人脸识别训练中的应用提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. The research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion generation (3D human motion synthesis from text), while this paper is about synthetic face generation for face recognition. Even though both use diffusion models, face image synthesis and human motion generation are entirely different fields - one addresses computer vision/face recognition, the other addresses computer graphics/animation. None of the pain points (temporal consistency, text-motion alignment, 3D geometric cues from video) are addressed, and there is no methodological overlap in application.

title: MergeTok: Unified Continuous and Discrete Visual Tokenization via Token Merging
comment: 11 pages (main text), 7 figures. Preprint. Under review at NeurIPS 2026
summary: Most visual tokenizers for image generation are bifurcated into two families with complementary limitations: continuous VAEs offer high-fidelity reconstruction but suffer from dense, entangled latents that are poorly suited for semantic control, whereas discrete VQ-based models enable autoregressive generation yet struggle with gradient sparsity, unstable training, and codebook collapse. In this work, we introduce MergeTok, a unified tokenizer that jointly optimizes continuous (VAE) and discrete (VQ) tokenizers within a encoder-decoder architecture, leveraging token merging techniques as a semantic bridge. By clustering similar tokens during encoding, MergeTok establishes a structural prior that provides dual supervision signals: (i) it imposes merged-token semantic alignment in the VAE branch, regularizing its latent space toward disentangled, semantic-aware representations; (ii) it derives group-wise constraints, promoting intra-group diversity and inter-group exclusivity that stabilize VQ training. MergeTok shows competitive reconstruction and generation performance on ImageNet-256, with substantially lower rFID than strong VAE and VQ models under matched token budgets, while producing semantically-organized token representations compatible with both autoregressive and diffusion generators. This shows that a single architecture can endow visual tokenizers with robust semantic organization and generator-friendly discreteness.

AI.tldr: MergeTok提出了一种统一的图像分词器，通过结合连续的VAE和离散的VQ技术，并利用token聚类作为语义桥梁，同时解决了两类传统分词器的固有局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉分词器分为两大家族各有局限：连续VAE重建质量高但latent稠密且纠缠，难以进行语义控制；离散VQ模型支持自回归生成但存在梯度稀疏、训练不稳定和码本坍塌问题。现有方法无法同时实现高质量重建和语义组织。
AI.method: 在编码器-解码器架构中联合优化连续(VAE)和离散(VQ)分词器，利用token聚类技术作为语义桥。通过在编码阶段聚类相似token，建立结构先验提供双重监督信号：(i)在VAE分支施加合并token的语义对齐，将latent空间正则化为解耦的语义感知表示；(ii)导出组级约束，促进组内多样性和组间排他性以稳定VQ训练。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-256上展示具有竞争力的重建和生成性能，在相同token预算下相比强VAE和VQ模型获得显著更低的rFID，同时产生兼容自回归和扩散生成器的语义组织化token表示。
AI.conclusion: 单一架构可以为视觉分词器赋予稳健的语义组织和生成器友好的离散性，统一两类分词器的优势。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. The paper focuses on visual tokenization for IMAGE generation (ImageNet-256), while the research profile requires TEXT-TO-MOTION generation (3D human motion from text). Although both involve deep learning and tokenization, they are in fundamentally different application domains - image synthesis vs. human motion synthesis. The paper addresses image reconstruction quality and semantic organization for image generation, none of which relate to the motion generation pain points like temporal consistency, 3D geometry extraction, or text-motion alignment.

title: What Makes LVLMs Hallucinate Less? Unveiling the Architectural Factors Behind Hallucination Robustness
summary: Hallucination remains one of the key challenges undermining the reliability of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs). But what makes an LVLM hallucinate less? Many existing efforts focus on improving internal components of the model. We argue that hallucination fundamentally stems from how the model architecture is designed. To investigate this, we factor the architecture design into three dimensions: Linguistic Foundation (LF), Visual Representation (VR), and Semantic Alignment (SA), and categorize hallucinations into Co-occurrence, Similarity, and previously overlooked Uncertainty types. Building on this formulation, we propose CoSimUE, a benchmark that creates fine-grained hallucination scenarios through controlled textual perturbations and random perturbations, enabling mapping between design choices and hallucination behaviors. Experiments across 7 design aspects show that: 1) the widely emphasized scaling of model parameters has only limited impact on reducing all three types of hallucinations; 2) larger and better-trained language foundations can reduce co-occurrence hallucinations; 3) stronger visual encoders and higher resolutions mitigate similarity errors; 4) effective alignment strategies alleviate uncertainty hallucinations. 5) Furthermore, cross-dimensional analysis reveals that jointly enhancing visual fidelity and alignment quality yields the most comprehensive improvements. This study provides the first systematic exploration linking architecture-level design to hallucination robustness, offering practical guidance for developing reliable and efficient LVLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoSimUE基准测试，系统性地研究大型视觉语言模型(LVLMs)架构设计与幻觉行为之间的关系。通过将架构设计解构为语言基础、视觉表征和语义对齐三个维度，并分析三类幻觉(共现性、相似性、不确定性)，发现参数Scaling效果有限，更好的语言基础可减少共现幻觉，更强的视觉编码器和高分辨率可缓解相似性错误，有效的对齐策略可减轻不确定性幻觉，联合增强视觉保真度和对齐质量可获得最全面的改善。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型的幻觉问题严重影响其可靠性，现有研究多关注模型内部组件改进，而作者认为幻觉从根本上源于模型架构设计方式。缺乏系统性的架构设计与幻觉行为之间映射关系的研究。
AI.method: 提出CoSimUE基准，通过受控文本扰动和随机扰动创建细粒度幻觉场景。将架构设计分解为三个维度：语言基础(LF)、视觉表征(VR)、语义对齐(SA)；将幻觉分为三类：共现性、相似性和不确定性。实验覆盖7个设计方面。
AI.result: 1) 参数规模的Scaling对减少三类幻觉的效果有限；2) 更大更好的语言基础可减少共现性幻觉；3) 更强的视觉编码器和高分辨率可缓解相似性错误；4) 有效的对齐策略可减轻不确定性幻觉；5) 联合增强视觉保真度和对齐质量可获得最全面的改进。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次系统性探索架构级设计与幻觉鲁棒性关系的研究，为开发可靠高效的LVLMs提供了实践指导。表明单纯增大模型参数并非减少幻觉的有效途径，需要在语言基础、视觉表征和语义对齐三个维度协同优化。

relevance_reason: This paper studies hallucination robustness in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) for general vision-language tasks, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion domain. While the paper mentions semantic alignment and visual features, these concepts are used in the context of reducing hallucinations in image captioning/VQA tasks, not for text-to-motion generation or 3D motion geometry. The application domain is fundamentally different - this is about AI model reliability in multimodal understanding, not about generating or assessing 3D human motion. There is no connection to diffusion models for motion synthesis, temporal motion modeling, or video-to-motion knowledge transfer.

title: Attend to Evidence: Evidence-Anchored Spatial Attention Supervision for Multimodal RLVR
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) improves vision-language models (VLMs) by optimizing outcome rewards derived from final answers. However, such outcome-only rewards do not tell the model which image regions justify an answer. For questions that require visual grounding, these rewards cannot distinguish responses supported by relevant visual evidence from those produced by language-prior shortcuts or lucky guesses. We introduce EASE (Evidence-Anchored Spatial Attention), which augments multimodal RLVR with visual-evidence process supervision. EASE converts annotated evidence regions into a smoothed visual-token target and uses it to guide response-to-image attention during RL training, but only on high-reward trajectories. The annotations are used solely as privileged training labels, while inference requires only the original image and question. Across Qwen2.5-VL-7B, Qwen3-VL-4B, and Qwen3-VL-8B, EASE raises average scores over DAPO by 2.5 to 3.1 points on perception, hallucination, visual math, and multimodal reasoning benchmarks. Diagnostics and ablations show that EASE better aligns visual attention with annotated evidence regions.

AI.tldr: EASE是一种结合视觉证据过程监督的多模态强化学习方法,通过将注释的证据区域转换为平滑的视觉token目标来引导注意力,仅在高质量轨迹上使用,推理时不需要额外注释。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法的结果奖励无法区分基于相关视觉证据的正确回答和使用语言先验或猜测的错误回答,无法提供视觉接地信号。
AI.method: 将标注的证据区域转换为平滑的视觉token目标,在RL训练中使用来指导response-to-image注意力,仅应用于高奖励轨迹,推理时无需注释。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL-7B、Qwen3-VL-4B、Qwen3-VL-8B上,EASE比DAPO在感知、幻觉、视觉数学和多模态推理基准上平均提升2.5-3.1分。
AI.conclusion: EASE能更好地将视觉注意力与标注的证据区域对齐,为多模态RLVR提供了有效的视觉证据过程监督信号。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multimodal reinforcement learning for vision-language models (improving perception, hallucination detection, visual reasoning). It is NOT related to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. While the profile mentions "VLM for Quality Assessment," this is in the context of assessing generated motions, not improving VLMs for general visual understanding tasks. The application domain is completely different - this is about LLM/VLM training, not 3D human motion generation. No mention of diffusion models, motion synthesis, temporal modeling, or any computer graphics techniques.

title: DiTTo: Scalable Order-aware All-in-One Image Restoration Agent
comment: Please visit our project page at https://cmlab-korea.github.io/DiTTo/
summary: Real-world images rarely suffer from a single degradation, and the order in which degradations are removed substantially affects the final restoration quality, motivating agent-based image restoration (IR), where a vision-language model schedules a pool of pre-built restoration-experts. However, existing training-based agents require $\mathcal{O}((N^{\mathbf{D}})^{2})$ restoration-expert calls per image to construct the Optimal Restoration-action Trajectory Dataset (ORTD), where $N^{\mathbf{D}}$ denotes the number of degradation types in the universe $\mathbf{D}$, and couple agent training to a fixed restoration-expert pool, preventing extension to newly introduced restoration-experts without full retraining. To overcome these efficiency and extensibility bottlenecks, we propose \textbf{DiTTo}, a novel order-aware image restoration agent framework consisting of the DiTTo Simulator and the DiTTo Agent. The DiTTo Simulator combines $\cup$S-IR for single-step restoration-action simulation and AiO-IQA for per-action quality prediction, reducing ORTD construction to $\mathcal{O}(N^{\mathbf{D}})$ simulator calls per image; the DiTTo Agent is trained by SFT on the simulator-generated ORTD, followed by \textbf{Order-aware Restoration Alignment (ORA)} that aligns degradation identification, restoration-action-ordering, and output format along independent axes. This enables \textbf{plug-and-play scalable extensibility}: adding a new restoration-expert requires updating only the lightweight ORA stage. On the MiO-100 evaluation set with up to five concurrent degradations, our DiTTo Agent achieves state-of-the-art multi-degradation restoration quality among previous agent-based IR methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiTTo框架，一种基于序贯感知的多退化图像修复智能体系统，通过创新的模拟器和序贯对齐技术解决传统方法中计算效率低和可扩展性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现实图像通常包含多种退化，且退化移除顺序显著影响最终修复质量。现有训练式智能体需要O((N^D)^2)次专家调用构建最优修复轨迹数据集，且无法扩展到新引入的修复专家而不进行完整重训练。
AI.method: DiTTo框架包含两部分：(1) DiTTo Simulator，结合∪S-IR进行单步修复动作模拟和AiO-IQA进行每动作质量预测，将ORTD构建从O((N^D)^2)降至O(N^D)；(2) DiTTo Agent，通过SFT在模拟器生成的ORTD上训练，然后使用序贯对齐(ORA)将退化识别、修复动作排序和输出格式沿独立轴对齐，实现即插即用的可扩展性。
AI.result: 在最多包含五种并发退化的MiO-100评估集上，DiTTo Agent在多退化修复质量方面优于此前的智能体式图像修复方法。
AI.conclusion: DiTTo框架实现了高效且可扩展的多退化图像修复，仅需更新轻量级ORA阶段即可添加新修复专家，为实际应用中的动态退化修复需求提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about Image Restoration - fixing degraded images using diffusion models and quality assessment for images. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion generation - creating 3D human motion from text or video. These are fundamentally different fields: computer graphics/motion synthesis vs image processing. Even though both may use diffusion models, the application domain is entirely different (image restoration vs human motion generation). The pain points are also unrelated - this paper doesn't address any motion generation challenges like temporal consistency, video-to-3D geometry, or text-motion alignment.

title: MultiAct: Text-to-Motion Generation from Composite Text via Tailored Attention Guidance
comment: Accepted to SIGGRAPH 2026 conference. Project page: https://natsala13.github.io/multiact.github.io
summary: Text-to-motion generation has progressed rapidly in recent years, offering an expressive interface for animation and human-computer interaction. However, current models remain brittle when handling prompts that describe multiple actions occurring at the same time. Rather than realizing all components of a composite description, models frequently prioritize a single dominant action and neglect the rest, leading to incomplete or ambiguous motion. We present MultiAct, an unpaired, inference-time framework for compositional text-to-motion synthesis that operates directly on pretrained motion generators without retraining or architectural modification. Our method counteracts semantic collapse by adaptively amplifying cross-attention scores associated with underrepresented prompt components. We note that effective modulation depends on prompt-specific choices, such as which tokens and layers to target, and introduce a lightweight auxiliary decision scheme that determines the most effective attention-strengthening parametrization. Extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations demonstrate that MultiAct consistently outperforms existing baselines on composite prompts, achieving improved semantic coverage while preserving motion realism. Project page: https://natsala13.github.io/multiact.github.io.

AI.tldr: MultiAct是一个无需重新训练的组合式文本到动作合成推理框架，通过自适应增强被忽略的提示词成分的交叉注意力分数，解决现有模型处理多重同时动作描述时的语义崩溃问题。
AI.motivation: 当前文本到动作生成模型在处理描述多个同时发生的动作时表现脆弱，模型通常优先考虑单一主导动作而忽略其余部分，导致动作不完整或模糊。需要一种方法让模型能够完整实现复合动作描述中的所有成分。
AI.method: MultiAct是一个非配对的推理时间框架，直接在预训练的动作生成器上运行，无需重新训练或修改架构。该方法通过自适应放大与被低估提示词成分相关的交叉注意力分数来对抗语义崩溃。引入了一个轻量级的辅助决策方案来确定最有效的注意力增强参数化。
AI.result: 广泛的定量和定性评估表明，MultiAct在复合提示词上始终优于现有基线方法，在保持动作真实性的同时实现了更好的语义覆盖。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种无需重新训练的有效方法来增强文本到动作模型的组合理解能力，为动画和人机交互提供了更富有表现力的界面。

relevance_reason: While this paper IS in the Text-to-Motion domain (matching the general field), it addresses a different problem - handling composite text prompts with multiple simultaneous actions through attention guidance. It does not address the key pain points mentioned in the profile: (1) No cross-domain knowledge transfer from 2D video to 3D motion geometry, (2) No VLM-based quality assessment, (3) No extraction of 3D geometric cues from 2D video priors. The methods are also different - this uses attention guidance on pre-trained models rather than Video Generation Models or VLMs for 3D motion extraction. It's moderately relevant as it's in the same general domain but doesn't target the specific challenges outlined in the research profile.

title: Variational Adapter for Cross-modal Similarity Representation
comment: Accepted by the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: The core of vision-language models lies in measuring cross-modal similarity within a unified representation space. However, most image-text matching or multi-class image classification datasets lack fine-grained cross-modal matching annotations, forcing the continuous similarity space into binary classification boundaries. This compression induces false negative samples and significantly impairs the generalization performance of cross-modal tasks. While prior research has attempted to mitigate this by modeling intra-modal ambiguity, it often overlooks inherent annotation flaws, leading to suboptimal uncertainty allocation. To address these challenges, we propose a Variational Adapter for Cross-modal Similarity Representation (VACSR). This approach reformulates image-text matching with fine-grained semantic scarcity as a variational inference problem. It constructs a latent space for cross-modal similarity and uses regularization techniques to mitigate overfitting to binary annotations. Experiments on image-text retrieval, domain generalization, and base-to-novel generalization demonstrate the proposed method's effectiveness and robust generalization ability.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为VACSR的变分适配器方法,将图像-文本匹配中的细粒度语义稀缺问题重新表述为变分推理问题,通过构建跨模态相似度的潜空间和正则化技术来缓解对二值标注的过拟合,从而提升跨模态任务的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图像-文本匹配数据集缺乏细粒度跨模态匹配标注,迫使连续的相似度空间被压缩为二分类边界,导致假负样本产生并严重损害跨模态任务的泛化性能,而先前的研究往往忽视标注文本身存在的缺陷。
AI.method: 提出VACSR(跨模态相似度表示的变分适配器),将图像-文本匹配问题建模为变分推理问题,构建跨模态相似度的潜在空间,并使用正则化技术来缓解对二值标注的过拟合。
AI.result: 在图像-文本检索、域泛化和基到新类别泛化任务上的实验表明了该方法的有效性和鲁棒的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过变分推断框架处理细粒度语义稀缺问题,为跨模态相似度学习提供了一种新的思路,能够更好地处理标注不完善情况下的跨模态匹配任务。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain. The paper addresses image-text matching/retrieval (for cross-modal similarity representation) rather than Text-to-Motion generation. While it touches on semantic alignment between text and visual modalities, this is about image-text retrieval, not generating 3D human motion from text descriptions. The paper uses variational inference and adapters for cross-modal similarity tasks, which is fundamentally different from diffusion models for motion synthesis or 3D motion generation. It addresses some general domain generalization concepts but doesn't relate to the specific pain points of computer graphics/motion generation like temporal consistency, 3D geometry extraction, or quality assessment for motion.

title: Omni-Supervised Motion Editing: Balancing Change and Invariance through Positive-Negative Learning
summary: Text-based human motion editing aims to modify existing motion sequences according to natural language instructions while maintaining the consistency of the original motion. Existing diffusion-based approaches often rely on heuristic similarity cues or coarse global conditioning, leading to motion distortion and suboptimal semantic alignment. The key challenge lies in balancing change (i.e. precisely editing target regions) and invariance (i.e. preserving unedited parts). To handle such challenge, we propose an Omni-Supervised Positive-Negative Learning framework, named OmniME. Our method integrates three complementary components: (1) retrospective feature supervision that enforces coarse-to-fine consistency across transformer layers,(2) motion preservation mechanism that focuses on subtle variations according to the source-target similarity, and (3) triplet-based semantic alignment that strengthens text-motion correspondence. Together, these components form a unified supervision paradigm that balances change and invariance. Extensive experiments on the MotionFix and STANCE Adjustment datasets demonstrate that OmniME achieves state-of-the-art performance in editing alignment, validating the effectiveness of our unified learning framework. Our source codes and models have been released at: https://github.com/rocket-ycyer/OmniME.git

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmniME框架，解决文本驱动动作编辑中平衡"变化"与"不变性"的挑战，通过三种互补监督组件实现高质量动作编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散方法依赖启发式相似度线索或粗粒度全局条件，导致动作失真和语义对齐不佳，难以同时实现精确编辑目标区域并保留未编辑部分。
AI.method: 提出Omni-Supervised Positive-Negative Learning框架(OmniME)，包含：(1)回溯特征监督在transformer层间实施粗到细的一致性；(2)动作保持机制根据源-目标相似度聚焦细微变化；(3)三元组语义对齐增强文本-动作对应关系。
AI.result: 在MotionFix和STANCE Adjustment数据集上实验表明，OmniME在编辑对齐方面达到最先进性能，验证了统一学习框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合三种互补监督组件形成统一监督范式，成功平衡了动作编辑中的变化与不变性，为文本驱动动作编辑提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper directly addresses Text-to-Motion in Computer Graphics (text-driven motion editing), which matches the core application domain. It tackles semantic alignment between text and motion, which aligns with one of the pain points. However, it misses several key aspects: no VLM-based supervision (a major pain point), no cross-domain 2D video to 3D geometry transfer, doesn't address limited training data, and doesn't use the specific methods mentioned (video generation models, VLMs for assessment, diffusion models for motion synthesis). The approach uses positive-negative learning rather than diffusion-based motion synthesis. It's highly relevant to motion editing but less so to the broader research profile focusing on video-to-3D motion and VLM supervision.

title: Can BEV Perception Gracefully Degrade under Sensor Failures?
summary: Despite the remarkable success of multi-modal bird's-eye view (BEV) perception in autonomous driving, current systems exhibit a critical vulnerability: existing fusion mechanisms are highly brittle to sensor corruptions, often causing catastrophic performance degradation. This vulnerability largely stems from the fact that standard fusion frameworks typically integrate multi-modal representations in a static manner, leading to a precipitous performance collapse under missing or corrupted modalities. In contrast, we show that graceful degradation is achievable through active modality reliability assessment. To this end, we present Grace-BEV, a lightweight and plug-and-play framework that enforces active reliability awareness during multi-modal fusion. Instead of relying on computationally expensive cross-modal interactions, Grace-BEV leverages the aligned BEV space to explicitly assess modality trustworthiness via a TrustGate Router and dynamically recalibrate feature integration using the FailSafe Fusion Block. Furthermore, we devise a Three-Phase Training strategy with Modality Dropout to prevent modality dominance and encourage balanced cross-modal learning under unreliable inputs. Extensive experiments on nuScenes-R and nuScenes-C show that Grace-BEV maintains robust performance across diverse corruption settings. Notably, under catastrophic LiDAR failures where standard baselines collapse to 0.0% mean Average Precision (mAP), Grace-BEV restores performance to as high as 34.7% mAP. Moreover, it improves clean accuracy by up to 1.4%, achieving a strong trade-off between robustness and efficiency.

AI.tldr: Grace-BEV是一种轻量级的即插即用框架，专注于多模态BEV感知中的主动可靠性评估，实现传感器损坏情况下的优雅降级。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态BEV感知系统对传感器损坏高度敏感，现有的静态融合机制导致模态缺失时性能急剧下降，甚至崩溃至0%mAP。
AI.method: 提出三种核心方法：(1)TrustGateRouter在BEV空间评估模态可信度；(2)FailSafeFusion动态校准特征融合；(3)Three-PhaseTraining配合ModalityDropout防止模态主导。
AI.result: 在nuScenes-R和nuScenes-C上，LiDAR完全失效时baseline降至0%mAP，而Grace-BEV恢复至34.7%mAP；干净数据精度提升1.4%。
AI.conclusion: Grace-BEV在鲁棒性与效率间取得良好权衡，以轻量即插设计实现各种损坏场景下的稳健性能。

relevance_reason: Complete domain mismatch. This paper is about BEV perception for autonomous driving/sensor systems dealing with LiDAR-camera fusion and graceful degradation under sensor failures. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating human motions from text). While both mention "modalities," that's where any similarity ends. The application domain (autonomous driving vs. human motion generation), methods (BEV perception vs. diffusion/motion transformers), and problem space (sensor fault tolerance vs. text-to-motion synthesis) are completely different. This is essentially a paper about self-driving car perception systems, which has no relevance to someone working on generating human animations from text.

title: Generating Reports or Repeating Templates? Measuring and Mitigating Template Collapse in 3D CT Report Generation
summary: Modern 3D medical vision-language models (VLMs) can generate fluent radiology-style text while exhibit critically low pathology detection and output diversity, collapsing to generic templates that under-report rare yet critical findings. We identify this failure mode as Template Collapse. This failure stems from the unique constraints of 3D medical imaging, e.g., limited data, severe label imbalance, and weak signals from volumetric encoders. Under these constraints, text-generation objectives encourage shortcut learning and fluent but weakly grounded reports. We systematically diagnose the Template Collapse through clinical fidelity, output diversity, normal-template bias, and rare-finding survival. To mitigate it, we propose CLarGen, a decoupled framework that separates what to say (clinical detection) from how to say it (language synthesis). CLarGen uses (i) a Latent Query Transformer for multi-label pathology detection, (ii) pathology-guided retrieval for clinically matched exemplars, and (iii) a medical language model to synthesize the final report from detected findings and retrieved context. Across state-of-the-art 3D CT report generation baselines, CLarGen mitigates Template Collapse and substantially improves clinical accuracy (macro-F1 0.487 vs. 0.189; CRG 0.472 vs. 0.368) while maintaining fluent reporting. Our results suggest that explicit, measurable clinical grounding is essential for template-collapse-resistant 3D CT report generation. Code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出了3D医学视觉语言模型(VLM)在CT报告生成中的"模板崩溃"(Template Collapse)问题，即模型生成流畅但缺乏病理检测能力的通用模板报告，并设计了CLarGen框架通过解耦检测与合成来缓解这一问题。
AI.motivation: 解决现代3D医学VLM在CT报告生成中虽然能产生流畅的放射学文本，但病理检测能力极低、输出多样性不足的问题，该问题被称为"模板崩溃"，表现为生成通用模板而遗漏罕见但关键的发现。
AI.method: 提出CLarGen框架，将"说什么"(临床检测)与"怎么说"(语言合成)解耦。包括：(1)多标签病理检测的潜在查询Transformer；(2)基于病理引导的检索以获取临床匹配的示例；(3)医学语言模型根据检测到的发现和检索到的上下文合成最终报告。
AI.result: CLarGen在 macro-F1 (0.487 vs 0.189) 和 CRG (0.472 vs 0.368) 上显著提升临床准确性，同时保持流畅的报告生成，有效缓解了模板崩溃问题。
AI.conclusion: 明确的、可测量的临床基础对于抵抗模板崩溃的3D CT报告生成至关重要，未来需要进一步关注临床接地气的评估指标。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about Medical CT report generation (clinical pathology detection from medical scans), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating human character motions from text). Although both involve Vision-Language Models, the medical domain (radiology report generation) is entirely separate from computer graphics and motion synthesis. Template collapse in medical reporting is unrelated to temporal consistency, motion quality assessment, or any text-to-motion problems in computer graphics.

title: Benchmarking Single-Step Inpainting Methods for Multi-Object 3D Gaussian Splatting Scenes
comment: Accepted as an extended abstract to the CVEU Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: The tasks of object removal and inpainting 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) scenes face challenges such as 3D consistency across camera views. In comparing 2D inpainters and their suitability for the 3D domain, we find that reconstruction-based inpainters outperform generative diffusion models in 3D consistency. Integrating these 2D inpainters into different single-step methods for creating and finetuning 3DGS scenes, our results indicate that initializing the scene from scratch produces higher quality results than finetuning the existing scene. Using a state-of-the-art generative 2D inpainter, we create a straightforward baseline to underline the importance of object removal before inpainting in the 3D setting. Since 360° datasets rarely include real-world ground truths, and challenging occlusion scenarios are equally sparse, we introduce a novel multi-object scene with recorded ground truth data and many views with object occlusions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了3D Gaussian Splatting场景中的对象移除和修复问题，比较了重建型与生成型修复器，并提出新的多目标场景数据集。
AI.motivation: 3D场景中对象移除面临视图间3D一致性的挑战，现有360°数据集缺乏真实 ground truth 和充分的遮挡场景。
AI.method: 集成2D修复器到单步方法中进行3DGS场景创建和微调，比较了重建基修复器与生成扩散模型，从头初始化与微调现有场景两种方式。
AI.result: 重建基修复器在3D一致性上优于生成扩散模型；从头初始化比微调现有场景效果更好；引入带ground truth的新多目标场景数据集。
AI.conclusion: 对于3DGS场景修复，重建基方法和从头初始化是更优的选择，建议在3D修复前进行对象移除，并需要包含充分遮挡场景的新型数据集。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的论文。研究的领域是3D Gaussian Splatting场景中的对象移除和修复（对象编辑），而研究profile需要的是Text-to-Motion（文本生成人体动作）。两者应用领域完全不同：前者是静态3D场景编辑，后者是动态人体运动生成。虽然该论文也使用了扩散模型进行生成，但用于图像修复而非动作合成。该论文完全没有涉及文本到动作的对齐、时间一致性 motion generation、或从视频中提取motion信息等核心研究问题。

title: PEEK: Picking Essential frames via Efficient Knowledge distillation
summary: Video-language models can process only a limited number of frames, making frame selection a key bottleneck for efficient video captioning. Most captioning pipelines still rely on uniform sampling, which is computationally cheap but agnostic to visual content. Adaptive frame sampling has recently emerged as a promising approach for selecting the most informative frames from a video; however, existing methods remain computationally expensive. We introduce PEEK, an efficient dynamic frame sampling method that distills caption-conditioned frame relevance rankings from a stronger teacher model into a lightweight temporal model that operates only on visual content. We find that, overall, on ActivityNet Captions and MSR-VTT, our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods across all evaluated downstream vision language models, especially when only one or two frames are selected for captioning, obtaining the best CIDEr for most frame budgets. On ActivityNet Captions, PEEK is particularly strong, winning 14 out of 16 configurations. Zero-shot evaluation on MSR-VTT shows that our model transfers best at low frame budgets, while results at four and eight frames are more mixed as temporal coverage and visual diversity become increasingly competitive. Compared with recent adaptive baselines, PEEK is both more accurate in the low-budget regime and more efficient: it adds only $5.2\%$ to the captioning time, compared with $65.4\%$ for CSTA and $211.9\%$ for MaxInfo. We release our code and pre-trained checkpoint at https://github.com/momentslab/peek.

AI.tldr: PEEK是一种高效的视频动态帧采样方法，通过将强教师模型中基于标题的帧相关性排名蒸馏到轻量级时间模型中，用于视频字幕生成。该方法在仅选择1-2帧的低预算场景下表现尤为突出。
AI.motivation: 视频语言模型只能处理有限的帧数，使得帧选择成为高效视频字幕生成的瓶颈。现有统一采样方法计算成本低但忽略视觉内容，已有的自适应帧采样方法计算成本较高。
AI.method: PEEK将强教师模型中 caption-conditioned 的帧相关性排名蒸馏到一个轻量级时间模型中，该模型仅基于视觉内容运行，无需title信息即可判断帧的重要性。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet Captions和MSR-VTT数据集上，PEEK在所有评估的下游视觉语言模型中均优于最新方法，尤其是在仅选择1或2帧时获得最佳CIDEr评分。在ActivityNet Captions上赢得16种配置中的14种。计算效率上仅增加5.2%的字幕时间，而CSTA增加65.4%，MaxInfo增加211.9%。
AI.conclusion: PEEK是一种计算高效且准确的自适应帧采样方法，在低帧预算场景下尤其有效，能够以极低的计算开销实现最佳的视频字幕效果。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain entirely. This paper addresses video captioning (generating text descriptions FROM video frames), which is the opposite direction of the research profile's text-to-motion task (generating 3D motion FROM text). While both involve temporal modeling, video understanding/captioning is fundamentally different from computer graphics motion synthesis. Even though VLMs are mentioned, they're used here for frame selection in video understanding, not for motion quality assessment or text-motion semantic alignment in 3D motion generation.

title: SlotMemory: Object-Centric KV Memory for Streaming Long-Video Generation
summary: Streaming video generation models typically rely on temporal-centric memory, which organizes historical context as raw frames, chunk segments, or unclustered tokens. This organization frequently leads to identity drift and semantic inconsistency when entities exit the frame or during interactive prompt transitions. To address these limitations, we propose SlotMemory, an object-centric Key-Value memory mechanism for streaming video diffusion. Our approach shifts the memory abstraction from "when" an event occurred to "what" is being represented by decomposing the transformer's key-value manifold into discrete, reusable semantic slots. By utilizing these slots as routing addresses to index and store high-fidelity key-value tokens, we enable entity-level persistence and prompt-aware retrieval across long horizons. Evaluated on 60-second interactive narratives using the Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B backbone, SlotMemory achieves a state-of-the-art quality score of 81.61 and a 22.8 percent relative improvement in dynamic consistency over the strongest existing streaming baseline. Our results demonstrate that structured semantic representation, rather than raw temporal capacity, is the essential primitive for persistent long-form video synthesis. Our codes and checkpoints are available at https://tj12323.github.io/SlotMemory/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SlotMemory，一种用于流媒体视频扩散模型的对象中心Key-Value内存机制，通过将Transformer的键值流形分解为离散的语义槽来解决视频生成中的身份漂移和语义不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 现有流媒体视频生成模型依赖时间中心内存（如原始帧、片段或未聚类令牌），在实体离开画面或交互提示转换时常导致身份漂移和语义不一致，缺乏有效的长程一致性保持机制。
AI.method: 提出SlotMemory方法，将内存抽象从"何时发生"转变为"表征什么"，具体包括：1)将Transformer的键值流形分解为离散可重用的语义槽；2)利用这些槽作为路由地址索引存储高保真键值令牌；3)实现跨长时域的实体级持久化和提示感知检索。
AI.result: 在Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B backbone上对60秒交互式叙事进行评估，SlotMemory达到81.61的质量分数，在动态一致性方面相比最强基线提升22.8%。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明结构化语义表示而非原始时间容量是持久长形式视频合成的关键基础，这为下一代流媒体视频生成提供了新的设计思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Text-to-Video generation (2D video frames), NOT Text-to-Motion generation (3D human skeletal motion). While it uses diffusion models and addresses temporal consistency - which are relevant method categories - the application domain is fundamentally different. The research profile is focused on generating 3D motion geometry from text, while this paper generates 2D video content. Video generation ≠ Motion generation despite superficial similarities in using diffusion architectures.

title: GGT-100K: Generative Ground Truth for Generalizable Real-World Image Restoration
summary: Real-world image restoration (IR) is bottlenecked by the scarcity of high-quality paired training data. Synthetic datasets are abundant but often fail to model real-world degradations, while real-world paired datasets are expensive and difficult to capture. As a result, IR models trained on these datasets show limited generalization in real-world scenarios. In this work, we propose Generative Ground Truth (GGT) by using generative multimodal foundation models (MFMs) to produce high-quality (HQ) targets from real-world low-quality (LQ) images. We first conduct a systematic evaluation of nine state-of-the-art MFMs, including Nano-Banana-2 and GPT-Image-2, on images of various scenes and degradation types. The results demonstrate that Nano-Banana-2 with VLM-based adaptive prompting shows the highest capability to synthesize perceptually realistic and content-faithful HQ targets, which can serve as the GGT for the LQ input. We then employ Nano-Banana-2 to build a GGT synthesis pipeline, which involves multi-stage quality control to ensure data reliability, and construct GGT-100K, an LQ-HQ paired dataset comprising 103,707 training pairs and covering diverse scenes and complex real-world degradations. A test set of 500 image pairs is also established. Extensive experiments show that GGT-100K consistently improves the real-world generalization of a wide range of IR models, with particularly strong benefits for finetuning generative models for IR tasks. Our results suggest that MFMs can serve as practical tools for restoration-oriented data generation, and GGT-100K is a useful resource to expand the generalization boundaries of real-world IR models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出生成式真实标签（GGT）方法，利用多模态基础模型（MFMs）从真实世界低质量图像合成高质量目标，构建了GGT-100K数据集（103,707对训练数据），显著提升了图像恢复模型在真实场景中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 真实世界的图像恢复任务受限于高质量成对训练数据的稀缺性。合成数据集虽丰富但无法准确建模真实退化，真实成对数据集获取成本高且困难，导致现有IR模型在真实场景中的泛化能力有限。
AI.method: 1）系统评估9种先进的多模态基础模型（包括Nano-Banana-2和GPT-Image-2）在不同场景和退化类型图像上的表现；2）筛选出基于VLM自适应提示的Nano-Banana-2作为最佳模型；3）建立多阶段质量控制的GGT合成流程；4）构建包含103,707对训练样本和500对测试样本的GGT-100K数据集。
AI.result: Nano-Banana-2具有最高的感知真实性和内容保真度合成能力。GGT-100K数据集能持续提升多种IR模型的真实世界泛化性能，对生成式IR模型的微调效果尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: 多模态基础模型可作为恢复导向数据生成的实用工具，GGT-100K是扩展真实世界IR模型泛化边界的有效资源。

relevance_reason: 完全不同的应用领域。该论文是关于图像修复(Image Restoration)的，使用多模态基础模型来生成合成训练数据以提升图像恢复效果。而研究档案需要的是文本到动作(Text-to-Motion)的生成，涉及3D人体动作合成、时序一致性、视频到动作的几何迁移等。虽然两者都可能用到扩散模型，但应用领域完全不同：一个是2D图像增强，一个是3D人体动作生成。这是计算机图形学中两个差距极大的子领域。

title: Does Visual Information Play a Decisive Role in Vision-Language-Action Model Driving Behavior?
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated promising capability in autonomous driving, highlighting the potential of unified multimodal architectures for jointly modeling perception and planning. However, how current VLA-based driving behavior is grounded in visual information remains poorly understood. Existing evaluation protocols mainly focus on aggregate performance metrics, lacking structured and practical diagnostics to quantify visual-behavior dependency. In this work, we introduce a structured multi-level visual perturbation framework to analyze visual-behavior dependency in VLA-based driving models systematically. The framework organizes controlled visual perturbations along three complementary dimensions: channellevel degradation, information-level disruption, and structurelevel modification. We apply it to VLA-based driving systems and evaluate behavioral responses under both open-loop trajectory prediction and interactive closed-loop safety evaluation. Experimental results reveal evaluation-dependent dependency patterns and uneven visual grounding across abstraction levels. These findings call for more structured analyses and principled design of VLA driving models to better understand how visual information shapes behavior and develop safer, more robust systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个结构化的多层次视觉扰动框架，用于分析VLA（视觉-语言-动作）自动驾驶模型中的视觉-行为依赖关系。该框架从通道级退化、信息级破坏和结构级修改三个维度对视觉输入进行可控扰动，并在开环轨迹预测和闭环安全评估两种场景下评估模型的行为响应。实验结果揭示了不同评估方式下的依赖模式差异以及不同抽象层级上的视觉接地不均匀现象。
AI.motivation: 当前VLA模型在自动驾驶领域展现出良好的感知与规划统一建模潜力，但研究界对VLA驾驶行为如何依赖于视觉信息的理解仍然不足。现有评估协议主要关注整体性能指标，缺乏结构化且实用的诊断方法来量化视觉-行为依赖关系。这导致无法深入理解视觉信息如何具体影响驾驶决策，阻碍了更安全、更稳健的VLA驾驶系统的开发。
AI.method: 研究者设计了一个结构化的多层次视觉扰动框架，从三个互补维度对输入视觉信息进行系统性扰动：1)通道级退化（如颜色通道、亮度等）；2)信息级破坏（如遮挡、噪声注入等）；3)结构级修改（如几何变换、语义变化等）。该框架被应用于多个VLA自动驾驶系统，分别在开环轨迹预测任务和交互式闭环安全评估任务中测试模型的行为响应，记录并分析其对视觉扰动的敏感程度和依赖模式。
AI.result: 实验结果揭示了两个关键发现：1)依赖模式具有评估依赖性——同一个VLA模型在不同评估范式（开环 vs 闭环）下表现出显著不同的视觉依赖特征；2)视觉接地在不同抽象层级上呈现不均匀性——模型对某些视觉特征的依赖过强而对其他特征的利用不足。这些发现表明现有的VLA驾驶模型在视觉信息处理和利用方面存在结构性问题，需要更精细的分析和设计方法。
AI.conclusion: 本研究强调需要对VLA自动驾驶模型进行更加结构化的分析，理解视觉信息如何具体塑造驾驶行为。未来研究应着重于：1)采用多维度、多层次的系统评估框架；2)设计更加均衡和稳健的视觉接地机制；3)开发更安全的VLA驾驶系统以应对复杂的真实驾驶场景。这将为构建更可靠、更可解释的自动驾驶视觉理解系统奠定基础。

relevance_reason: COMPLETE MISMATCH IN APPLICATION DOMAIN. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating human body motions from text descriptions), while this paper is about Autonomous Driving (VLA models for vehicle navigation and control). Although both mention "Vision-Language-Action" models, the application domains are entirely different: one generates human motions for animation/computer graphics, the other controls vehicle driving behavior. This is like comparing diffusion for image generation vs diffusion for human motion generation - they are different fields despite superficial method similarities. The paper does not address any of the pain points related to text-to-motion generation, 3D human motion geometry, or motion quality assessment.

title: Rethinking Efficient Crack Segmentation with Task-Aligned Structural-Directional Modeling
summary: Recent crack segmentation methods often follow generic semantic segmentation designs, using stronger backbones, hybrid CNN-Transformer-Mamba encoders, and auxiliary enhancement branches. Although effective, this raises whether stronger generic feature mixing is the most suitable direction for crack segmentation. We instead formulate crack segmentation as sparse structural recovery. Cracks have limited category-level semantics but strong morphological regularities, being thin, sparse, anisotropic, locally fragmented, and easily confused with textures or shadows. Thus, the key bottleneck lies in preserving weak structural evidence, recovering directional continuity, and suppressing background coupling. We propose RIFT, a compact family of morphology-aligned crack segmentation models. Rather than compressing a complex generic architecture, RIFT is simple by design, preserving local evidence, aggregating cooperative directional continuity, and restoring crack structures through lightweight multi-scale fusion. Experiments on four public benchmarks show that RIFT achieves the best or tied-best results across the 16 main metrics against reproduced representative baselines. RIFT-B gives the strongest overall accuracy, while RIFT-T provides the best deployment efficiency with only 0.47M parameters and high inference speed. Topology-aware evaluation, ablations, transfer experiments, and visualizations further verify that task-aligned simplicity can match or surpass complex hybrid architectures when its inductive bias fits crack morphology. Code: https://github.com/xauat-liushipeng/RIFT

AI.tldr: 将裂纹分割重新定义为稀疏结构恢复问题，而不是使用复杂的通用语义分割架构。
AI.motivation: 裂纹具有有限的类别语义但具有强烈的形态规律（薄、稀疏、各向异性、局部断裂、易与纹理混淆），现有复杂架构可能导致过拟合，而关键瓶颈在于保留弱结构证据、恢复方向连续性和抑制背景耦合。
AI.method: 提出RIFT，一个紧凑的形态学对齐裂纹分割模型家族。简单设计，保留局部证据，聚合协作方向连续性，通过轻量级多尺度融合恢复裂纹结构。
AI.result: 在四个公共基准数据集上，RIFT在16个主要指标中达到最佳或并列最佳结果。RIFT-B提供最强整体精度，RIFT-T仅用0.47M参数实现最佳部署效率和高推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 当模型的归纳偏置符合裂纹形态时任务对齐的简单性可以匹配或超越复杂的混合架构。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about crack segmentation in civil engineering/materials science (detecting cracks in concrete, roads, infrastructure), which is entirely different from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion generation. While both involve computer vision, the application domains are completely different: civil structural health monitoring vs. generating human motion from text descriptions. The paper does not address any of the listed pain points (temporal consistency, semantic text-motion alignment, 3D motion geometry extraction, VLM-based supervision) and uses segmentation techniques rather than motion generation methods.

title: Redefining Instance Matching: A Unified Framework for Part-Aware Matching in Panoptic Segmentation Evaluation
summary: The Panoptic Quality (PQ) metric is the standard for jointly evaluating instance and semantic segmentation. However, its original definition relies on a One-to-One matching between predicted and ground truth segments, which is only straightforward when the IoU threshold exceeds 0.5. Below 0.5, multiple matching strategies emerge in a poorly explored problem space. We systematically elucidate this space by recasting segment matching as a constrained bipartite assignment problem. Independently bounding the prediction- and ground-truth-side degrees yields four matching strategies: One-to-One, Many-to-One, One-to-Many, and Many-to-Many. We show that the first three are well-defined within the PQ framework, while Many-to-Many falls outside it. These strategies become relevant when instances are fragmented, adjacent objects are difficult to delineate, or annotations are noisy. Central to our framework is a vertex-based accounting of TP, FN, and FP, anchored to ground truth and predicted segments rather than to matching edges. We further show that the framework extends naturally to part-aware panoptic segmentation, and we explore part-aware evaluation on biomedical data. Across configurable case studies we report how different combinations of thresholds and matching strategies behave in practice. We release a unified open-source package built on Panoptica. It exposes Voronoi-based region-wise analysis, part-aware evaluation, and Area Under Threshold Curve computations as configurable options.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了Panoptic Quality(PQ)度量在低IoU阈值下的多匹配策略问题，将分段匹配重新表述为约束的二分图分配问题，提出了四种匹配策略并扩展到part-aware panoptic分割。
AI.motivation: 原始PQ定义依赖One-to-One匹配，仅在IoU阈值超过0.5时straightforward。低于0.5时多种匹配策略出现，但这一问题空间尚未被系统探索。
AI.method: 将分段匹配重新概念化为约束的二分图assignment问题，独立bounding预测端和真值端的度数，产生四种匹配策略：One-to-One、Many-to-One、One-to-Many和Many-to-Many。核心是基于vertex而非matching edges来account TP、FN、FP。
AI.result: 前三种匹配策略在PQ框架内明确定义，Many-to-Many落在框架外。这些策略在实例碎片化、相邻物体难以划分或标注噪声时变得相关。框架可自然扩展到part-aware panoptic分割，并在生物医学数据上进行了验证。
AI.conclusion: 发布了一个基于Panoptica的统一开源包，提供Voronoi区域分析、part-aware评估和Area Under Threshold Curve计算作为可配置选项。

relevance_reason: This paper is about panoptic segmentation evaluation in computer vision - specifically addressing how to match predicted object segments to ground truth at low IoU thresholds. The application domain is completely unrelated to Text-to-Motion generation. While it mentions "matching" strategies, this is segmentation matching for evaluating image segmentation quality, not motion generation or synthesis. The paper focuses on part-aware panoptic segmentation metrics, instance fragmentation, and biomedical applications - nothing related to human motion generation, video-to-motion transfer, diffusion models for motion synthesis, or any of the specified methods in the research profile.

title: LVSA: Training-Free Sparse Attention for Long Video Diffusion
summary: Dense self-attention is the compute and quality bottleneck of long-video diffusion inference: cost grows quadratically with the sequence length, and beyond the training horizon the model converges to near-static output, that is, "frozen" repetitive video. State of the art approaches are either too costly, e.g., they require retraining, or fail to satisfy both performance and quality objectives in a scalable manner. To this end, we introduce Long Video Sparse Attention (LVSA), a training-free model-agnostic block-sparse attention for video diffusion transformers that combines a structured window pattern with rotating global anchors, thus removing the fixed-grid bias which causes long-range temporal artifacts. LVSA, combined with a FlashInfer kernel, reduces compute up to 3.17x on Wan 2.1 1.3B at a 6x horizon, 2.98x on Wan 2.1 14B at a 6x horizon, and 3.33x on HunyuanVideo 1.5 at a 1.5x horizon, compared to dense attention. Beyond reducing compute, LVSA enables HunyuanVideo 1.5 generation at a 2x horizon, which is otherwise out-of-memory on a single GPU. Moreover, LVSA provides speedups up to 2.41x compared to RIFLEx and 3.27x compared to UltraViCo on Wan 2.1 1.3B. To demonstrate applicability across diverse platforms, we apply LVSA on NPUs and achieve speedups up to 2.71x on Wan 2.2 A14B and 3.24x on Wan 2.1 1.3B compared to dense attention. To evaluate quality in a fair way, we introduce VQeval, a tool properly scoring loopy video failures, which instead are rewarded in state of the art evaluators like VBench-Long. LVSA is quality-neutral for generation at training horizon length and quality-positive at extended lengths.

AI.tldr: LVSA是一种无需训练、模型无关的块稀疏注意力机制，用于解决长视频扩散推理中密集注意力的计算瓶颈和质量退化问题，通过结构化窗口模式结合旋转全局锚点消除固定网格偏差。
AI.motivation: 密集自注意力是长视频扩散推理的计算和质量瓶颈：成本随序列长度二次增长，且超出训练视野后模型收敛到近乎静态的输出（冻结重复视频）。现有SOTA方法要么需要重训成本过高，无法同时满足性能和可扩展性要求。
AI.method: 提出Long Video Sparse Attention（LVSA）：一种训练free、模型无关的块稀疏注意力，结合结构化窗口模式与旋转全局锚点，消除导致长时间伪影的固定网格偏差。联合FlashInfer内核使用。
AI.result: Wan 2.1 1.3B上6倍视野减少3.17x计算，Wan 2.1 14B上6倍视野减少2.98x，HunyuanVideo 1.5上1.5倍视野减少3.33x。相比RIFLEx加速2.41x，UltraViCo加速3.27x。NPUs上Wan 2.2 A14B加速2.71x，Wan 2.1 1.3B加速3.24x。还能实现HunyuanVideo 1.5在2倍视野生成（单GPU原本OOM）。引入VQeval工具公平评估质量。
AI.conclusion: LVSA在训练视野长度上质量neutral，在扩展视野长度上quality-positive，是首个能同时实现显著计算加速、内存效率和无质量损失的视频扩散transformer稀疏注意力方案。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain. The paper is about 2D VIDEO generation (long video diffusion optimization), while the research profile is about TEXT-TO-MOTION for 3D human motion generation in Computer Graphics. Although both use diffusion models, video generation (creating 2D pixel sequences) and motion generation (creating 3D joint angle sequences) are completely different application domains. The paper uses sparse attention to speed up video generation inference - it does not address any motion-specific pain points like extracting 3D geometry from 2D, semantic text-to-motion alignment, or temporal motion coherence. Only shares general methodological theme (diffusion) but targets entirely different output modality.

title: FOCUS: Forcing In-Context Object Localization through Visual Support Constraints and Policy Optimization
summary: In-context localization (ICL) seeks to localize a target object specified by a small set of support examples in a query image, operating on the fly without training or parameter updates. Despite rapid advances in vision-language models (VLMs), achieving category-agnostic and visually grounded ICL remains an open problem, even though it is essential for applications such as image editing, personalized visual search, and retrieval. Existing methods are fragile and rely on explicit category supervision, which not only limits applicability in realistic settings with unnamed or instance-specific objects but also introduces category bias that steers predictions toward semantic priors rather than visual evidence. We introduce a two-stage training framework that explicitly optimizes in-context attention between support bounding boxes and query images without category supervision. We further refine localization via reinforcement learning using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to directly minimize localization error. This formulation enforces visual correspondence over semantic priors, yielding robust instance-level localization. Empirically, a 7B-parameter model trained with our objectives outperforms models up to 72B parameters, demonstrating that context-aware localization objectives can surpass scaling alone. Comprehensive ablations validate the contribution of each component.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于上下文定位的两阶段训练框架,通过无类别监督的方式实现实例级视觉定位,并使用强化学习(GRPO)直接优化定位误差,在7B参数模型上超越72B参数模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖显式类别监督,存在类别偏差,且无法处理未命名或实例特定对象。需要在没有类别先验的情况下实现真正的视觉对应定位。
AI.method: 两阶段训练框架:(1)明确优化支持边界框与查询图像之间的上下文注意力,无需类别监督;(2)通过群体相对策略优化(GRPO)进行强化学习微调,直接最小化定位误差。
AI.result: 7B参数模型使用本方法后，性能超越最大72B参数的模型，表明上下文感知的定位目标可以超越单纯的规模扩展。
AI.conclusion: 通过强制视觉对应而非语义先验,实现了鲁棒的实例级定位,为图像编辑、个性化视觉搜索等应用提供了新方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about visual object localization using in-context learning and reinforcement learning (GRPO), which is a computer vision task unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. While it shares some surface-level methodological elements like visual feature extraction, the application domain is completely different - it's about detecting and localizing objects in images, not generating 3D human motion from text. The pain points and goals are entirely misaligned with the research profile.

title: HQ-JEPA: Hybrid Quantum Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture for Cross-Modal Remote Sensing Representation Learning
summary: We introduce HQ-JEPA, a hybrid quantum-classical joint-embedding predictive architecture for cross-modal remote sensing representation learning. The proposed framework extends JEPA-style masked latent prediction to paired Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 imagery by predicting masked target representations from visible context regions while aligning heterogeneous modality features in a shared embedding space. To improve representation quality, HQ-JEPA combines four complementary objectives: latent token prediction, cross-modal token alignment, SIGReg-based Gaussian regularization in the fused latent space, and a differentiable SWAP-test-based Fidelity Quantum Similarity (FQS) loss. Unlike pixel reconstruction methods, HQ-JEPA learns semantic representations directly in latent space and uses quantum state-overlap-based similarity as an additional regularization signal. We evaluate the pretrained encoder on GeoBench classification and segmentation tasks under linear probing and fine-tuning settings. Results show that HQ-JEPA achieves competitive and often superior performance over strong self-supervised and remote sensing foundation-model baselines, demonstrating the benefit of integrating predictive self-supervision, cross-modal geometric regularization, and quantum fidelity-based representation learning for remote sensing applications.

AI.tldr: HQ-JEPA是一种用于跨模态遥感表示学习的混合量子-经典联合嵌入预测架构,通过掩码潜变量预测实现Sentinel-1和Sentinel-2图像的互表示学习,并引入量子保真度相似性作为正则化信号。
AI.motivation: 遥感领域需要从多源卫星数据(Sentinel-1雷达与Sentinel-2光学)中学习有效的跨模态语义表示,传统方法难以同时处理异构模态特征并保持表征质量,因此需要一种融合量子计算优势的创新框架来提升表示学习效果。
AI.method: 提出四目标联合优化框架:(1)掩码token预测,(2)跨模态token对齐,(3)SIGReg高斯正则化,(4)基于SWAP测试的可微量子保真度损失(FQS);在共享潜在空间中进行几何正则化和量子状态重叠相似度度量。
AI.result: 在GeoBench分类和分割任务上,经线性探测和微调评估,HQ-JEPA实现了与最强自监督和遥感基础模型基线相当或更优的性能,证明了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 整合预测自监督、跨模态几何正则化和量子保真度表示学习的混合架构能够有效提升遥感应用的表示质量,为多源卫星数据协同学习提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about remote sensing/satellite imagery (Sentinel-1 radar and Sentinel-2 optical) using quantum computing methods for cross-modal representation learning. The research profile requires Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text). These are entirely different fields with no overlap - remote sensing has nothing to do with human motion generation or computer graphics. Even though both involve "cross-modal" learning, the application domains are completely unrelated.

title: Towards Effective Long-Video Event Prediction via Multi-Level Event Semantics Mining
summary: Accurately predicting future events is fundamental to content understanding and decision-making across various domains. While prior research has primarily focused on text or short-video scenarios, long-video event prediction, characterized by vast multimodal context and more complex narratives, remains underexplored. Meanwhile, although recent Long-Video Language Models (LVLMs), built on Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs), have shown promise in long-video question answering and summarization, they struggle to generalize to event prediction, as they can neither precisely extract event-related details nor perform fine-grained analysis of event development. To address this gap, we propose VISTA, a multi-level event semantics mining framework for long-video event prediction. Initially, VISTA applies a character-centric visual prompt to precisely extract event-related visual details, enhancing detail-level semantics; subsequently, it employs a knowledge-enhanced iterative retrieval strategy, guiding the LLM to progressively construct logically coherent event chains, thereby improving event-level narratives; ultimately, VISTA adopts a human-like propose-then-retrieve strategy to generate diverse future-oriented proposals and integrate multi-level clues, producing robust and accurate predictions. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets validate the effectiveness of VISTA for long-video event prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VISTA，一个用于长视频事件预测的多层次事件语义挖掘框架，解决现有长视频语言模型在事件预测任务上泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 长视频事件预测具有多模态上下文和复杂叙事结构，目前研究不足。现有基于LLM和VLM构建的长视频问答和摘要模型无法精确提取事件相关细节或进行细粒度的事件发展分析，缺乏事件预测能力。
AI.method: VISTA采用三阶段方法：1) 角色中心视觉提示提取事件相关视觉细节，增强细节级语义；2) 知识增强迭代检索策略引导LLM逐步构建逻辑连贯的事件链，改善事件级叙事；3) 类人提出-检索策略生成多样化未来导向提案并整合多层次线索，产生鲁棒准确的预测。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据集上进行了广泛实验，验证了VISTA对长视频事件预测的有效性。
AI.conclusion: VISTA框架能够有效处理长视频事件预测任务，通过多层次语义挖掘策略提升了预测的准确性和鲁棒性。

relevance_reason: While this paper discusses video analysis and temporal modeling, it focuses on LONG-VIDEO EVENT PREDICTION in the computer vision/NLP domain, which is fundamentally different from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. The paper deals with predicting events in video sequences (understanding what's going to happen), not generating 3D human motion from text. Core application domain mismatch: this is video understanding/comprehension, not motion generation or synthesis. Some overlap in temporal modeling concepts, but the goal, methods, and application are entirely different. Limited to no relevance for text-to-motion research.

title: Probing Collision Grounding in Vision-Language Models for Safe Human-Robot Collaboration
summary: Safe human--robot collaboration requires more than visual description: a monitor must determine whether the robot body is safely separated, already colliding with the scene or a person, or about to collide. We call this capability collision grounding: binding visual observations to robot body geometry, camera viewpoint, scene layout, human proximity, and temporal motion in order to infer present and imminent contact. We introduce TouchSafeBench, a physics-grounded benchmark for evaluating collision grounding in vision-language models (VLMs). Built in Habitat~3.0, TouchSafeBench contains 2,940 simulated indoor co-presence episodes across social navigation and social rearrangement, with synchronized multi-view RGB-D observations, top-down trajectory maps, calibrated camera metadata, and simulator-derived contact labels. We study two deployment-facing tasks: classifying the current safety state and warning about imminent collision before contact. Across three frontier or robotics-oriented VLMs and nine visual representations, current models remain far from reliable: the best average Macro-F1 stays below 50\%, explicit depth is not automatically transformed into robot-body collision evidence, and robot--scene contact is consistently harder than human-contact risk. TouchSafeBench reveals a central limitation of embodied VLMs: visual fluency does not imply physical accountability. Reliable robot safety monitors will need representations that explicitly bind viewpoint, robot morphology, metric geometry, and future collision. We will release the benchmark upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TouchSafeBench，一个用于评估视觉语言模型(VLMs)在人机协作中碰撞检测能力的基准测试。该基准包含2,940个模拟室内共处场景，涵盖社会导航和社会重排任务。
AI.motivation: 安全的人机协作不仅需要视觉描述，还需要判断机器人身体是否安全分离、已经发生碰撞或即将发生碰撞。作者称这种能力为"碰撞接地"(collision grounding)，即绑定视觉观察与机器人身体几何、相机视角、场景布局、人体接近度和时间运动，以推断当前和即将发生的接触。
AI.method: 在Habitat 3.0中构建了TouchSafeBench基准，包含2,940个模拟室内共处 episodes，涵盖社会导航和社会重排场景，具有同步的多视角RGB-D观测、俯视轨迹图、校准的相机元数据和模拟器导出的接触标签。研究两个面向部署的任务：分类当前安全状态和预警即将发生的碰撞。评估了三个前沿/机器人导向的VLM和九种视觉表示。
AI.result: 当前模型仍远未达到可靠水平：最佳平均Macro-F1低于50%，显式深度不会自动转化为机器人身体碰撞证据，机器人-场景接触识别始终比人体接触风险识别更难。
AI.conclusion: TouchSafeBench揭示了具身VLMs的核心局限性：视觉流利性不等于物理可问责性。可靠的机器人安全监控器需要明确绑定视角、机器人形态、度量几何和未来碰撞的表示。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. Research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating human motion from text), while this paper is about Vision-Language Models for collision detection in human-robot collaboration (robotics safety). Although both use VLMs, the primary focus—text-to-motion generation for computer graphics—is entirely unrelated to robot collision grounding. Robot motion generation is NOT the same as human motion generation, and this paper addresses robot safety rather than motion synthesis.

title: Benchmarking and Enhancing Text-to-Image Models for Generating Visual Representations in Early Arithmetic Education
summary: AI systems are increasingly used to support educational content creation, yet it remains unclear whether they can generate outputs that faithfully represent the pedagogical concepts they are intended to teach. Thus, we introduce equation-to-visual generation, a task that, in contrast to conventional image generation, requires producing pedagogically meaningful visuals from arithmetic equations while precisely preserving their numerical and relational structure. Informed by interviews with teachers and an analysis of educational materials, we construct E2V-Bench, a benchmark spanning four pedagogically grounded visual types, along with automatic metrics for evaluating visual correctness. Our evaluation reveals that recent text-to-image (T2I) models frequently fail on this task, with errors dominated by incorrect object counts and broken relational structure. Building on this, we explore benchmark-guided enhancement strategies. These strategies improve representative models, while the remaining gap calls for stronger numerical and relational grounding in future T2I models.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了方程-视觉生成（equation-to-visual generation, E2V）任务，旨在让AI系统根据算术方程生成具有教学意义的视觉内容，同时精确保持数值和关系结构。为此构建了E2V-Bench基准，包含四种基于教学的视觉类型及其自动评估指标。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统在教育内容创作中的广泛应用，目前尚不清楚这些系统是否能够生成准确表达教学概念的输出。现有图像生成模型在将数学方程转化为教学可视化方面存在明显不足，需要系统性地评估和提升这一能力。
AI.method: 通过教师访谈和教育材料分析，确定了四种具有教学意义的视觉类型；构建了E2V-Bench基准数据集；开发了视觉正确性自动评估指标；对当前主流的文本到图像（T2I）模型进行了系统性评测；探索了基准引导的增强策略。
AI.result: 当前T2I模型在该任务上频繁失败，主要错误包括：对象数量不准确和关系结构缺失。基准引导的增强策略对部分模型有所改善，但仍存在显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 未来T2I模型需要更强的数值和关系 grounding 能力，以更好地支持教育内容生成任务。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper focuses on Text-to-Image generation for early arithmetic education (educational visualization), whereas the research profile expects Text-to-Motion generation (3D human motion synthesis). Generating 2D images of mathematical equations has no overlap with generating 3D human motion from text descriptions. Even though both papers involve "text-to" tasks, image generation and motion generation are fundamentally different application domains in computer graphics. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points related to motion generation, temporal consistency, VLM-based supervision for motion quality, or extracting 3D geometric cues from video.

title: Beyond Classification: Dynamic Adapter Routing for Continual Multimodal Retrieval
summary: While retrieval is a core function of vision-language models, continually updating these models for retrieval tasks remains critically underexplored. Existing work often approaches continual retrieval through the lens of class-incremental learning (CIL), evaluating both standard CIL methods and retrieval-oriented adaptations in settings that may not fully capture the retrieval-specific dynamics. To address this, we introduce a new, principled evaluation framework for continual multimodal retrieval (CMR) spanning diverse visual domains, and systematically evaluate common approaches within this setting. Our empirical analysis shows that standard CIL methods fail to yield meaningful gains in our more challenging scenario. Therefore, we propose Dynamic Adapter Routing (DAR), a novel approach based on adapters selected through prototype-based routing and combined via model merging.DAR achieves superior performance over the previous baselines and demonstrates strong generalization under out-of-distribution evaluation. Our results highlights the unique challenges of CMR and encourages further research in this direction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出持续多模态检索(CMR)的新评估框架，并针对该任务设计动态适配器路由(DAR)方法，结合原型路由选择适配器和模型合并技术。
AI.motivation: 检索是视觉语言模型的核心功能，但如何持续更新检索模型仍未被充分探索。现有研究通过类别增量学习视角评估，无法完全捕捉检索任务的独特动态。
AI.method: 构建了跨不同视觉领域的CMR评估框架；提出DAR方法，基于原型进行适配器路由选择，并通过模型合并整合多个适配器。
AI.result: 标准CIL方法在挑战性场景中无法带来有意义提升；DAR方法优于基线方法，并在分布外评估中展现出强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 结果突出了CMR任务的独特挑战，为该领域的后续研究提供了新的方向和有效方法。

relevance_reason: The paper is about Continual Multimodal Retrieval - an information retrieval task using vision-language models for classification/routing - which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. While both use vision-language models, the application domains are entirely different: this paper focuses on retrieval and adapter routing for visual recognition tasks, not 3D motion generation, video-to-motion transfer, or any computer graphics applications. The pain points, methods (motion synthesis, diffusion for motion, temporal modeling), and overall research goals have zero overlap.
