Our method utilizes a hybrid 3D VAE to compress sparse truncated unsigned distance function grids into a compact latent space, paired with a latent Diffusion Transformer that denoises this representation to recover the complete scene. We condition the generation on geometry foundation models, leveraging rich spatial priors for robust reasoning. Unlike existing methods limited by per-ray constraints or unstructured point-cloud queries, VolFill provides a structured representation that supports direct surface extraction and occupancy queries at scale. Extensive experiments on the SCRREAM and NRGB-D datasets demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms current baselines, providing a robust foundation for holistic spatial understanding.

AI.tldr: VolFill是一个用于从单张RGB图像重建完整3D场景的生成式框架，通过混合3D VAE压缩稀疏截断无符号距离场并结合潜在扩散Transformer去噪，在几何Foundation模型的条件下实现鲁棒的场景-complete推理。
AI.motivation: 从单张RGB图像重建完整场景几何仍然具有挑战性，尤其是在可见证据不完整的区域（隐藏结构）。现有方法受限于每光线约束或非结构化点云查询，无法提供支持大规模表面提取和占用查询的结构化表示。
AI.method: 采用混合3D VAE将稀疏截断无符号距离函数（TSDF）网格压缩到紧凑的潜在空间，然后使用潜在扩散Transformer（Latent Diffusion Transformer）对该表示进行去噪以恢复完整场景。以几何Foundation模型为条件，利用丰富的空间先验进行推理。
AI.result: 在SCRREAM和NRGB-D数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法显著优于当前基线方法，提供了强大的整体空间理解基础。
AI.conclusion: VolFill能够提供结构化表示，支持直接表面提取和大规模占用查询，为整体空间理解提供了鲁棒的基础。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain. While VolFill uses diffusion models (similar methodology), it focuses on 3D SCENE reconstruction from single RGB images (static geometry completion), NOT text-to-motion generation. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating human body movements from textual descriptions), which is fundamentally different from 3D scene reconstruction. This paper addresses geometric scene completion, not temporal human motion synthesis, semantic text-alignment, or VLM-based motion quality assessment.

title: Enhancing Computer Vision Model Generalization in Warehouse Facilities: A Case Study on Anomaly Detection in Vertical Material Handling Systems
comment: 6 pages, 10 figures. Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Mechatronics and Automation (ICMA) 2026
summary: Deploying computer vision models in Warehouse Facilities traditionally requires extensive resources for camera mounting, image collection, annotation, training, and deployment - a process often needing repetition in each new environment due to camera mounting constraints and environmental variability. This paper explores an innovative approach to streamline this process by conducting the standard procedure solely in a laboratory setting, focusing on vertical material handling systems and anomaly detection in forks of the systems. Through extensive experimentation, we have found that combining optimal camera placement, strategic image triggering, careful model selection and model ensemble enables effective generalization from laboratory conditions to diverse warehouse facilities environments, potentially transforming warehouse automation implementation by simplifying warehouse facilities deployment to just camera mounting, image collection, and model deployment, thereby saving significant resources and time typically spent on image annotation and model retraining. This is an experimental research study and not a production deployment.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种创新的仓库计算机视觉模型部署方法，通过在实验室环境中完成标准流程（包括相机放置、图像触发、模型选择和集成），实现了模型从实验室到实际仓库环境的有效泛化，从而简化了仓库自动化部署流程，节省资源和时间。
AI.motivation: 传统仓库计算机视觉部署需要大量资源，包括相机安装、图像收集、注释、训练和部署，且每个新环境都需要重复该过程。本研究旨在探索一种方法，仅在实验室完成标准流程，即可泛化到实际仓库环境，解决资源消耗大和重复工作的问题。
AI.method: 通过结合最佳相机放置位置、战略性图像触发机制、谨慎的模型选择以及模型集成技术，在实验室环境中针对垂直物料处理系统和叉子异常检测进行系统研究和实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明所提出的综合方法能够实现从实验室条件到多样化仓库设施环境的有效泛化，仅需简单步骤（相机安装、图像收集、模型部署）即可完成部署。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有望变革仓库自动化实施，显著简化部署流程并节省资源。但作者指出这是实验性研究，非生产部署，实际应用仍需进一步验证。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. Research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text descriptions). The paper is about Computer Vision for warehouse anomaly detection (industrial CV for material handling systems). While both involve computer vision, the goals are entirely different - one generates human motion for graphics, the other performs anomaly detection in logistics. No overlap in application domain, methods, or research goals.

title: How can embedding models bind concepts?
summary: Humans easily determine which color belongs to which shape in multi-object scenes, an ability known as concept binding. Vision-language embedding models such as CLIP struggle with binding: they recognize individual concepts but fail to represent which concepts form which objects. Although CLIP behaves like a bag-of-concepts model in cross-modal retrieval, object information is recoverable from its image and text embeddings separately. We study this tension through the binding function, which maps concepts to scene embeddings. We find that scene embeddings decompose additively into object representations, explaining why uni-modal probes can recover object information. However, CLIP's binding function is high-complexity, which likely prevents the image and text encoders from learning a shared binding mechanism that generalizes to unseen concept combinations. We then ask whether this limitation is fundamental. We show that it is not. In controlled transformer models trained from scratch, binding generalization emerges with sufficient data coverage. These models learn low-complexity binding functions characterized by multiplicative interactions between concepts, enabling systematic generalization. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/oshapio/binding-concepts-complexity.

AI.tldr: 研究视觉语言模型（如CLIP）在多对象场景中进行概念绑定（确定颜色对应哪个形状）的能力。研究发现：虽然CLIP的图像和文本嵌入可以分别恢复对象信息，但其绑定函数复杂度高，难以泛化到未见过的概念组合。然而，通过从头训练的受控Transformer模型，当数据覆盖充分时，可以学习低复杂度的乘法绑定函数，实现系统性泛化。
AI.motivation: 解决视觉语言模型的概念绑定问题。CLIP等模型能识别单个概念，但无法表示哪些概念组成哪个对象，在跨模态检索中表现为"词袋"模型，无法泛化到新的概念组合。
AI.method: 通过绑定函数分析：将概念映射到场景嵌入。研究CLIP的绑定函数复杂度；训练受控Transformer模型进行对比实验；分析加性分解特性和乘法交互作用。
AI.result: CLIP的场景嵌入可加性分解为对象表示，单模态探针可恢复对象信息。但CLIP绑定函数复杂度高，阻止泛化。而受控Transformer模型在充分数据覆盖下学会低复杂度的乘法绑定函数，实现系统性泛化。
AI.conclusion: CLIP的绑定局限性并非基础性缺陷。通过适当训练数据，受控Transformer模型可学习低复杂度绑定函数，实现跨模态泛化。这表明概念绑定的泛化问题是可解决的。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. This paper studies how vision-language models (CLIP) perform concept binding in image understanding - determining which color corresponds to which shape. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion generation - synthesizing human motion from text. While both involve embeddings/concepts, the applications are entirely different: VLM concept binding vs. motion generation have no overlap in methods or goals.

title: Internalizing Temporal Consistency in Video Object-Centric Learning without Explicit Regularization
summary: Video Object-Centric Learning (OCL) aims to represent objects as \textit{slot} vectors and maintain their consistency across frames. Slot-Slot Contrastive (SSC) loss has become the cornerstone for state-of-the-art (SOTA) video OCL methods. While highly effective, SSC relies on one-to-one object correspondence across frames and introduces an extra loss. Following Occam's Razor, we propose a paradigm shift: temporal consistency is better enforced as an implicit model design rather than an explicit loss. To elegantly exclude SSC (\textbf{xSSC}), we introduce two quasi-zero-overhead synergistic mechanisms: (\textit{i}) Chrono-Channel Decomposition (CCD) structurally disentangles slot representations along the channel dimension into \textit{static} and \textit{dynamic} sub-spaces, serving as an empirically unified information bottleneck; (\textit{ii}) Cross-Temporal Reconstruction (CTR) stochastically reconstructs target features of either the current or previous time step by fusing current slots' static channels and target slots' dynamic channels, using a single standard OCL decoder with minor training adaptation. Thereby, the slot sets inherently learn temporal consistency by minimizing the standard reconstruction error alone. Extensive experiments show that integrating xSSC into leading baselines not only improves training efficiency but also establishes new SOTAs on video object discovery and recognition tasks. Furthermore, our PCA and gradient analyses confirm that objects' time-invariant semantics and time-variant kinematics are encoded into the proposed sub-spaces. Our source code, model checkpoints and training logs are provided on https://github.com/Genera1Z/xSSC.

AI.tldr: 视频对象中心学习(OCL)通过slot向量表示对象并在帧间保持一致性。现有方法依赖Slot-Slot Contrastive (SSC)损失函数，但需要帧间对象一一对应。本文提出xSSC方法，通过两种零开销机制将时序一致性隐式编码：1)Chrono-Channel Decomposition (CCD)将slot表示分解为静态和动态子空间；2)Cross-Temporal Reconstruction (CTR)通过重建融合实现时序一致性的自监督学习。
AI.motivation: SSC损失依赖帧间对象的一一对应关系，且引入额外监督信号。作者遵循奥卡姆剃刀原则，认为时序一致性应作为隐式模型设计而非显式损失来实现，从而提高训练效率并简化模型。
AI.method: 提出两种协同机制：(1)CCD将slot表示沿通道维度解耦为静态子空间和动态子空间，作为信息瓶颈；(2)CTR使用标准OCL解码器，通过融合当前slot的静态通道和目标slot的动态通道，随机重建当前或前一时间步的目标特征，仅通过标准重建误差学习时序一致性。
AI.result: 集成xSSC到领先基线模型后，在视频对象发现和识别任务上建立新的state-of-the-art，同时提高训练效率。PCA和梯度分析证实对象的时不变语义和时变运动学分别编码到所提的子空间中。
AI.conclusion: xSSC成功证明了时序一致性可以作为隐式模型设计被学习，无需显式的对比损失。这一范式转变不仅简化了训练流程，还通过CCD和CTR两种零开销机制提升了性能，为视频对象中心学习提供了更优雅的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about video object-centric learning (OCL) for unsupervised object discovery in videos, which is a computer vision task focused on learning slot-based representations. While it deals with temporal consistency, this is completely different from the research profile's Application Domain of Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. The paper does not address 3D motion generation, text-to-motion synthesis, diffusion models for motion, or any computer graphics application. It uses slot decomposition and reconstruction methods for video understanding rather than motion generation or geometry extraction from 2D video priors.

title: Automated Prediction of Postoperative Pancreatic Fistula Using Preoperative Computed Tomography
summary: Postoperative pancreatic fistula (POPF) is a serious complication after pancreatic resection, increasing morbidity, hospital stay, and healthcare costs. We present an automatic, end-to-end deep learning pipeline-from pancreatic segmentation to classification-for preoperative POPF risk estimation and stratification using preoperative CT scans. A data set with auto-segmented pancreas volumes and surgical outcomes was used to evaluate multiple architectures, including a custom lightweight 3D CNN baseline (CNN3D), R(2+1)D ResNet-18, and ResNet-MC3-18 models. Evaluation across multiple 3D architectures demonstrated promising predictive performance. This approach offers a clinically valuable tool and a methodological benchmark for pancreas-specific CT classification, supporting improved preoperative decision-making in pancreatic surgery.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种端到端的深度学习pipeline，用于术前基于CT影像预测胰腺切除术后胰瘘(POPF)风险。研究测试了CNN3D、R(2+1)D ResNet-18和ResNet-MC3-18等多种3D CNN架构，在自动分割的胰腺体积数据集上评估，显示出了良好的预测性能，为胰腺手术的术前决策提供了有价值的工具和方法学基准。
AI.motivation: 胰腺术后胰瘘(POPF)是胰腺切除术后最严重的并发症之一，会显著增加患者发病率、住院时间和医疗费用。目前缺乏有效的术前预测方法来识别高风险患者，因此需要开发一种自动化、准确的术前风险评估工具来改善外科手术决策。
AI.method: 研究团队构建了一个端到端的深度学习流程，包括：(1)使用自动分割方法从术前CT扫描中提取胰腺体积；(2)训练多种3D CNN架构进行分类预测。具体测试的模型包括：自定义轻量级3D CNN(CNN3D)、R(2+1)D ResNet-18和ResNet-MC3-18。模型的输入为术前CT图像，输出为POPF风险分层结果。
AI.result: 研究结果显示，多种3D架构都展现出了有前景的预测性能，表明基于术前CT的深度学习方法可以有效预测POPF风险。该方法为胰腺特异性CT分类提供了一个临床上有价值的工具和方法学基准。
AI.conclusion: 基于术前CT的深度学习方法有望成为胰腺手术前风险评估的有效工具，可帮助外科医生在术前识别高POPF风险患者，从而优化手术决策和患者管理。未来仍需进一步验证模型的可推广性和临床实用性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical computing/computer vision for pancreatic CT scan analysis to predict surgical outcomes. It has NO relevance to the Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion field. While it mentions 3D CNNs, this is for classifying medical CT images (medical imaging domain), not for generating 3D human motion. The application domain is entirely different - healthcare/medical diagnosis vs computer graphics motion generation. There is no text-to-motion, video-to-motion, or any motion synthesis involved.

title: EGOSTREAM: A Diagnostic Benchmark for Streaming Episodic Memory in Egocentric Vision
summary: Continuous episodic memory is a core capability for autonomous agents operating in dynamic, real-world environments, yet current streaming video benchmarks provide limited tools for diagnosing what models remember and for how long. We introduce \egostream, a diagnostic benchmark for streaming episodic memory evaluation in egocentric vision. \egostream organizes 2,250 curated questions along seven cognitive dimensions: detail, spatial, temporal, event, social, causal, and prospective memory. We introduce the Answer Validity Window (AVW), which specifies the temporal span an answer remains valid as the observed scene evolves. This allows us to expand the questions into 8,528 recall-conditioned evaluations, enabling controlled testing from instant to ultra-long-term recall while separating genuine model forgetting from natural world-state changes. We rigorously establish baseline performance through a unified streaming MLLM framework that compares several state-of-the-art memory-management mechanisms, covering sliding windows, attention sinks, KV-cache pruning, merging, and offloading. Experiments within a unified Qwen3-VL backbone reveal that comparable aggregate accuracies mask starkly different memory profiles. For instance, token pruning preserves fine-grained details and temporal structure significantly better than token merging, while quantized offloading rescues ultra-long-term recall. Ultimately, all mechanisms operate well below real-time (>1s per frame), and top performing methods ceil at about 45\% accuracy, exposing critical gaps in current architectures. \egostream provides the diagnostic testbed needed to close these gaps.

AI.tldr: 提出了EGOSTREAM，一个用于自我中心视觉中流式情景记忆评估的诊断基准，包含2250个涵盖七个认知维度的问题，并引入答案有效性窗口(AVW)将问题扩展为8528个recall条件评估，以控制从瞬时到超长期记忆的测试。
AI.motivation: 当前流式视频基准缺乏诊断模型记住什么以及记得多久的工具，无法区分真正的模型遗忘与自然世界状态变化，这限制了自主智能体在动态真实环境中的连续情景记忆能力评估。
AI.method: 构建了统一的流式多模态大语言模型框架，使用Qwen3-VL作为统一骨干，比较了多种记忆管理机制：滑动窗口、注意力sink、KV-cache剪枝、合并和卸载。设计了答案有效性窗口(AVW)来指定答案保持有效的时间跨度，将问题展开为8528个recall条件评估。
AI.result: Token剪枝比token合并能更好保留细粒度细节和时间结构，量化卸载能挽救超长期记忆。所有机制运行均低于实时性能(>1s/帧)，最佳方法准确率仅约45%，聚合准确率掩盖了不同的记忆特征差异。
AI.conclusion: 当前架构存在关键差距，所有方法准确率远低于实际应用需求，需要EGOSTREAM提供的诊断测试环境来缩小这些差距。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain - EGOSTREAM focuses on egocentric vision and streaming episodic memory for large language models (memory management, QA recall tasks), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motions from text). The only shared element is that both involve vision-language models, but the purposes are entirely different: one is for memory/recall evaluation in LLMs, the other is for motion generation in computer graphics. This paper does not address any of the pain points related to text-to-motion generation, 3D geometry extraction, or motion synthesis.

title: nuReasoning: A Reasoning-Centric Dataset and Benchmark for Long-Tail Autonomous Driving
summary: Reasoning is essential for autonomous driving (AD) in long-tail scenarios, where vehicles must apply commonsense knowledge, understand spatial relations, infer agent interactions, and make safe decisions. However, existing AD datasets and benchmarks mainly target perception, prediction, or planning, and provide limited supervision for reasoning over realistic long-tail driving scenes. We introduce nuReasoning, a large-scale real-world dataset and benchmark for reasoning-centric AD. Following the lineage of nuScenes and nuPlan, nuReasoning advances real-world AD datasets and benchmarks toward reasoning in long-tail driving scenarios. The dataset contains 20,000 clips, each 20 seconds long, collected across multiple cities, with synchronized multi-camera images, LiDAR data, HD maps, object annotations, and human-verified reasoning annotations spanning Spatial Reasoning, Decision Reasoning, and Counterfactual Reasoning. Unlike prior datasets that focus primarily on visual question answering, nuReasoning supports both reasoning evaluation and planning evaluation, enabling a direct study of how reasoning supervision affects driving performance. Experiments show that fine-tuning VLMs on nuReasoning substantially improves driving-specific question answering, while incorporating reasoning supervision into VLA training improves planning performance even when textual reasoning outputs are disabled at inference time. These results establish nuReasoning as a foundation for evaluating and improving robust, interpretable, reasoning-driven AD systems in realistic long-tail settings.

AI.tldr: nuReasoning是一个大规模真实世界的自动驾驶推理数据集和基准测试，包含20,000个20秒的片段，涵盖空间推理、决策推理和反事实推理，支持推理评估和规划评估。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶数据集和基准主要针对感知、预测或规划，缺乏对长尾场景中推理的监督。自动驾驶在长尾场景中需要应用常识知识、理解空间关系、推断智能体交互并做出安全决策，因此需要一个专门用于推理的数据集。
AI.method: 收集多个城市的20,000个20秒剪辑片段，包含同步的多摄像头图像、LiDAR数据、高清地图、目标标注和人工验证的推理标注，涵盖空间推理、决策推理和反事实推理三种类型。实验对VLMs进行微调并将推理监督融入VLA训练。
AI.result: 在nuReasoning上微调VLMs显著提升了驾驶特定问题的回答能力；将推理监督融入VLA训练提高了规划性能，即使在推理时间禁用文本推理输出时也是如此。
AI.conclusion: nuReasoning为在现实长尾设置中评估和改进稳健、可解释的推理驱动自动驾驶系统奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper focuses on autonomous driving reasoning (self-driving vehicle AI) while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion generation (generating human animations from text). Although both may use Vision-Language Models, the core applications are fundamentally distinct - autonomous driving decision-making vs human motion synthesis. The methods, goals, and output spaces are completely unrelated.

title: Joint Multi-Camera LiDAR Extrinsic Calibration via Learned Pairwise Initialization and Geometric Refinement
comment: Paper is accepted in CVPR 2026 Workshop URVI: Unified Robotic Vision with Cross-Modal Sensing and Alignment
summary: Most learning-based camera-LiDAR calibration methods treat each camera-LiDAR pair independently, ignoring the rigid geometric coupling in multi-camera platforms. As a result, per-camera estimates may be individually accurate yet inconsistent at the system level. We present a two-stage framework for joint multi-camera LiDAR extrinsic calibration that combines learned pairwise matching with geometric refinement. First, CMRNext is applied independently to each camera to produce initial extrinsic estimates and dense 2D-3D correspondences. These predictions are then jointly refined through a multi-frame bundle adjustment with reprojection, per-camera prior, and relative-pose prior terms. This approach converts pairwise predictions into a globally consistent multi-camera calibration. Experiments on KITTI (in-domain for CMRNext) and Walkley (out-of-domain) datasets show improved per-camera accuracy and inter-camera consistency. On KITTI, the method achieves 0.89 cm translation error and 0.038 rotation error. On Walkley, it reduces translation error from 108.6 cm to 3.1 cm, highlighting the benefit of explicit multi-camera coupling when single-camera predictions are less reliable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合学习匹配与几何优化的双阶段多相机LiDAR外参标定框架，通过CMRNext生成初始估计后，再利用多帧束调整进行全局一致性优化。
AI.motivation: 现有学习方法各自独立处理每个相机-LiDAR对，忽略了多相机平台中的刚性几何耦合，导致系统层面的不一致性。
AI.method: 首先将CMRNext独立应用于每个相机获取初始外参估计和密集2D-3D对应关系，然后通过多帧束调整（包含重投影、先验和相对位姿约束项）进行联合细化。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上达到0.89cm平移误差和0.038°旋转误差；在Walkley数据集上将平移误差从108.6cm降至3.1cm。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了每相机精度和相机间一致性，尤其在单相机预测不可靠时效果更为明显。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的论文。该论文是关于多相机LiDAR外参标定的传感器标定问题，属于机器人/自动驾驶感知领域。而研究profile是计算机图形学中的文本到动作生成(Text-to-Motion)，关注的是从文本描述生成人体运动。两者的应用领域完全不同：一个是传感器校准，一个是动作生成。即使涉及一些几何概念，但问题域、方法目的和应用场景都截然不同。

title: SurGe: Improved Surface Geometry in Point Maps
summary: Recent feedforward 3D reconstruction methods predict point maps and estimate global 3D geometry remarkably well. However, their predictions still exhibit inaccurate local surface geometry, which is clearly visible qualitatively but only weakly reflected in common metrics. To make these errors more explicit in evaluation, we introduce a point map normal metric that evaluates the local surface orientation induced by neighboring 3D predictions. To reduce these errors, we propose two complementary components: a point gradient matching loss that supervises depth-normalized 3D finite differences, and a Neighborhood Attention Decoder (NAD) that progressively upsamples features and uses Neighborhood Attention for local feature mixing. Across eight zero-shot monocular geometry benchmarks, our model, SurGe, achieves the best average rank for global point map AbsRel and consistently improves local point map and point map normal evaluations.

AI.tldr: 提出 SurGe 模型，用于改进前馈 3D 重建中的局部表面几何精度。
AI.motivation: 当前前馈 3D 重建方法虽然能预测点图并估计全局 3D 几何，但局部表面几何仍存在误差，这些误差在定性观察中明显，但在常见指标中反映较弱。
AI.method: 引入点图法线指标来评估局部表面方向；提出点梯度匹配损失监督深度归一化的 3D 有限差分；以及邻域注意力解码器(NAD)用于渐进上采样和局部特征混合。
AI.result: SurGe 在八个零样本单目几何基准测试中获得最佳平均排名，显著提升了局部点图和点图法线评估效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效减少了局部表面几何误差，提升了 3D 重建的质量。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D point cloud reconstruction from single images, which is fundamentally different from text-to-motion generation. SurGe focuses on improving surface geometry in static 3D reconstruction (point map processing), while the research profile targets generating animated human motions from text descriptions. Although both involve 3D geometry, they are in completely different application domains: one deals with reconstructing object/scene surfaces from images, the other generates temporal human motion sequences. The paper does not involve any text-to-motion alignment, diffusion models for motion synthesis, or temporal modeling for animation.

title: Recognizing Co-Speech Gestures in-the-Wild
summary: While humans naturally gesture during speech, only a sparse subset of these movements are visually depictive and semantically linked to specific spoken words. Current multimodal models struggle to capture these semantic co-speech gestures, heavily bottlenecked by a lack of precisely annotated training data. To address this, we introduce the Gesture Recognition in the Wild (GRW) dataset, the first large-scale benchmark designed to map unconstrained human gestures to specific words with frame-accurate temporal boundaries. Comprising 156,688 manually annotated video clips, GRW spans a highly diverse 150-word taxonomy of physical actions, spatial descriptors, and abstract concepts. We leverage GRW to train video models to (a) classify gestures as semantic or not, (b) recognize the word corresponding to a co-speech gesture, and (c) temporally localize the gesture. We also use GRW to establish benchmarks for these three tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Gesture Recognition in the Wild (GRW)数据集，这是首个大规模将非约束性人类手势与特定词语进行映射的数据集，具有帧级精确的时间边界。该数据集包含156,688个手动标注的视频剪辑，涵盖150个高度多样化的物理动作、空间描述符和抽象概念词汇分类。
AI.motivation: 人类在说话时自然会做手势，但只有一小部分手势具有视觉描绘性并与特定口语词汇语义关联。现有的多模态模型难以捕捉这些语义共语手势，主要受限于缺乏精确标注的训练数据。
AI.method:
1. 构建GRW数据集：收集156,688个手动标注的视频剪辑，建立150词分类法
2. 利用GRW训练视频模型完成三个任务：(a)将手势分类为语义或非语义；(b)识别与共语手势对应的词语；(c)手势时间定位
3. 为这三个任务建立基准测试
AI.result: GRW是首个具备帧级精确时间边界的大规模手势识别数据集，成功训练模型完成了手势语义分类、手势词语识别和手势时间定位三项任务，并为这些任务建立了基准。
AI.conclusion: GRW数据集的提出填补了语义共语手势识别领域缺乏大规模精确标注数据的空白，为该领域的future研究提供了重要的数据基础和基准。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses gesture recognition from videos (discriminative task), while the research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion generation (generative task). Although both involve human gestures/motions, they are fundamentally different applications: this paper recognizes existing gestures, whereas the profile needs to generate new 3D motions from text. The paper touches on semantic alignment between gestures and words and temporal localization, which relates to some pain points, but uses wrong methodology (video classification vs motion generation/synthesis). Similar domain (human motion) but different task type.

title: Learning Global Motion with Compact Gaussians for Feed-Forward 4D Reconstruction
summary: Dynamic scene reconstruction from monocular video remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Existing feed-forward methods predict 3D Gaussians pixel-wise for each frame, suffering from duplicated Gaussians and view-dependent biases that hinder effective learning of scene motion. We present C4G, a feed-forward 4D reconstruction framework built upon a compact set of timestamp-conditioned learnable Gaussian query tokens. Each token aggregates corresponding features across the full temporal context and decodes a 3D Gaussian whose position is modulated by the target timestamp, enabling globally coherent motion modeling without per-scene optimization. To capture fine-grained details, we further introduce a video diffusion model-based rendering enhancement module. Since our framework effectively aggregates features into Gaussians, we extend this capability to feature lifting, producing a 4D feature field that supports point tracking and dynamic scene understanding. C4G achieves strong novel-view synthesis performance using significantly fewer Gaussians and without requiring camera poses, while exhibiting stronger motion modeling and robustness to large temporal gaps.

AI.tldr: C4G是一种基于前馈的4D重建框架，使用时间戳条件化的可学习高斯查询令牌来重建动态场景，能够实现新视角合成、鲁棒的motion建模，并支持特征提升用于点追踪和动态场景理解。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈方法对每帧逐像素预测3D高斯，存在重复高斯和视图相关偏差的问题，阻碍了场景motion的有效学习，且需要大量高斯和相机位姿。
AI.method: 提出C4G框架，包含：1）紧凑的timestamp-conditioned可学习Gaussian query tokens，每个token聚合时序上下文特征并解码位置受目标时间戳调制的3D Gaussian；2）视频扩散模型渲染增强模块；3）扩展到feature lifting生成4D特征场支持点追踪和场景理解。
AI.result: 使用显著更少的高斯实现强大的新视角合成性能，无需相机位姿，展现更强的motion建模能力，对大的时间间隙具有更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: C4G通过compact query tokens机制有效聚合特征，实现了全局相干的Motion建模，为动态场景重建提供了一种高效的前馈解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 4D scene reconstruction using 3D Gaussians, not Text-to-Motion generation. It addresses场景 motion modeling (camera/object motion in 3D space) rather than人类动作生成. Although it uses some related concepts like temporal modeling and diffusion, the application domain is completely different - it's about novel view synthesis and point tracking, not text-driven human motion synthesis or semantic alignment between textual descriptions and visual motion features. The pain points and goals mismatch significantly.

title: KLIP: localized distribution shift detection via KL-divergence with diffusion priors in Inverse Problems
summary: Diffusion models have shown promising performance as data-driven priors for computational imaging, as well as some capacity to detect out-of-distribution (OOD) images. However, existing approaches to OOD detection often require some knowledge of the shifted distribution, fail to detect subtle or localized distribution shifts, and operate on full images, rather than the indirect measurements available in inverse problems. We propose an OOD detection metric based on the Kullback-Leibler divergence between the diffusion prior and the posterior distribution, that (i) does not require any calibration data or knowledge of the shifted distribution, and (ii) can detect whole images as OOD as well as localize OOD patches within an image. Experimentally, we show that this metric can detect subtle yet semantically meaningful distribution shifts, such as the shift from healthy liver CT scans to those with tumors, and generalizes across different types of diffusion models, datasets, and inverse problems. Our code can be found at https://github.com/voilalab/KLIP.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于KL散度的分布外检测方法(KLIP)，用于扩散模型先验的计算成像中，可检测整图和局部patch的分布偏移。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法需要了解偏移分布的先验知识、难以检测细微或局部分布_shift、且无法处理逆问题中的间接测量。
AI.method: 提出基于Kullback-Leibler散度的检测指标，衡量扩散先验与后验分布间的差异，无需标定数据或偏移分布知识。
AI.result: 能检测细微但语义显著的分布偏移（如健康肝脏CT到肿瘤CT的转变），并泛化到不同扩散模型、数据集和逆问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不需标定数据即可检测整图和局部patch的分布偏移，为扩散模型在计算成像中的OOD检测提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text), while this paper is about computational imaging / medical imaging (detecting tumor shifts in CT images). Although both use diffusion models, they are used for entirely different purposes: motion synthesis vs. medical OOD detection. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points related to text-to-motion generation, temporal consistency, or VLM-based quality assessment for motion.

title: SOCO: Benchmarking Semantic Object Correspondence in Vision Foundation Models
summary: Measuring structured object understanding in vision foundation models remains challenging due to inconsistent evaluation protocols and limited part-level supervision. Semantic correspondence (SC) evaluates this capability by testing whether object parts can be matched across instances and categories under large variations in appearance, viewpoint, and geometry. To enable a systematic SC evaluation, we introduce SOCO, a new benchmark for Semantic Object Correspondence that introduces a taxonomy of correspondence types and provides consistent, functionally meaningful keypoint annotations across 100 categories and over 1M correspondence pairs. In addition, SOCO includes keypoint language descriptions, enabling the evaluation of large vision-language models (LVLMs) and their fine-grained part-level understanding. Comprehensive experiments reveal that (i) vision foundation backbones encode strong semantic structure but transfer correspondences poorly across related categories and only partially capture object-part position, (ii) LVLMs are stronger at text-prompted part localization than at visual-reference cross-image matching, exposing a gap between language-grounded localization and fine-grained visual correspondence, and (iii) correspondence performance predicts performance on dense downstream tasks, including segmentation, tracking, 3D pose estimation, and 3D detection, more strongly than ImageNet classification. Together, these findings position SOCO as a benchmark for structured, part-level representation quality in vision and multimodal foundation models.

AI.tldr: SOCO是一个新的语义目标对应基准测试，用于评估视觉基础模型对结构化对象的理解能力，包含100个类别和超过100万对应配对的详细关键点标注。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉模型的细粒度部分级理解评估缺乏一致的系统性协议，之前的方法难以衡量模型在外观、视点和几何形状大幅变化下匹配目标部分的能力。
AI.method: 构建了包含关键点语言描述的SOCO基准，对100个类别的语义对应类型进行分类，提供一致的、具有功能意义的关键点注释，并进行了综合实验评估多种视觉基础模型和大型视觉语言模型。
AI.result: 视觉基础骨架编码强语义结构但跨类别转移对应能力弱；LVLMs在文本提示的部分定位上优于跨图像视觉对应匹配；对应性能比ImageNet分类更能预测分割、跟踪、3D姿态估计等下游任务性能。
AI.conclusion: SOCO为视觉和多模态基础模型提供了评估结构化部分级表示质量的系统性基准，揭示了当前模型在细粒度视觉对应与语言定位之间存在差距。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses semantic object correspondence in vision foundation models - a computer vision task focused on matching parts across different images/objects. The research profile, however, is about Text-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics, specifically generating 3D human motion sequences from text descriptions or video inputs. Even though both involve VLMs, the application domains are completely different: the SOCO paper is about visual understanding/recognitiontasks (part localization,pose estimation), while the profile needs generative models formotion synthesis. The pain points are unrelated - SOCO deals with cross-image correspondence, not temporal motion generation or text-to-motion alignment.

title: Linear Scaling Video VLMs for Long Video Understanding
summary: Video vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used in long-horizon and streaming settings, yet most video encoders still rely on spatiotemporal self-attention, causing compute and latency to grow quadratically with the number of frames. Existing efficiency methods improve scalability but often lose accuracy relative to full self-attention, for example through aggressive frame/token dropping or coarse attention approximations. We introduce StateKV, an inference-time method that adapts pretrained long-video VLMs to linear-time video prefill by carrying cross-frame context in a fixed-capacity, importance-based recurrent state, paired with a second full per-frame cache used for decoding. Across three long-video benchmarks and seven models spanning three families and multiple scales, StateKV remains close to full self-attention and consistently outperforms dominant sliding-window / recency-based streaming approximations, without fine-tuning or architectural changes. StateKV also reduces video-prefill cost measured FLOPs, enabling stronger accuracy at a fixed compute budget by running larger models. These results suggest a practical step toward scalable long-video understanding.

AI.tldr: 提出StateKV方法，通过固定容量循环状态携带跨帧上下文，将预训练长视频VLMs适配到线性时间视频预fill，同时保留第二每帧缓存用于解码，在不微调或改变架构的情况下实现高效长视频理解。
AI.motivation: 现有视频编码器依赖时空自注意力，导致计算和延迟随帧数呈二次方增长；现有效率方法如帧/_TOKEN丢弃或粗粒度注意力近似会损害精度。
AI.method: 引入StateKV推理时方法：使用固定容量、基于重要性的循环状态携带跨帧上下文，配合第二完整每帧缓存用于解码，实现线性时间视频预fill。
AI.result: 在三个长视频基准测试和七个模型上，StateKV性能接近全自注意力，持续优于主流滑动窗/最近性流式近似方法；同时降低FLOPs，使更强模型能在固定算力下运行。
AI.conclusion: 为可扩展长视频理解提供实用步骤，无需微调或架构修改即可实现高效准确的长视频处理。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain - The paper addresses Video Understanding/Computation efficiency for VLMs, while the research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics. These are fundamentally different applications: analyzing vs generating. Although both involve video, video understanding (classifying/comprehending video content) is entirely separate from motion generation (creating 3D human motion). The paper doesn't address any of the pain points related to 3D motion geometry, temporal motion consistency, or text-motion alignment. Only similarity is that both mention VLMs, but the paper uses VLM for video comprehension while the profile needs it for quality assessment of generated motions.

title: Representation Forcing for Bottleneck-Free Unified Multimodal Models
summary: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) aim to handle perception and generation in a single model. Yet existing UMMs still rely on a frozen, separately pretrained VAE for image generation, imposing a structural bottleneck. Naively removing it introduces a quality gap, as the model must learn both high-level structure and low-level details from raw pixels. In this paper, we propose Representation Forcing (RF), a technique that closes this gap by making representation prediction a native capability of the model. Concretely, RF forces the decoder to autoregressively predict visual representations as intermediate tokens before pixels; these tokens then stay in context to guide pixel diffusion within the same backbone. By turning representations from perception outputs into generation targets, RF eliminates the need for any external generative latent space. We find that RF benefits both understanding and generation. On image generation, our pixel-space model with RF matches state-of-the-art VAE-based unified models. On image understanding, pixel-space RF generally outperforms its VAE-based variant. Together, these results offer an effective step toward end-to-end, bottleneck-free UMMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Representation Forcing (RF)技术，让统一多模态模型(UMMs)在像素空间中原生预测视觉表示作为中间tokens，消除对外部VAE的依赖，实现端到端的图像理解和生成。
AI.motivation: 现有UMMs仍依赖冻结的、单独预训练的VAE进行图像生成，造成结构性瓶颈；直接移除VAE会导致质量下降，因模型需从原始像素同时学习高级结构和低级细节。
AI.method: Representation Forcing (RF)技术：强制解码器在自回归预测像素之前，先预测视觉表示作为中间tokens；这些表示tokens保留在上下文中指导后续像素扩散过程，使表示从感知输出转变为生成目标。
AI.result: 在图像生成任务上，带RF的像素空间模型达到与最先进的VAE基统一模型相当的质量；在图像理解任务上，像素空间RF通常优于其VAE基变体。
AI.conclusion: RF技术为实现端到端、无瓶颈的统一多模态模型提供了有效途径，同时提升了图像理解和生成性能。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about IMAGE GENERATION using diffusion models, while the research profile is about TEXT-TO-MOTION (human motion generation). Both use diffusion models superficially, but they address fundamentally different domains: image synthesis vs 3D human motion generation. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points such as 3D motion geometry, temporal motion consistency, text-to-motion alignment, or extracting 3D geometric cues from 2D video. This is a computer vision/image generation paper, not a computer graphics/motion synthesis paper.
